body:
Monica nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f5088210137f4115b07fd8a839cd484f&_e=khfrAY4R9zSMNoqG082CCfC-TJXkBvAI214ajgaK6ammaZKKZfUkAr9uC3i7v5IU57USD6zHctIOYy_7fs04oamy-jGWqhCEiFpwtD5YNDDWyUR3vbS35ckynxfsR_y1q3WbP-N6dgxMEtKrfjGB4odKTbWN3-OxtsUTZUC1mWMIRECeVssQvIUAGhmtn6IoFrWy9DCnT6ntHJKM13P5ymC8gzrEDFc-ND1d7FuiF2_h5RG0DOl8ouTX_iJ0aW2JR6zhunzBJxsqZxWFHpe5_Rh9K-5yW3qD0KJMwpnBUPGmzOltofq6j5YLXii4SqW313HbLm-BxfdP-DdmWJgezeRWC99lbqe1T9Ei_8aAXh3cNDpeEg7-s-SYBbiUCsjqoG3l2Qp2sbNNvtyIKE_Q8pqDNgrt97hAiVPQheMrRivKBrmI0ZX3GX0IpMqEkXF2sDrpKlxdBKox9RqTEy8IjSp1RDMBn2MyYLHlT98w4_4JSsHHy2zBLza55Ikcrxf4-Z1GiwUdRcHosq0TYOQBkw%3D%3D)

Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f5088210137f4115b07fd8a839cd484f&_e=khfrAY4R9zSMNoqG082CCfC-TJXkBvAI214ajgaK6ammaZKKZfUkAr9uC3i7v5IU57USD6zHctIOYy_7fs04oamy-jGWqhCEiFpwtD5YNDDWyUR3vbS35ckynxfsR_y1q3WbP-N6dgxMEtKrfjGB4odKTbWN3-OxtsUTZUC1mWMIRECeVssQvIUAGhmtn6IoFrWy9DCnT6ntHJKM13P5ymC8gzrEDFc-ND1d7FuiF2_h5RG0DOl8ouTX_iJ0aW2JR6zhunzBJxsqZxWFHpe5_Rh9K-5yW3qD0KJMwpnBUPGmzOltofq6j5YLXii4SqW3bjU1pfjimMa-JITwc6hmO72PTLBIoE4qiNY_2Dir5qtaohXODljW5cexouNybWNbZ0IhCBvl8MZobc_ANS4vS-CjrUcUrVGlIzqp_RRkD6pvKr1jhROom0diMm-bL1koK2cXJB7OTUTDOVTgAO2O1KEWJigRBW_LTVenV_hNbLrZSihakBBqm03YaRgVm0KVs3nMbOmmZ9FAJkmFDs6gsQ%3D%3D)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Latina woman elected to Congress from her district_! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast -- and I think she’s got a real shot at winning this time around!**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f5088210137f4115b07fd8a839cd484f&_e=khfrAY4R9zSMNoqG082CCfC-TJXkBvAI214ajgaK6ammaZKKZfUkAr9uC3i7v5IU57USD6zHctIOYy_7fs04oamy-jGWqhCEiFpwtD5YNDDWyUR3vbS35ckynxfsR_y1q3WbP-N6dgxMEtKrfjGB4odKTbWN3-OxtsUTZUC1mWMIRECeVssQvIUAGhmtn6IoFrWy9DCnT6ntHJKM13P5ymC8gzrEDFc-ND1d7FuiF2_h5RG0DOl8ouTX_iJ0aW2JR6zhunzBJxsqZxWFHpe5_Rh9K-5yW3qD0KJMwpnBUPGmzOltofq6j5YLXii4SqW3RJSsbEneydOpfGYfBLFxwgXnZV50rrTbv_PFrrwwdz2wy5VUTGG0oAPE2Hkwb-a3_dy0mid4taAHeegpUB90M2LUkDzS_ZKqF3D2IyxMglN6_FKuWdVqAUsE8RScHx2Vw4xtv88l7yEylybm9UbSmoIHdJ58PfGk4-BbukFccJ6SJbH1d_9uscJ54s-Kt1eMbKZ9Opf3RB4Hv0bdXV_BTA%3D%3D)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. And quite frankly, I’d be hard-pressed to think of a better spokesperson for border reform than someone who grew up on the border, still lives near the border, and knows the people most affected by DEMS lack of interest in border security.**

But none of this can happen without **[YOUR HELP](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f5088210137f4115b07fd8a839cd484f&_e=khfrAY4R9zSMNoqG082CCfC-TJXkBvAI214ajgaK6ammaZKKZfUkAr9uC3i7v5IU57USD6zHctIOYy_7fs04oamy-jGWqhCEiFpwtD5YNDDWyUR3vbS35ckynxfsR_y1q3WbP-N6dgxMEtKrfjGB4odKTbWN3-OxtsUTZUC1mWMIRECeVssQvIUAGhmtn6IoFrWy9DCnT6ntHJKM13P5ymC8gzrEDFc-ND1d7FuiF2_h5RG0DOl8ouTX_iJ0aW2JR6zhunzBJxsqZxWFHpe5_Rh9K-5yW3qD0KJMwpnBUPGmzOltofq6j5YLXii4SqW3Zq0sATFtfpIm70-5az3lnUHtJfVillokQ0CPcAQpZtDHDjuPxHAgSNzORpeFMKqs2R61qVrhn6Hk4Lh4-gDwTTCMhaKfq13WGhrjVzSleQO3y3T5Mcvwf9lXJDPRQvLbgDf32GtvLwstL4-SVEdQbhB7ijz2CvX8Zq3MUs-g4vWQqsJBHu35NpXUFBp5HoSboFJW85KzRYMKgbefk_0yqg%3D%3D)**.

**[Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I know? She has my full support, now I need my supporters to have her back too.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f5088210137f4115b07fd8a839cd484f&_e=khfrAY4R9zSMNoqG082CCfC-TJXkBvAI214ajgaK6ammaZKKZfUkAr9uC3i7v5IU57USD6zHctIOYy_7fs04oamy-jGWqhCEiFpwtD5YNDDWyUR3vbS35ckynxfsR_y1q3WbP-N6dgxMEtKrfjGB4odKTbWN3-OxtsUTZUC1mWMIRECeVssQvIUAGhmtn6IoFrWy9DCnT6ntHJKM13P5ymC8gzrEDFc-ND1d7FuiF2_h5RG0DOl8ouTX_iJ0aW2JR6zhunzBJxsqZxWFHpe5_Rh9K-5yW3qD0KJMwpnBUPGmzOltofq6j5YLXii4SqW32XNxUK6zPHwYGrXXE_epSKve9gO9JYrHGFAVPUoTjZ1IkioQzBCBQNPL9eQBU5yylY8xCH2xrGqw-GfSS0VPMwt5fdeqZy6Qy5lcJzKuRN-9WShviGVtNBqQDSvLrA9YxDtnw0WrvNCATjYHqspz8A_3EO8_iRbjp-w-mf5lHs8MJQlAiRLZ3eUSW2qQsUYN15UjSwmitqFC9UuNQrfLxA%3D%3D)**

Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, and**I need her in Congress with me**. Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream

This is a DOER, Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an **excellent addition** to Congress.

[**Republicans only need to pick up five seats to win back the House next year, can I get you to chip in $25, $50, maybe even $100 towards Monica’s campaign so she can help us take back the House majority?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f5088210137f4115b07fd8a839cd484f&_e=khfrAY4R9zSMNoqG082CCfC-TJXkBvAI214ajgaK6ammaZKKZfUkAr9uC3i7v5IU57USD6zHctIOYy_7fs04oamy-jGWqhCEiFpwtD5YNDDWyUR3vbS35ckynxfsR_y1q3WbP-N6dgxMEtKrfjGB4odKTbWN3-OxtsUTZUC1mWMIRECeVssQvIUAGhmtn6IoFrWy9DCnT6ntHJKM13P5ymC8gzrEDFc-ND1d7FuiF2_h5RG0DOl8ouTX_iJ0aW2JR6zhunzBJxsqZxWFHpe5_Rh9K-5yW3qD0KJMwpnBUPGmzOltofq6j5YLXii4SqW3oIegT9PAs098GOFWQ7-AXrRSEatjngKVa37I3S6QLTq7_05-56PwvNCLQs94APNMvLItQkleb7K__i4Q9GdU0iqg5vmOLMUIR3Hu3Fr58_dRqbdZs2w2PDf0hOVlc30_8bod23-dog1Wnhm9tiLX8DXMoFUOMQUoCm4P3vm68TLn2HIDCdfsryxSwvwO-nmJqeNy1pkVevhMn9fxKiNT4A%3D%3D)

I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. **I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people**.

[**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS

Derek —

I have an important ask to make, and Common Good VA said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

**One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, recently dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**

We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal.

That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back.

**And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**

**[If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good VA? clean_body: | | | Derek — I have an important ask to make, and Common Good VA said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, recently dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022. We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, — Mark | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Even in dark times, hope springs eternal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Today, we celebrate the realization of a major movement goal in critical policy concessions from the Biden administration, as well as the stark reality that the struggle continues. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMas3shYSIU0Mv9-9UBrMpbmlEOhiF4Av0D7ocawP07Gjv970OGRIirfMmnSEA7YdPraKz423xlo84i4xvNxw3YJWQIuKq1gyN5_ZIkCkhCUjaUcQCf7EV0pw8XgLPpUpA9WSWvRorYFi6tXPECBZNpyuHtE8mBDOksqAE4QPOf-3nNNCmxr5ihPB4i64a4pvuZ3a2TF7UgOWUsBEMk7jAMednQgGZ6ihLSi5bw3NDG_YoaziAZkf0Xxmzm-hWK8p3j9Ilk-Vxl7wLKo6ZmVrndhMoA9EhmhxIoPpF_yLOsz7hE/3e8/PYusCZ8SSPqAyg62kbi_UA/h0/sm3zK9h7uihnUjm-BJSyQUPhoekxLFNlWebeM2pasO4)
| | Dear Peter, It’s sometimes easy to forget that, even in dark times, hope springs eternal. Tuesday offered one reminder of that and one defeat. Last weekend, the federal election moratorium expired, exposing millions of Americans to potential eviction in the midst of a once again mounting pandemic. Activists in Washington D.C. joined by Rep. Cori Bush (D-MO) camped on the steps of Congress in protest. As it often does, her direct action created limitless opportunities for the movement, from the visibility that media coverage offered to the connections among participants. Yesterday, the Biden administration announced that the Centers for Disease Control (CDC) is crafting a policy that “in some way covers close to 90 percent of the American people or renters.” This victory would not have been possible without the millions of voices around the country from coast-to-coast helping force the issue. **[We’ve seen direct action shift federal policy on issues from housing to immigration, and foreign policy to civil rights. Can you help send us to Congress to back up Cori, Ilhan, and Rashida?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-0GaVm3aaXHBAJE-1ISocJ3Ny0IVZ7CBxaQc1rOgyFilS0aR639AZZb65p3PPU7gzUKWAbPiNbuD7-oIbbqFcTUZzLdMCUEi3rbJ3qNjMQaezeiS9yuHI6aLVKwbuUJlU6FMplsKT-7sw3SbDgMcWTy0Es3HA9Jh7IR4jN4M7ppozJh9ddVU_4D_YyJCihO1ZX1yyW_36UdUdcNx_lKqjl_VbYr_gyvvyyyoQ5Z-ZDgOktBO03HulkbdU7Bp6XUfbzW15t8d0dqIuv6NwF1o25OOdiY_qZSb_-PsrpdmT36HkL_2N6_hCG1Gw5s1gY-3nXiDK_j5rBKw3hkBKzdx-lM/3e8/PYusCZ8SSPqAyg62kbi_UA/h1/KQCpc3KjMcJsuL4JEee6HTuTi-joZcEUmRoQYq0G26w)** After the announcement about federal concessions extending the eviction moratorium, our attention was brought to former Ohio state senator, co-chair of Bernie Sanders 2020 presidential campaign, and hero to millions Nina Turner who narrowly lost her primary to a corporate democrat in Ohio's 11th congressional district. Nina‘s gut wrenching defeat reminds me of the words Senator Bernie Sanders used upon his two Presidential defeats-- "the struggle continues". Bernie continued to state that our progressive movement appreciates that not only are we winning the struggle ideologically, we are also winning it generationally, regardless of setbacks. Healthcare and judicial reform have overwhelming favorability, as well as equality. That was not the case just five years ago. So we must continue to fight. **[Can you help send us to Washington to expand it, while removing a central pillar of the establishment that undermines their voices?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-07bUEMHgky0DklJT4RAuBL2KrQjUHQVsv8Mwjhmxw-sZOE3CTUbQNw07oovZvbqOI5e6OSdG-iGTY1Tx2d3qgdXs2krRZnLQEdF-0547mWYI7y6Ne3FbxrO7trX8uZHNuzlBqWi1ZFc9hDi-LsgqpXpPDA7eH042iMTKo4uvuY7QzHeF63lE4kti9MfSwgphCv3_V1kGNx4zi1sn0CsR9KYs29oV7q6Xhwwm0BPft3lfld0GEqg341adlXU_tYhFMS9WS3wYi9xRF2csgOUkL56tWZPRDhkC_QKIiUJbSSpm1Pe400UBssxBAigHCDHRwP0Kaq4mct7ugDfCimSYD8/3e8/PYusCZ8SSPqAyg62kbi_UA/h2/XIuGS1VDpH3iO-7blb0QFkCwEMS5TyGZNWW_VgSQ20A)** With your support, we can grow the wedge of visionary policymakers that battling the centrist establishment. Visionaries that are committed to universal healthcare, climate justice, and racial justice. It is frankly shameful to see coastal enclaves proud of their progressive commitments, like San Francisco, lag so far behind. **[Want a voice in Washington who San Francisco can be proud of? Together, we’ve challenged establishment power for 20 years, endured character assassination, won more votes than any previous challenger to the current Speaker of the House—and we’re ready to finish the job.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-wxBXXRpmrdZU6XhfDmDm6rdwHpmwaeT5AqW0kKhtfwm4OIshJ5OxBvGOiAAaLiWmPSycsJY3t5IAHjMGedVr1H2CMpAwz4GFVJF7mdpCg8OJTL6GoX65Syr0kfwthX1vm1D1Q7VFH5VeRrrFBACdREZuwgYkpepHj3DSjHFXoIr4SsUN2FW8uwdOmd0Muydn9vBwsMAcXmBgMSWwU_t6jGnPND4C68-b1sUoVwslZyM7VytTGPVQxoExzHaowv2hqiRV18zcbf1fqTHdkfYT1fB3pVts60wx6eJpmc5Gv9pfDCdatwIlW3-sDvgMKEZC8I9A8--K6dP_0B_SV5exIE/3e8/PYusCZ8SSPqAyg62kbi_UA/h3/5XzcLTdoe-2lkOzQ7H0p1fCBVxnEkJHudsSmWRUnDlY)** Thank you so much for standing with us! Warm regards, Shahid

name: =?utf-8?Q?JessicaCisneros.org?=
subject: Your personal link
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
#
WOW!
Jessica announced her run for Congress early this morning and we’re absolutely blown away by the response.
It’s not lost on us that Henry Cuellar starts this race with more than $1.7 million in the bank. But, we can close the gap fast thanks to the power of grassroots donors. If a few more people chip in right now we’re going to be able to announce that we broke a major fundraising milestone.
**Can you help us out by becoming one of our very first Founding Donors? Here’s a personal link just for you:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-email-20210805-4-mc?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=8792f60c13&e=ed416558ef)
What we raise in these first 24 hours will set the tone about the viability of our campaign. Strong initial fundraising numbers = more grassroots excitement and donations + more endorsements from folks who think we can win + more press coverage about our candidacy. The bottom line is these first founding donations are so critical to our success.

Thank you for chipping in tonight before our launch day ends.
\- Team Jessica
[Donate »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=5b823777d2&e=ed416558ef)
---
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=0e380e3d06). Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Re: Your introduction to Monica
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Monica nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for you to help my friend make it to the top of the hill this time around | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmNCMQG1PY-qcQQyFE7J1T0X4EgrycOidy8KWEh3GWJZ3YTVP9pQiORdUAdOUQh6XWHpANknSsvgnrvJpmErt6GfL7Ly7s0boKh7Eu-yXNoSoRKGIB6BdgB-EBlzWLSw5V5IN804ws0JLdwrmVW8odxC39C0D5X8MnWAMc8G53ceFvgXzWtUPLip3OXtrg-vr0e8cP2zf1ghJ7ba0tEG2D5qQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz Hernandez. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmN9bHJPA72mMEyZeVEhJLOuZ6oW24PEo2aYhzr_MRZcE16Q2QQS2NVdCF-pDsApSlEEFbeaOkGPwC32lZWZQC_EquabXNqKZV4gaejbbTof7q0W9B8sNS5UhKsXNB54VbNuteq_EqShZI9Q7xEhwQcwl7Osxs0OA68__ALqi38gsf1UPOLox0FTTP29NgIU_THiz22ycrbMAogPuqHs2Fs8w%3D%3D)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Latina woman elected to Congress from her district_! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast -- and I think she’s got a real shot at winning this time around!**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmNSicOYGr9ouwIfyi0E0iZpFZe3DwGdW1z-wy7KN0Lx0NzGIo4DyQjujBZ_WbX-JxKhUUv51oK-IS4yHonIBMJ4tst-Wu1YVv9VuB_lEhsZtCw9lR_QQrUw2u_FT0VA2jrPkBueXk8C07JgRvLEV-g3wD6lEOgnIL2_e1UUknIGT6EcJosLTDcUOz8NwuEYcZ08OSoc2FngvOh5SpOoclYsw%3D%3D)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. And quite frankly, I’d be hard-pressed to think of a better spokesperson for border reform than someone who grew up on the border, still lives near the border, and knows the people most affected by DEMS lack of interest in border security.**

But none of this can happen without **[YOUR HELP](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmN8YqE18o_JTRlZnLAVVeAy4gjjTaA4f_wBhVimmLCSnrkA0TYpwFga6EW5zCkeFUmBLaE3dhpSOVbW-tHryGlBjHyyXFDQbhFGbBG56ZaAhtBXluIVd9jSthnIt9SZivVTJFzncw0vBWTgfoDGxpVVGBD-16ohKjT6_i5OJceC3QsADzBYkZrCyPp07tbC6jJI-Q7i3LJot5ZZR1yqlmR8g%3D%3D)**.

**[Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I know? She has my full support, now I need my supporters to have her back too.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmNFOKNBapWmlNA1qx2F_Hs9A6tZxyh2tQvedR4-D1tYjgPqgY_2O7ccTzvzriW8XGO5ssW1-GMk-PUqswki0KppWePIwYwsIDHaRggEFj3Hb8q6W_8Tf9EDhN80bqoiRoWlRkVWssQo1ozC0mErWPE5YEBMMdTBSV_9ZFZz5-pazUvNrevbBcXr7xNqsySnzoiEElCcHw56Z6UNu24_C0BRQ%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS

---

Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, and**I need her in Congress with me**. Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream

This is a DOER, Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an **excellent addition** to Congress.

[**Republicans only need to pick up five seats to win back the House next year, can I get you to chip in $25, $50, maybe even $100 towards Monica’s campaign so she can help us take back the House majority?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmNhSz6WKcp2vexZM9eM12Ai9JTEKEeSz57kxbNK0YnXwt_NFpRj_Tw67sHOewjcJMZ5mHxVeh7j-nBFD3Ibyz9cg5HLNy9LsToqfzOmGCBwtZYCM0ZqDlQU9PFMy_GXpjVEjMXAP8UWOXYjvhwXC_LoX6EMr80nJUwuyKq13QsSmrEB41xHMBENioEI__RF2s5IAhXn52mqLH-ZStpyGZalA%3D%3D)

I’m grateful to have Monica as a friend and the American people would be extremely fortunate to have her as a Congresswoman. **I can say, without a doubt, that a win for Monica would be a win for Republicans and a win for the American people**.

[**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmNPGlXbWqhvfsdTcHJ-Z06nVPlAW6oo-kpWu9Qef7F2kEQ4T8vaFa2hsxY34ZnteoWloH94Zd7lBHrViF97hnaPSwS0aTMNx9grmRZ0P9VmirYjGdDQm1BpwmNSsurd00Jlm2rX9sDbLWlLnFTh_ufiUaY5vL6v3_PfqRus3CfnZU76-z9A4HM58Q2lSRx-8qh_edRcMyiHH7WdXl6YiHkpw%3D%3D)
---

**[Can I count on you to support the entire party by joining me in backing Monica?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19b003632fe54bca99c678a8e9cd9b99&_e=UKcGlMFJqJw9chXgXTnCC4ghrrZPzaukelgqR1qUuGxJIv4NWtMBac4AqSrvE8JTefIuLpLquKIQ8tP1sOXN_-RGYoJfFVP4_zipeYhatT97PcwHOl686956A_QiivEL9EHdztF8gRzpD9DwQM_qWqgGZUaU_TMn-36mpa7SqVM-ZRfCodsz2T91AzQTMj_tH8reVLnYkJfzjwyyn93FhpNoGGqlYU8yS1wsvThTKQ1pfXvtqgpDqccOack4cuMIVt--IcE-M-VelCXELLlbhEHkH3nwlqySmSpyqLpDUpzgZUR0KIQ5nOKi7W2iijmNRtk5qyRddg2Q1YItzdrShWiuIFjRpL1x84i8M0JB1kfrjLKqQDf4gNyoxXJEUffSzzA__Gx191WKUfwGyn3il0oZ-G4FaN13NdhlVg5KxozijhCpKsqm8q5SJyM69bE4Q5a6uiq6F5gKDmo0BtkOrtKrZnlK8An4wM3gWjG7sf_27bR1SA4zVGB-X4DS56UC_jqrqLwlWpmJluo9J3n7YQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you
Rep. Dan Crenshaw

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Never Again at the State Fair
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=1)
---
Peter \-- We just got approval from the state fair for our **Never Again** booth. Now it’s time to put our message in front of 2 Million Minnesotans and set the record straight about what Governor Walz did to our businesses, our youth and our liberties! As you know, the media and government have launched a new fear campaign over this Delta variant. They’re shaming Vikings players and coaches for refusing to take the jab. Masks mandates and vaccine passports might be right around the corner. **Our government is even[luring in 12 year olds with a $100 incentive](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_luring_12_yr_olds_with_money_to_get_experimental_jab?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=2) so they get the experimental vaccine. I think a growing number of Minnesotans are finally waking up to the ridiculousness of Walz’ antics.** So we’re thrilled to put our message in front of them at the State Fair and provide a completely new narrative they won’t hear anywhere else. More importantly, we’re going to grow our list of supporters for Rep Erik Mortensen’s **Never Again Bill**. The more people on board, the more pressure we can put on legislators in St Paul. And that’s how you get things done.
### Here’s what I need from you...
Our booth will be powered by top notch volunteers who are motivated to spread our message of stopping lockdowns, ending mask mandates and eliminating forced vaccinations. We have two six hour shifts a day and all volunteers will get a free ticket into the fairgrounds. **If you would like to help us spread the Never Again message to state fairgoers, please register to volunteer by clicking[here](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=3). Wendy will reach out to you right away.**
## [**== > Yes, I want to volunteer**](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=4)
I know some people are too busy or don’t want to travel to the fair this year. That’s understandable. You can still [**support our cause with a financial donation**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=5)! We have to print 20,000 pieces of lit, buy the signs for the booth and put on another coat of fresh paint. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=6) | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=7 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=7)
---
If you know the state fair, the Radical Left will be there in droves. Tim Walz' Re-election Campaign and Keith Ellison will have booths spreading their propaganda to the uninformed voter.
We can't do this without your help. Register to volunteer at the booth or make a generous donation today to get our message to more Minnesotans!
**[Please consider a $25, $50, $100 or bigger donation today and help us spread the message of Never Again to two million Minnesotans](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=8).**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=never_again_at_state_fair&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Glenn Grothman & Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Failure has CONSEQUENCES
body:
We need to hold them to it.

Peter,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58082178:J6PfeFlNZ:m:1:3253819041:9E22D64E80782036B068196A1A8EA626:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58082178:J6PfeFlNZ:m:1:3253819041:9E22D64E80782036B068196A1A8EA626:r)
**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

They can try to silence me but Peter, I'm not backing down from this fight. Please, stand with me today to share the facts that Fauci and his allies don't want you to hear.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Believe it or not, those brave legislators haven't left Washington, D.C. since that day. They are strategizing with progressive leaders like Bill and Hillary Clinton and Stacey Abrams to mount a strong defense against this insidious GOP power-play. | **[STAND WITH STACEY: PROTECT THE VOTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33608928/299408481/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210806_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI2MjM3OTY1LWJhZjYtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i5ZzqiIAydQrHUTW9e_l8IxPv-oE4GHs2xZ2C4BsTsU=)**

Stacey's right when she tells the Texas Democrtic legislators that “what you're doing is bigger than just Texas.”

When Democrats Turn Out is leading an aggressive nationwide digital and ground campaign to replace these cynical, self-serving Republicans with real progressives who will fight for our values in the House and Senate. Our movement needs to win strong support at all levels of government to give the Texas Democrats a fighting chance against the GOP. **Can we count on you to stand with Stacey Abrams and progressives across the nation in the fight to protect voting rights?**

**[This can't wait, Peter. Our brave Texas Democrats need your support to defend the vote, but if we can't hit tonight's vital $2,000 fundraising deadline, our response team will be forced to dramatically scale back our nationwide voting rights defense effort. body:
China should be stripped of hosting the 2022 Olympic Games. Do you agree? >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1fad36318b3ad951/c6b2aba7d7e1b525c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, I stand with John Ratcliffe. **The Former Director of National Intelligence has been making news recently by calling for China to be stripped of hosting the 2022 Winter Olympics**. China is our greatest national security threat by far, and their refusal to be transparent about the origins of a virus that has killed MILLIONS across the globe makes them the least deserving country in existence to host the next Olympics. _Why is it that an American athlete can be banned from the Olympics for smoking legal marijuana in grief, but the International Olympic Committee is willing to look the other way on China’s human rights violations, religious persecutions, and the deadliest systematic cover-up in history?_ It’s insane, and we must stand together to stop the Chinese Communist Party from hosting the 2022 Winter Olympics! **If you agree with me and want to hold China accountable,[_please chip in to join the fight right now_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/1fad36318b3ad951/67e4812d70357609c3d6b838967d376c/35903)**. body:
Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite. That's why they're censoring my video...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58086891:JkQfgFlNY:m:1:3253819041:C9C9965FE08B993D8897B6BF1F907503:r) | |

Peter,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58086891:JkQfgFlNY:m:1:3253819041:C9C9965FE08B993D8897B6BF1F907503:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58086891:JkQfgFlNY:m:1:3253819041:C9C9965FE08B993D8897B6BF1F907503:r)
**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

They can try to silence me but Peter, I'm not backing down from this fight. Please, stand with me today to share the facts that Fauci and his allies don't want you to hear.
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58086892:JkQfgFlNY:m:1:3253819041:C9C9965FE08B993D8897B6BF1F907503:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33613211/299420918/-2023814932?refcode=20210806.1_EW_8R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzJiZDQ5Yy1iZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Qq8aKZNnp9W8RgoB_GuDIiYAYUttgO2mrw0m8a8vR4=)

| | We blew it, Derek. Big time.

Last week, we learned **the Republican National Committee is planning on pouring millions of dollars into Virginia to fund a MASSIVE field program.** They’re building an army to elect Glenn Youngkin.

So we asked for your help to raise $22,000 by midnight on Wednesday so we could match them on the ground.

But Derek, I just checked the finance report ... and we missed our goal.

| | Peter, Indiana Republicans are starting their statewide Redistricting Tour today, or as we call it, their "Gerrymandering Tour". This is only an exercise to check a box. The maps will be drawn behind closed doors with consultants from Washington, D.C. And -- no public hearings are planned once the maps are drawn up. It's unacceptable and un-American. [**We’ve seen what partisan redistricting has done to Indiana over the last 10 years — limited debate, extreme policies, and decreased competition in our democracy. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33614252/299422621/624230061?refcode=Redistrict.FR.08.06.21.&Redistrict.FR.08.06.21.=Redistrict.FR.08.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2U5NDljMy1jMGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uOu2RX5XAdoFWKM2bS2HB7xT-ySdWvYSJcUa_6gPiZs=) This time we are taking the fight to them and **here's what we're up against:** ** ** A Republican supermajority at the Statehouse. ** ** Republicans have insider knowledge on what the maps will look like to be able to start promoting candidates. ** ** And a rigged redistricting process that has allowed Indiana Republicans to drown out the voices of Hoosier voters all over the state. **[When Hoosiers elect Democrats, stuff gets done and Indiana Democrats all over the state are fighting hard to create a better future for Hoosier families. Today and tomorrow across Indiana, Democrats and independents will gather at events to bring honest voices and serious questions to the Republicans in power. **So here's what we do have:** Congressman André Carson and Frank Mrvan fighting for us at the federal level. Indiana Democrats in the Statehouse like State Senators Eddie Melton and Shelli Yoder and Statehouse Representatives Robin Shackleford and Mike Andrade who have been delivering for Hoosiers and are not slowing down anytime soon. We've got a team of Indiana Democrats crisscrossing the state to highlight how Democrats are helping Hoosiers put COVID-19 behind them and delivering common-sense solutions to today's problems facing our families. We show up to fix problems and help folks. The GOP shows up to pretend to get your input. **We've also got grassroots supporters like you, Peter. ** The work to rebuild Indiana is happening right now. It's more important than ever that we continue to meet voters where they are and help solve some of today's most pressing issues facing our families and communities. Democrats are eager to put partisanship aside and deliver for Hoosiers. It's unacceptable and un-American. = This time we are taking the fight to them and here's what we're up against: A Republican supermajority at the Statehouse. Republicans have insider knowledge on what the maps will look like to be able to start promoting candidates. And a rigged redistricting process that has allowed Indiana Republicans to drown out the voices of Hoosier voters all over the state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Peter, it sounds like the deck is stacked against us, but we know that we must do everything possible to stop the Republicans from disenfranchising voters. Today and tomorrow across Indiana, Democrats and independents will gather at events to bring honest voices and serious questions to the Republicans in power. So here's what we do have: Congressman André Carson and Frank Mrvan fighting for us at the federal level. Indiana Democrats in the Statehouse like State Senators Eddie Melton and Shelli Yoder and Statehouse Representatives Robin Shackleford and Mike Andrade who have been delivering for Hoosiers and are not slowing down anytime soon. We've got a team of Indiana Democrats crisscrossing the state to highlight how Democrats are helping Hoosiers put COVID-19 behind them and delivering common-sense solutions to today's problems facing our families. We show up to fix problems and help folks. The GOP shows up to pretend to get your input. We've also got grassroots supporters like you, Peter. The work to rebuild Indiana is happening right now. It's more important than ever that we continue to meet voters where they are and help solve some of today's most pressing issues facing our families and communities. Democrats are eager to put partisanship aside and deliver for Hoosiers. = Continued grassroots support will help Indiana Democrats keep up the fight against unfair redistricting practices behind closed doors. Donate today to stand with Hoosier Democrats for real change for Hoosiers across our state. In Solidarity, Indiana Democratic Party | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

As Executive Director of Meet Our Moment, I'm tasked with leading our candidate recruitment efforts and developing a training program that gives our participants the skills they need to run for and win public office. It is time to Meet Our Moment and grow the bench of diverse candidates to run for and win offices across Virginia. Our future depends on it.

name: Team Nikki
subject: Ron’s latest lie
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends:

We wanted to give you an update on Ron DeSantis’ dangerous approach to the recent COVID-19 surge.

First, DeSantis didn’t lift a finger to encourage vaccinations, causing COVID-19 cases to surge. Now, lives and our economic recovery are at risk.

Then, he threw a temper tantrum when asked about the spike in cases, once again failing to lead.

Now, he’s blaming migrants for the surge in cases and attacking President Biden in an outrageous attempt to deflect blame.

We need to fight back and make sure DeSantis’ lies don’t break through. Click here to add your name to condemn DeSantis’ COVID response. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/s39f5XMwcUCOudCjz_i5Yg2]

DeSantis launched this false, Trump-style response because he’s scared. New polling shows his approval underwater by more than 10% among independents.

He’s failing to take responsibility—and trying to appease Trump Republicans in preparation for his Presidential run in the meantime.

In times of crisis, DeSantis plays politics, refuses to take responsibility, and fails to lead. We deserve better. If you agree, please click here to add your name and help us fight back. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/s39f5XMwcUCOudCjz_i5Yg2]

Thanks for standing with us. Together, we’re going to stop DeSantis and win this race.

— Team Nikki

6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148

United States

name: Team Malcolm
subject: Good and bad news today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Working people don't need any more spokespersons in Washington
#

Hey friends. We've got some good news and some bad news today.
**First, the good news:**
Our movement for working families is gaining momentum, and we've officially begun our grassroots organizing efforts across all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties!
**Now, the bad news:**
A new Democratic opponent just entered our already crowded race, meaning it's more important now than ever for us to build the biggest grassroots team in the Commonwealth.
Unlike some of our opponents, Malcolm has pledged not to take a dime from corporate PACs or their lobbyists — so we're counting on lots of donations from everyday folks in order to fund this campaign.
**And honestly, August tends to be a slower month for fundraising, so if you could make a donation today to keep our momentum going strong, we'd like to ask:**
[Can you make a $3 contribution to Malcolm's campaign for U.S. Senate? Winning a competitive race like this requires each of us to do our part.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33618718/299428894/-353695395?refcode2=56c6f5bf-c6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210806-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM2ZjViZi1jNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_foKxZeJVcLzNr_WMs-21A5AOUYWN110lEnCTDONNko=)
Working people don't need any more spokespersons in Washington. It's time for us to have our own seat at the table.
Malcolm is the only candidate in this race who knows the working-poor experience first hand.
Growing up, he watched his mom ration her insulin and struggle to pay rent. He got his first job at 12, washing dishes to help his mom make ends meet.
We know that Malcolm is the best candidate to represent working people and deliver the change our families need. But we have a whole lot of work ahead of us, and the path forward won't be easy.
**That's why we're counting on your support to keep our momentum going strong. Can we count on you to add a donation today?**
[If you're able, please contribute $3 to Malcolm's campaign for Senate before you close this email. Every donation makes a huge difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33618719/299428895/-353695395?refcode2=56c6f5bf-c6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210806-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM2ZjViZi1jNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_foKxZeJVcLzNr_WMs-21A5AOUYWN110lEnCTDONNko=)
This campaign is powered by working folks, for working folks. Thanks for standing with us today.
\- Team Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---

PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: the old switcheroo

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: Universal broadband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I couldn’t even load my emails!
#
If you’re reading my email this morning, there’s a good chance you’re accessing the internet from where you are in your area.
Unfortunately, there are more than 400,000 North Carolinians — myself included — who lack access to high speed broadband, let alone any sort of internet access, in 2021.
**That’s why I made universal broadband a major part of my campaign platform, and I’m the only progressive Democrat in this race for U.S. Senate to do so.** I could really use your support, so I have to ask:
[**Will you please chip in your first donation of just $3 or more to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8354?refcode=em20210806-320&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=320%2E3698%2EnOJnro)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8354?refcode=em20210806-320&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=320%2E3698%2EnOJnro)**
Universal broadband is a policy that is personal. Like a lot of women, I had to put family first when my dad got really sick. The youngest of six siblings, I moved back home to the family farm.
I went from working as a scientist with Boeing to waking up in my childhood house on a road that wasn’t paved, and in a community where there wasn’t a half decent grocery store within an hour drive. **Because the internet was so bad in my town in rural North Carolina, I couldn’t even load my emails.**
It’s not just me and my family — it’s a problem across North Carolina and the South that we must fix. Lack of broadband access limits employment and educational opportunities for far too many Americans. In particular, universal broadband infrastructure would level the playing field for rural Black communities in the South.
[**I’m proud to be the only candidate dedicated to making universal broadband a reality in America, along with other urgent changes like universal health care and reparations. Can you please make a donation of $3 or more today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8354?refcode=em20210806-320&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=320%2E3698%2EnOJnro)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8354?refcode=em20210806-320&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=320%2E3698%2EnOJnro)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210806-320-footer&t=5&refcode2=320_3698_nOJnro&akid=320%2E3698%2EnOJnro)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=320%2E3698%2EnOJnro)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=320%2E3698%2EnOJnro)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Dr. Neil Shah
subject: Never Again
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| Peter, Last year a close friend’s mother and father were admitted to the hospital with COVID in Georgia. The father had bad lungs and deteriorated quickly. The mother did well, but he eventually succumbed to COVID. During his time in the hospital nobody was permitted to visit him. Not his wife - who could safely have been cohabitated with him - not his daughter (who was vaccinated), not his son-in-law. Nobody.
## He died alone!
My friend, also a physician, was outraged. She wrote a bill to prevent this moral travesty from ever happening again. She got the bill introduced. She testified in support of that bill. Legislators on both sides of what is a nonpartisan issue claimed to support her. Then the hospital lobbyists put their thumbs on the scale. The bill died in committee, killed by the career political class. **In March of 2020, Governor Walz decided by himself to ban elective surgeries. Routine preventative examinations were delayed. Mammograms, colonoscopies and other lifesaving surveillance was delayed.** I operated every day through the early pandemic. Not a single patient or staff member was infected, or passed, COVID in our clinic. No one has done more to destroy the freedoms and prosperity of Minnesota than Tim Walz. His anti-science, anti-freedom lockdowns were a disaster for the mental health of our youth and our state’s economy. Here we are staring down mask mandates on our kids again this fall with the looming spectre of lockdowns close behind - all because we could not pass Never Again legislation to curb these abuses. **That’s why I’m running to be your next Governor – to save the state we love from career politicians.** With your help, I will be elected as Governor. I look forward to signing the Never Again Bill to ensure that we will not be subjected to the whims of a single tyrant who views you as dials to be manipulated on a whim. Can you imagine a Governor getting elected and the first thing he does is say “take away my powers!” That’s easy for me to do because I’m not running to have power over you, I’m running because I believe that our state is better without more government control. But to be in that position to sign the Never Again Bill into law, I first need to get elected. That’s where I need your help. **I’m an outsider running against career politicians. Instead of working my way through the political ranks, I built a thriving small business that helps Minnesotans.** I’ve realized we can’t win back the Governorship by using the same old playbook that the other career politicians are using. It WILL fail. I want to save Minnesota for you and your children – and I’m not afraid to do what it takes to make that happen. I’ll challenge Tim Walz to travel to all 87 counties and debate me on “the science.” I believe he should stop hiding in Saint Paul, come out and face you and explain why he locked you down. **Please help me serve you in St Paul by making a[donation to the campaign](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shah_never_again&n=1). We need everyone on board if we want to get rid of Governor Walz for good.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shah_never_again&n=2 "Donate to Elect Neil") [Donate to Elect Neil](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shah_never_again&n=2)
---
If you haven’t seen my launch video yet, please take a look at it now. And please share it with friends and family so our message gets out.
Radical leftism is a cancer...it must be removed.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kxRmIu0rXokwNNMTv35VYGk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shah_never_again&n=3)
Together we can disrupt the political system in Saint Paul by sending in a true outsider dedicated to service, not climbing the political ladder. Minnesota is a state that we love and it’s worth saving from career politicians.
**[Help me. Please consider a financial contribution today to help Save Minnesota from career politicians](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shah_never_again&n=4).**
****
**Thank you!**
****
Sincerely,
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDKYjXcFcnny7CTruXj7gH44&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shah_never_again&n=5)

clean_body: | Peter, Last year a close friend’s mother and father were admitted to the hospital with COVID in Georgia. The father had bad lungs and deteriorated quickly. The mother did well, but he eventually succumbed to COVID. During his time in the hospital nobody was permitted to visit him. Not his wife - who could safely have been cohabitated with him - not his daughter (who was vaccinated), not his son-in-law. Nobody. He died alone! My friend, also a physician, was outraged. She wrote a bill to prevent this moral travesty from ever happening again. She got the bill introduced. She testified in support of that bill. Legislators on both sides of what is a nonpartisan issue claimed to support her. Then the hospital lobbyists put their thumbs on the scale. The bill died in committee, killed by the career political class. In March of 2020, Governor Walz decided by himself to ban elective surgeries. Routine preventative examinations were delayed. Mammograms, colonoscopies and other lifesaving surveillance was delayed. I operated every day through the early pandemic. Not a single patient or staff member was infected, or passed, COVID in our clinic. No one has done more to destroy the freedoms and prosperity of Minnesota than Tim Walz. His anti-science, anti-freedom lockdowns were a disaster for the mental health of our youth and our state’s economy. Here we are staring down mask mandates on our kids again this fall with the looming spectre of lockdowns close behind - all because we could not pass Never Again legislation to curb these abuses. That’s why I’m running to be your next Governor – to save the state we love from career politicians. With your help, I will be elected as Governor. I look forward to signing the Never Again Bill to ensure that we will not be subjected to the whims of a single tyrant who views you as dials to be manipulated on a whim. Can you imagine a Governor getting elected and the first thing he does is say “take away my powers!” That’s easy for me to do because I’m not running to have power over you, I’m running because I believe that our state is better without more government control. But to be in that position to sign the Never Again Bill into law, I first need to get elected. That’s where I need your help. I’m an outsider running against career politicians. Instead of working my way through the political ranks, I built a thriving small business that helps Minnesotans. I’ve realized we can’t win back the Governorship by using the same old playbook that the other career politicians are using. It WILL fail. I want to save Minnesota for you and your children – and I’m not afraid to do what it takes to make that happen. I’ll challenge Tim Walz to travel to all 87 counties and debate me on “the science.” I believe he should stop hiding in Saint Paul, come out and face you and explain why he locked you down. Please help me serve you in St Paul by making a. We need everyone on board if we want to get rid of Governor Walz for good. | "Donate to Elect Neil" If you haven’t seen my launch video yet, please take a look at it now. And please share it with friends and family so our message gets out. Radical leftism is a cancer...it must be removed. Together we can disrupt the political system in Saint Paul by sending in a true outsider dedicated to service, not climbing the political ladder. Minnesota is a state that we love and it’s worth saving from career politicians. . ** Thank you! ** Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127 -=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States

clean_body: The pressure is on to win the Senate. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Peter, The stakes have never been higher. The Democrats are actively destroying our country. They’re spending trillions on socialism, ending private property rights, and forcing unnecessary mask mandates on our children. And that’s just the beginning. body:

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club
Friend,

As Virginia's FIRST Congressional Candidate to sign the ‘1776 Pledge’, I am putting my foot down and drawing the line for our children's education.

The 1776 Pledge was founded in response to Critical Race Theory. As Biden and the Teachers Unions force Critical Race Theory on our children, I wanted to FIGHT BACK against it.

By taking the Pledge, here’s how we fight back:
* Restore honest, patriotic education that cultivates in our children a profound love for our country.
* Promote a curriculum that teaches that all children are created equal, have equal moral value under God, our Constitution, and the law, and are members of a national community united by our founding principles.
* Prohibit any curriculum that pits students against one another on the basis of race or sex.
* Prevent schools from politicizing education by prohibiting any curriculum that requires students to protest and lobby during or after school.

And now I want YOU to take the pledge, Friend.

Please make a contribution of $17.76 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show your support of the 1776 Pledge. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

name: Karen Bass
subject: 18 states. 30 new statewide voting regulations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team --

Today I'm thinking of my late colleague and friend, Congressman John Lewis, and the countless civil rights activists like him who fought and bled for voting rights. Their determination led to the Voting Rights Act of 1965 -- passed 56 years ago today -- which outlawed racial discrimination in voting.

Congressman Lewis dedicated his entire life to protecting the sacred right to vote. And continuing that fight has never been more important.

Donald Trump's Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen is fueling an aggressive voter suppression campaign. _At least_ 30 voter restrictions have passed in 18 states this year alone. This is a civil rights crisis, and I need you to make your voice heard to fight back.

**[America is standing at a crossroads, and it's time for leaders to decide which side they're on: the side of American democracy or the side of extremism. I stand in solidarity with the American people and our democracy. If you're standing with me in the fight to protect voting rights, add your name next to mine today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1xNrmhQ5rYNRRtDPhP_Df9YfEpYln6E5IopwqZVGInA=/kHR3oIf6_wHxL8n0OnXAAlJpoV43ejp07t9nKMn-7YY=?gpsid=39_132_20066&ms=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

I'm working with my colleagues in Congress to advance voting rights and shut down the wave of voter suppression efforts sweeping the country. I co-sponsored the For the People Act to defend voting rights, and I'm an original co-sponsor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to restore the original VRA to its full power.

It should be easy to vote, not difficult or intimidating. But some lawmakers would rather silence American voters than be held accountable to them.

**[We can stop this national attack on voting rights, but I need you to make your voice heard. Add your name now to stand with me in the fight to defend our right to vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1xNrmhQ5rYNRRtDPhP_Df9YfEpYln6E5IopwqZVGInA=/kHR3oIf6_wHxL8n0OnXAAlJpoV43ejp07t9nKMn-7YY=?gpsid=39_132_20066&ms=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/1xNrmhQ5rYNRRtDPhP_Df9YfEpYln6E5IopwqZVGInA=/Dn7_teUtO41EVjdsbYAAZuiciyoMaIxnUYk-zA3BUco=?gpsid=39_132_19945&refcode=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210806_vra_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)
---

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
---

Bass for Congress
918 Pennsylvania Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 United States

We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1xNrmhQ5rYNRRtDPhP_Df9YfEpYln6E5IopwqZVGInA=/VGNo1qHtriQ95t4rZEFHtYCawpE5hkK-r_SNIH2WM6M=).

subject: the facts about masks, Peter

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087604:JG0xTelNE:m:1:3253819041:74032ACA4084DDD36BE04B53BD3C4428:r) | |
---
Peter,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087604:JG0xTelNE:m:1:3253819041:74032ACA4084DDD36BE04B53BD3C4428:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087604:JG0xTelNE:m:1:3253819041:74032ACA4084DDD36BE04B53BD3C4428:r)
**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

They can try to silence me but Peter, I'm not backing down from this fight. Please, stand with me today to share the facts that Fauci and his allies don't want you to hear.
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087604:JG0xTelNE:m:1:3253819041:74032ACA4084DDD36BE04B53BD3C4428:r)

We must put an end to these fake "fact-checks" and get back to real science.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

---
**56 years ago today, President Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act of 1965 into law.**
The Voting Rights Act of 1965 marked a turning point in our history. It finally prohibited racial discrimination in our voting laws, lifting barriers to the ballot box for millions of Black Americans.
It had an immediate effect: by the end of 1965, a quarter of a million Black Americans had registered to vote.
**But for the past 56 years, conservatives have fought — and succeeded too many times — to roll back the protections guaranteed by the Voting Rights Act.**
Just this year, Republicans across the country have introduced and passed extreme voter suppression bills. Even worse, the conservative majority in the Supreme Court has declared open season on voting rights. Their latest ruling to uphold Arizona’s discriminatory voting laws has opened the door for even more extremist voter suppression legislation.
**Congress is our last line of defense. They have the power to pass federal legislation to protect our voting rights and uphold our democracy. They MUST pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and restore voter protections.**
**[Take a stand now — sign on and DEMAND Congress pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33624891/299455996/1756375258?source=em_UTC_FR_VotingRights_080621_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwOTY4ZDg0LWQ3ZjYtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iw6jSlbu74t3eQQYsfwFvLXHS7h2XGbFOLP2Ek8j1VA=&emci=ca78b77d-d7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a0968d84-d7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33624892/299455997/1756375258?source=em_UTC_FR_VotingRights_080621_button2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwOTY4ZDg0LWQ3ZjYtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iw6jSlbu74t3eQQYsfwFvLXHS7h2XGbFOLP2Ek8j1VA=&emci=ca78b77d-d7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a0968d84-d7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)**
Thanks for standing with us,
Unite the Country

clean_body: We need 500 supporters to sign on and stand with President Biden before MIDNIGHT → | | | 56 years ago today, President Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act of 1965 into law. The Voting Rights Act of 1965 marked a turning point in our history. It finally prohibited racial discrimination in our voting laws, lifting barriers to the ballot box for millions of Black Americans. It had an immediate effect: by the end of 1965, a quarter of a million Black Americans had registered to vote. But for the past 56 years, conservatives have fought — and succeeded too many times — to roll back the protections guaranteed by the Voting Rights Act. Just this year, Republicans across the country have introduced and passed extreme voter suppression bills. Even worse, the conservative majority in the Supreme Court has declared open season on voting rights. Their latest ruling to uphold Arizona’s discriminatory voting laws has opened the door for even more extremist voter suppression legislation. Congress is our last line of defense. They have the power to pass federal legislation to protect our voting rights and uphold our democracy. They MUST pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and restore voter protections. Thanks for standing with us, Unite the Country = = * Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment. Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. = Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
It’s August which means, like many Hoosiers, there’s a lot more activity at my house in the morning as my kids are starting to go back to school. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470762?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_All in for 2022_** It’s August which means, like many Hoosiers, there’s a lot more activity at my house in the morning as my kids are starting to go back to school. I’m grateful for all the work Governor Holcomb and our Republican supermajorities in the General Assembly have done to improve education throughout the state. We’re making record investments in our students and our teachers. We’re enhancing school safety. We’re investing in ways for continual learners to skill-up and pursue a career they’re passionate about no matter what stage of life they’re in. Indiana can do all these things because we’ve had conservative fiscal management for the last two decades. We’ve had leaders, like Governor Holcomb, Speaker Huston, Senator Bray, and many others, that have prioritized education while also balancing budgets and maintaining healthy reserves.

But, it wasn’t always like this. So, while we’re enjoying our final weeks of summer, there’s much work to be done to keep our Republican winning streak in Indiana going. It’s as important as ever for us to be “all in” on the 2022 midterm elections. We must re-elect our own Hoosier Marine Senator Todd Young and send our entire conservative House delegation back to Washington DC. Your Indiana Republican Party is doing the work now to build a solid foundation for the 2022 cycle. In fact, we’ll be at the Indiana State Fair every day, collecting signatures and sharing information about our great statewide officials. If you’re going to the fair, be sure to stop by our booth to sign the ballot access petition, chat with our great volunteers, and find out all the ways you can help us flip both houses of Congress in 2022.

Thanks,

Kyle

**_Photo: _**_Chairman Hupfer and his son visit the Indiana GOP booth at the 2019 Indiana State Fair_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|

| **_A Week of Events!_**
**Governor Holcomb** attended the Greenfield Area Chamber of Commerce fro their annual member luncheon on Tuesday. While there, **Governor Holcomb** had the opportunity to speak to and interact with group members.

**Governor Holcomb** spoke at the FDIC International event Wednesday morning. FDIC International is a convention for firefighters which takes in Indianapolis every year.
**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb with Hancock Regional Hospital CEO Steve Long at the luncheon and Gov. Holcomb speaking at FDIC International. _

|

| _**Holcomb-Crouch Inaugural Events**_
You are invited to join us for our Holcomb-Crouch inaugural events! Purchase tickets at [www.imagineindiana.org](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dd40dc3e3f&e=1acd9bb3d6).

| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[attends the opening of the State Fair](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4d36061b94&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[visits Goodwill Indy](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=df12116d04&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [brings her interns to tour the Governor's residence](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6690bdb914&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[announces refundable tax credits for Hoosiers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d457338ff&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[introduces $3 Thursdays for the State Fair](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a7adfc9800&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: It’s August which means, like many Hoosiers, there’s a lot more activity at my house in the morning as my kids are starting to go back to school. | | | | | | | | All in for 2022 It’s August which means, like many Hoosiers, there’s a lot more activity at my house in the morning as my kids are starting to go back to school. I’m grateful for all the work Governor Holcomb and our Republican supermajorities in the General Assembly have done to improve education throughout the state. We’re making record investments in our students and our teachers. We’re enhancing school safety. We’re investing in ways for continual learners to skill-up and pursue a career they’re passionate about no matter what stage of life they’re in. Indiana can do all these things because we’ve had conservative fiscal management for the last two decades. We’ve had leaders, like Governor Holcomb, Speaker Huston, Senator Bray, and many others, that have prioritized education while also balancing budgets and maintaining healthy reserves. But, it wasn’t always like this. So, while we’re enjoying our final weeks of summer, there’s much work to be done to keep our Republican winning streak in Indiana going. It’s as important as ever for us to be “all in” on the 2022 midterm elections. We must re-elect our own Hoosier Marine Senator Todd Young and send our entire conservative House delegation back to Washington DC. Your Indiana Republican Party is doing the work now to build a solid foundation for the 2022 cycle. In fact, we’ll be at the Indiana State Fair every day, collecting signatures and sharing information about our great statewide officials. If you’re going to the fair, be sure to stop by our booth to sign the ballot access petition, chat with our great volunteers, and find out all the ways you can help us flip both houses of Congress in 2022. Thanks, Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer and his son visit the Indiana GOP booth at the 2019 Indiana State Fair | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | A Week of Events! Governor Holcomb attended the Greenfield Area Chamber of Commerce fro their annual member luncheon on Tuesday. While there, Governor Holcomb had the opportunity to speak to and interact with group members. Governor Holcomb spoke at the FDIC International event Wednesday morning. name: Team DeSantis
subject: Governor DeSantis WILL NOT Stand Down
body:
He will ALWAYS stand up for the freedom of Floridians.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uROgT6DynlJGqHr9ceyG1zZ9lSycYPHeywdLqbQE2D6zTZxkwGvsSmVcpdcG99gPSdPD1X9J6iACxagqTgn1xeXFsTicH9LNYX_9ItptmPnvkPbFxYmEKXk3iHI-u8N46Y5ogfxg_JqpaBMZyt41Mg==&c=HxHt5XwA1EwZsu10KCxSLVScwLYC3TYm0k28HIf0d8DzdRg21LYgNA==&ch=3LqyT-ytrV5zKlMqoTeQIZ-aUc0-r6VwXTLklWil23pge7Bb822wxw==)
---
| Peter,
Joe Biden is ready to reinstitute mask mandates and impose more lockdowns. The same man who campaigned on shutting down the virus is now resorting to shutting down America.
And while Joe Biden is taking away the freedoms of law-abiding Americans, he is leaving our southern border wide open. There is a free-for-all of COVID-positive illegal immigration spilling into America by the hundreds of thousands.
To make matters worse, the federal government is sending thousands of COVID-positive illegal immigrants on busses and planes to cities and towns from coast to coast across America. They are not being forced to wear masks or quarantine, and they are certainly not being forced to show proof of vaccination to enter our country. Yet, Democrats now want law-abiding Americans to be forced to show their proof to engage in even the most basic, day-to-day activities.
Governor DeSantis isn't looking to a presidential administration devoid of leadership for guidance on how to handle COVID. Instead, he is going to continue following the science and making data-driven decisions.
In Florida, there will be no mask mandates. Kids will be in schools. Business will remain open and employees will keep their jobs. Florida will prioritize freedom and personal accountability over ineffective policies implemented for no other reason than for Joe Biden and his bureaucratic cronies to feel like they're doing something.
And with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris missing in action at our southern border, Governor DeSantis has stepped up and sent in Florida law enforcement to help deal with the border crisis that is contributing to the spread of COVID throughout the country.
Joe Biden might want Governor DeSantis to get out of the way so he can impose his radical agenda, but Governor DeSantis will not kowtow to authoritarian bullying from Joe Biden or anyone else. He will ALWAYS stand up for the freedom of Floridians.
Thank you for your continued support of our mission, Team DeSantis
---
