name: Texas Elections Update via, VoteForDonna.com
subject: Help us combat misinformation in Texas
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33627978/299466764/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxMmMwNy1kZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2xdgnZDhv3kwHDYVYfUCNtT77TlCVxJxCt2h3esjvo=)
Here's something we're monitoring closely, friend.

Governor Greg Abbott just announced a second special session with yet another batch of voter suppression bills on the agenda.

The proposed legislation bans 24-hour and drive-through voting, mandates voter assistants sign under penalty of perjury, and requires a matching social security and driver's license number between the registration form, application for mail-in-ballot, and the ballot itself.

The requirements for mail-in ballots present many avenues for honest mistakes -- especially for the elderly -- that by design, lead to potential legal action. There is absolutely no evidence of widespread voter fraud in Texas. In 2020, the Texas Attorney General's office spent 22,000 staff hours resolving 16 minor cases.

Now, the GOP is trying to cover their tracks with a misinformation campaign. The Republican National Committee is up on the airwaves in Texas with misleading ads claiming their voter restrictions make voting "easier."
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33627980/299466765/77586780?refcode=em-08062021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxMmMwNy1kZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2xdgnZDhv3kwHDYVYfUCNtT77TlCVxJxCt2h3esjvo=)
Their ads are riddled with statements that have already been fully debunked. For good measure, their spokesman is a former state rep. from Georgia (not even Texas).

Donna recently [debunked the entire ad campaign on Twitter,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33627981/299466766/-1466091064?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxMmMwNy1kZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2xdgnZDhv3kwHDYVYfUCNtT77TlCVxJxCt2h3esjvo=&emci=1ba78052-d8f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=19912c07-dff6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7168977) but it's not enough that we call out these lies, we need to fight back -- through on-the-ground organizing to increase awareness, federal and state legislation, and at the ballot box where it counts.

**[Will you chip in $3 to help us respond to this misinformation campaign? Everything we raise today will go right to work defeating voter suppression, turning out Democrats, and correcting these lies.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33627983/299466768/77586780?refcode=em-08062021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxMmMwNy1kZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2xdgnZDhv3kwHDYVYfUCNtT77TlCVxJxCt2h3esjvo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33627984/299466770/77586780?refcode=em-08062021-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxMmMwNy1kZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2xdgnZDhv3kwHDYVYfUCNtT77TlCVxJxCt2h3esjvo=)

---
| [Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33627993/299466778/77586780?refcode=em-08062021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTkxMmMwNy1kZmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2xdgnZDhv3kwHDYVYfUCNtT77TlCVxJxCt2h3esjvo=)
---

This is a make or break moment for Texas.

The truth is, we can't just count on organizing to defeat these bills. We need our congressional leaders to step up, and strengthen voting rights at the federal level.

But until that happens, we can't lose any ground. That means beating back these GOP campaigns whenever they arise.

clean_body: | = Here's something we're monitoring closely, friend. Governor Greg Abbott just announced a second special session with yet another batch of voter suppression bills on the agenda. The proposed legislation bans 24-hour and drive-through voting, mandates voter assistants sign under penalty of perjury, and requires a matching social security and driver's license number between the registration form, application for mail-in-ballot, and the ballot itself. The requirements for mail-in ballots present many avenues for honest mistakes -- especially for the elderly -- that by design, lead to potential legal action. There is absolutely no evidence of widespread voter fraud in Texas. In 2020, the Texas Attorney General's office spent 22,000 staff hours resolving 16 minor cases. Now, the GOP is trying to cover their tracks with a misinformation campaign. The Republican National Committee is up on the airwaves in Texas with misleading ads claiming their voter restrictions make voting "easier." = Their ads are riddled with statements that have already been fully debunked. For good measure, their spokesman is a former state rep. from Georgia (not even Texas). Donna recently but it's not enough that we call out these lies, we need to fight back -- through on-the-ground organizing to increase awareness, federal and state legislation, and at the ballot box where it counts. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is a make or break moment for Texas. The truth is, we can't just count on organizing to defeat these bills. We need our congressional leaders to step up, and strengthen voting rights at the federal level. But until that happens, we can't lose any ground. That means beating back these GOP campaigns whenever they arise. = Thanks, Team Donna HQ = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for Congress in Austin, Texas. name: John Fetterman
subject: This is an honest email about our newest competition in this race. I hope you'll read the whole thing, then chip in what you can →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Another new competitor jumped into this race just now, proving once again that this will be the *single most competitive* Senate race in the nation.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210806-2212-header&t=1&akid=2212%2E434096%2EkbkK4t)
Hey, Peter — it's John. I'm coming to you with a super candid note:
**Another new competitor jumped into this race just now,** proving once again that this will be the *single most competitive* Senate race in the nation in 2022.
I sincerely believe that, no matter who's entering this race on the Democratic side, they'd be a hell of a lot better senator for Pennsylvania than Pat Toomey ever was.
But as we witness the political stalemates happening in Washington, and the lack of conviction from some senators who are _< checks notes>_ supposed to be Democrats, I am reminded how high the stakes are as we fight to expand our razor-thin, 50-50 majority.
**Peter, I'm running for U.S. Senate precisely because it'd be the honor of my lifetime to vote for bold, once-in-a-lifetime legislation that would tangibly improve the lives of millions of workers and their families.** To serve you as that 51st vote. And to fight relentlessly for the things I've *always* believed in, like defending the sacred right to vote, at least a $15 minimum wage, and legal weed.
Pennsylvania's next senator must act with conviction. They must vote like a Democrat. We have the majority, we have the presidency, we have the House, we have the Senate – so let's act like it and finally deliver the Biden agenda to the American people. We simply don't have time to play partisan games while the future of our democracy is on the line.
[**Peter, I have to respectfully ask: Will you donate your first $5 to our people-powered campaign today? If you give me your vote now, then you'll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back when I'm in Washington.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26908?refcode=em20210806-2212&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2212%2E434096%2EkbkK4t)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26908?refcode=em20210806-2212&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2212%2E434096%2EkbkK4t)**
Thank you for being a part of this historic campaign. Every day since we launched this campaign has been humbling, and I can't thank yinz enough.
Yours,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. Together, this incredible grassroots team is already on a historic pace to build a massive campaign for all 67 counties in Pennsylvania — _one that has what it takes to win the primary AND the general election._ I couldn't be more moved each time someone chips in, whether it's $100 or just a couple bucks. [**Would you contribute your first-ever $5 today if you're with me in this fight for all Pennsylvanians?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26908?refcode=em20210806-2212&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2212%2E434096%2EkbkK4t)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210806-2212-footer&t=23&refcode2=2212_434096_kbkK4t&akid=2212%2E434096%2EkbkK4t)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2212%2E434096%2EkbkK4t)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2212%2E434096%2EkbkK4t)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Statewide Transit for Maryland
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
To ensure that our state’s economy can continue to thrive in the 21st century, we need to make critical investments in high-quality public transportation. That’s why as your next Governor, I’m going to build a world-class, integrated and statewide transit system that connects all corners of the state.
As part of my plan, I’m going to bring the Baltimore and the Washington region closer together through upgrades to the MARC commuter train, as well as supporting more transit-oriented development and connections at key commuter hubs.
Better connections between our state’s two largest economic centers will lead to economic growth. But we also need to invest in mass transit options in other areas of the state that do not currently have high quality public transportation. That’s why I’m going to explore new transit options for Frederick, Western Maryland, Southern Maryland, and the Eastern Shore to ensure that ALL of our communities have access to the public infrastructure that they deserve.
In 2022, we have the opportunity to redefine the possibility of state government, and lift our communities into the quality of life they deserve. I’m incredibly excited about revolutionizing Maryland’s public transportation infrastructure to bring our communities together and kickstart our economy, and I want to know if you’re on board. Will you sign my petition if you agree that Maryland needs a statewide transit system? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CDdjGWLPeU-vQglM9hz_oA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em080421]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fc56584f-99f0-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/93875623-e0f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzg3NTYyMy1lMGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfTLlLqkZZxYNgNWqkEH52yJZhmWjTRs39sjuoKT3OU=&id=136194660 .

I’m incredibly excited about revolutionizing Maryland’s public transportation infrastructure to bring our communities together and kickstart our economy, and I want to know if you’re on board. Will you sign my petition if you agree that Maryland needs a statewide transit system? Fellow American, what you do today determines what life is like for our future generations – will they grow up in a socialist nation, plagued by violent crime and tyranny?

Or will they know America as the most free and prosperous country in the world?

In order to preserve the American dream and ensure a bright future though, we need to take action. _And we need to take action today._

I can’t sit back and watch Nancy Pelosi line her own pockets, while the people she claims to advocate for are suffering. It’s un-American.

I can’t sit back and watch Democrats fool people into believing in socialism. It goes against our founding principles.

I can no longer sit idle. Which is why I’m asking you today, to send in the Marine.

It has never been my desire to be a politician. I am a father, husband, and Marine veteran. I already served my country, but I’m ready to do it again.

clean_body: I wanted to check in to see if this was still a priority of yours? | Fellow American, Nancy Pelosi has abused her power time and time again and continues to act like a tyrant. Congress is the people’s house, not Nancy Pelosi’s house. That’s why I wanted to check in to see if booting Pelosi as Speaker was still a priority of yours. | | | ---|---|--- Fellow American, what you do today determines what life is like for our future generations – will they grow up in a socialist nation, plagued by violent crime and tyranny? Or will they know America as the most free and prosperous country in the world? In order to preserve the American dream and ensure a bright future though, we need to take action. And we need to take action today. I can’t sit back and watch Nancy Pelosi line her own pockets, while the people she claims to advocate for are suffering. It’s un-American. I can’t sit back and watch Democrats fool people into believing in socialism. It goes against our founding principles. I can no longer sit idle. Which is why I’m asking you today, to send in the Marine. It has never been my desire to be a politician. I am a father, husband, and Marine veteran. I already served my country, but I’m ready to do it again. I’m ready to serve, because I’m tired of our country being torn apart by the radical Left. | | ---|---|--- Thank you for being a catalyst for change and protecting our conservative values. In Service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine Veteran. | | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

clean_body: [Message Enclosed] | Peter, We’ve just received reports that the Democrats have landed their TOP RECRUIT in the Battleground State of Pennsylvania. This is a major blow to Republicans’ chances at winning back the Senate Majority, and we need to act quickly if we’re going to get back on track. | | Republicans are just ONE SEAT AWAY from winning back the Senate, but if Democrats win in either Pennsylvania or North Carolina our chances are effectively doomed. That’s why it’s absolutely critical that we invest now in the effective online ads and field programs that it will take to Keep North Carolina in Republican hands. | | | | | Thank you. 2022 Senate Alerts** Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

body:
Florida's Senate race could decide Senate control and be the most expensive ever. | | | Friend, Val Demings is falling dangerously short of her fundraising goal as of right now, and she's reaching out with an urgent request: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33629972/299473660/298981188?refcode=20210806_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTY5NThkZi1lMmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQM7k0Mz5dinSQpwY1MsQAOsp0KXdUNTFFZq-4nLzZs=) Falling short of this goal would jeopardize Rep. name: John McGuigan
subject: Ends and Beginnings
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33630424/299475013/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U0YzY3NS1lNGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxoWlbMz68pMsCdh10sdFSika8UV_v55QrB7pwb9WLY=&emci=7ec450fe-36f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3ce4c675-e4f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)
---

| | Peter – From Day One, I promised you that I would never shy away from giving you the straight truth. **So, I want you to be the first to know that today, I'm ending my campaign for US Senate.** We always knew this would be a tough fight; we were up against powerful forces: Super PACs and lobbyists, industrial polluters and science-deniers, billionaires and system-riggers – not to mention entrenched political parties – all working their hardest to defend the status quo. Our message resonated with working families, but unfortunately, that wasn’t enough to attract the attention or dollars that we needed to scale up. Ultimately, the crowded field, first viewed as a positive for us, splintered the media coverage and sources of funds too thin for this outsider. But even facing near-impossible odds, we made impressive progress: In under six months, we built our movement from a few dozen friends into _thousands of working people_ committed to change; We expanded the political debate to include overlooked issues like Period Poverty; We let our elected officials know that Pennsylvanians know there's no such thing as good fracking, and made clear our demand for an immediate end to all fracking; And we put the establishment on notice that working families are holding them accountable, taking back our democracy, and fighting for leaders who'll solve problems. _In other words, we've built a movement. One that matters._ To all the people who joined our movement, greeted me so warmly across our commonwealth, and who contributed, thank you. I am humbled and honored. I hope I respected your trust in me. The end of the campaign isn't the end of our work, Peter. Obviously, it isn't the news I'd hoped to share, but we have never let setbacks stop us, and we're not about to start now. I'll be in touch about where we go from here, but in the meantime, take a moment to appreciate what we created and what we accomplished together. **As always, I am honored to stand at your side,** _John_ |
---|---|---

| | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
---|---

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: RE: If there's one race to support, let it be NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, You've seen this before, but it can't be stressed enough: **Senate control HINGES on Maggie's seat, and Republicans everywhere are counting on flipping it.** Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and Mitch McConnell are just some of the top Republicans focusing on this race. And McConnell's dark money super PAC is already spending millions on attack ads against Maggie. That's why we set an emergency fundraising goal of $25,000, but right now we're not on track to reach it. **[Can Maggie count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help protect the Senate? name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Are you with me in the fight to protect our democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Today marks the 56th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act, landmark legislation that my friend, the late Congressman John Lewis, fought and bled for. The Voting Rights Act expanded access to the ballot box, prohibiting racial discrimination in voting. Its positive impact was felt almost immediately with high voter turnout in Black communities across the country.

As we commemorate the anniversary of this historic law, it's more important than ever that we commit to protecting the right to vote. The truth is the right to vote is under attack like never before, and these attacks disproportionately harm Black voters, other voters of color, students, and seniors.

In 2021 alone, more than 385 new laws have been proposed in 48 states to limit mail-in voting, early in-person voting, and Election Day voting. **Twenty-two of these voter suppression bills have already become law. Congress must act before any more are enacted.**

Let's be clear: if our government isn't working for the people, then it's not really working at all. Disenfranchising voters undermines the principles of our republic -- and is not how we ensure we're delivering results for hard-working Americans.

**That 's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to get Congress back to work for the people. Already, I've proudly co-sponsored the For the People Act to defend our democracy and the right to vote -- and it includes two of my original bills. And I'm working in Congress to bring the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to a vote.**

**[I need to know if you're with me in this fight for democracy reform, Peter. Will you let me know by adding your name today? Commit to creating a government that works for all Americans »](https://act.myngp.com/el/BF62dZwMH4OeQmU3fhT2cYpleCXTxL3TSnF62Vgo6do=/gKvmQWCd6PtuQEs9fSN-aeeYzlzNuisMh_vsZOYyTwQ=)**

Thank you. It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/BF62dZwMH4OeQmU3fhT2cYpleCXTxL3TSnF62Vgo6do=/gwzwvZrhJx3x4Qx1XayzVT4INzr3AMbjBLAyiEd0QjA=?gpsid=50_115_20073&refcode=em21_210806_VRA_adv_gq_act_box_DK_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210806_VRA_adv_gq_act_box_DK_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BF62dZwMH4OeQmU3fhT2cYpleCXTxL3TSnF62Vgo6do=/EamowIphbgSAIrvie8w4Q01kgxj2WP74S_w3xfTq1UI=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/BF62dZwMH4OeQmU3fhT2cYpleCXTxL3TSnF62Vgo6do=/yPO414hX_M39hK0r98mwHbC5cVWmhM-PYSjt9Ve2eoM=)

name: Mike Collier
subject: LBJ was right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hello there — Nearly 56 years ago, President Lyndon B. Johnson, a Texan, stood before Congress and the nation, proclaiming, _"It is wrong — deadly wrong — to deny any of your fellow Americans the right to vote in this country."_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33631364/299477894/-1794748404?refcode=mc-em210806-VRAanniversary-B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFhOTYxNy1lOGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rTzK2RgQGt2yi3fr5pC6IL2d0xgViHOS3RSFJVqwN0=) **LBJ was right then, and he is right now.** A few months after his address, on this very day, President Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law alongside Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and other civil rights leaders. The landmark legislation was the first to protect the right to vote for millions of Black and Brown Americans across the country. Folks, the most expansive voting rights law since the Civil War was passed and championed by a Texan. THAT is the legacy we must uphold. **But we’re not finished yet.** All across the nation, lawmakers like Dan Patrick are trying to deny thousands of Texans their inalienable right to vote so that they can avoid accountability for their years of failures. Today and every day, we must renew our commitment to strengthening voter rights for all and continue the fight for the next generation. **The right to vote is sacred, and we must fight to keep it that way. Will you kindly contribute $5 or any amount to help bring leadership that will protect voting rights for all Texans?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33631365/299477895/-1794748404?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=mc-em210806-VRAanniversary-B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFhOTYxNy1lOGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rTzK2RgQGt2yi3fr5pC6IL2d0xgViHOS3RSFJVqwN0=)

clean_body: | Hello there — Nearly 56 years ago, President Lyndon B. Johnson, a Texan, stood before Congress and the nation, proclaiming, "It is wrong — deadly wrong — to deny any of your fellow Americans the right to vote in this country." = LBJ was right then, and he is right now. A few months after his address, on this very day, President Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law alongside Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and other civil rights leaders. The landmark legislation was the first to protect the right to vote for millions of Black and Brown Americans across the country. Folks, the most expansive voting rights law since the Civil War was passed and championed by a Texan. THAT is the legacy we must uphold. But we’re not finished yet. All across the nation, lawmakers like Dan Patrick are trying to deny thousands of Texans their inalienable right to vote so that they can avoid accountability for their years of failures. Today and every day, we must renew our commitment to strengthening voter rights for all and continue the fight for the next generation. The right to vote is sacred, and we must fight to keep it that way. Will you kindly contribute $5 or any amount to help bring leadership that will protect voting rights for all Texans? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = As President Johnson counseled in Austin just days before his death: “And if our efforts continue, and if our will is strong, and if our hearts are right, and if courage remains our constant companion, then, my fellow Americans, I am confident we shall overcome.”_ — Mike The Collier Committee P.O. name: Mike Gallagher
subject: there’s no Green New Deal without slave labor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |

If it passes, the Green New Deal won’t be powered by solar panels and wind turbines... The Green New Deal was a horrible idea from the start and I’m determined to make sure it never passes. Not only is it bad policy, it's blatantly hypocritical. According to a recent _[WSJ report](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=e0efb9a1304345dc92e65e726651f7fe&_e=bZvhcEetQF4WpIDepNtDhAWz7ub_kMq62MFemFdAKH4bAs20_2TncwqrLgHH_gdoyy3siMfELw4Te7f8AgIp4ysW97Po5T8SUdWH4OwX0rSWFETldCelLPiBShRITs2DRVhZEr2rUcJG8Iytd6_Whwd5OLrc3LcYo4pTvjKq44zcgx-kx0BcoW8FTdAWE2R69zq5UB0S_HV1pKIElpdB52RnReGNVTDRm43bij-yltcYdr4maj_92fDCkJIcDukBy5KzVjwTagabNFw5Ss3VZdd7enEQGJDISn_u7Iili-mHck0OgBfgtIZp2-De4rNHUxopxoRWmA-eAtDUbsFChKO2NAvwDR61A3Lwl5hCNOIEYLV5PwmrOjRDe1D2vgDlzIb5vlOLGDkXjZysnJaF3-E2c3mxzQO2VZFDZfHjPH3JWjBTrpsLasQOKoHYAATf2IIry2Ch1DJ1YWqmUvoNhadCb-h1781gCuVVb4LhcqI%3D):_ _"Installing a high-carbon, **Chinese-made solar panel** might not reduce emissions at all ... The solar industry’s **reliance on Chinese coal** will create a big increase in emissions ... That would make the solar industry one of the world’s most prolific polluters."_ That's why I need your help to send a loud and clear message to the radical Left that we won’t be complicit in China’s grotesque human rights abuses. _Not now. _ _Not ever._ [**Sign the petition: give the red light to the Green New Deal >>>**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=e0efb9a1304345dc92e65e726651f7fe&_e=bZvhcEetQF4WpIDepNtDhJo2nLEhSq0nqPciSV4PhnPxGAt_ktcyb_K0V7eGrfSt2qQ9B4KAuWp8EKBRR-hRlh4Xq2COk3ydNzjfbZmTS3GSUvRyIV0u0iP7rrbxbLyJxDNZ0dScMQZqpdAvGqXEb8nW232aSqqK19cnzOYGgV6gvyDfRoIC3M2uaJKF6bxc1L9XRy04cLD6bWJ1f0Gg0BNgyokEfQDpAMdExy2sHC9PbR2O12MzChTeptHMozJLk1GJXFz4K9mPjMV-8z14jjMEXll1ExegNe2KkGX0VCuxoAK0i--7PijrLzIkFUVdFMSCRKhthPr9txWa47arfhJbYoP0bDD95xUlOiRjM7WxCLo7ZTxaO1Qja21-XBaMgIN8iQCQh0AHs9oCCcEK9lQzIA4Yrqadx0saU7YIzFWtEW72zNuFn5VOVCKi4Piz) Thank you, Mike Gallagher

name: Alex Padilla
subject: ICYMI: Update on the Republican Recall
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
As you may know, we’re going through a Republican recall attempt in California — one that is led by a collection of anti-mask, anti-vaxx, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump devotees.
And what we know as of now is that it could be a very close race. Ballots drop in two weeks, so there’s still a lot of work to do and not a lot of time.
These Republicans pose a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and across the country. They’d love to defeat us and end our ability to fight for a cleaner planet, comprehensive immigration reform, or election security.
So I need your help today. Because you can bet the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding the recall are going to set their sights on our campaign as well.
I plan on doing everything I can to hold this seat, but any amount of help you can give today would go a long way. And that’s why I have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots campaign today? We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation we receive in August sends a powerful message that we will not back down without a fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-aug21?source=em210806-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=220_159979_pBlafw&akid=220%2E159979%2EpBlafw)**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They want to destroy my life, Peter

body:
But I will never stop fighting.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)
---
Peter,
---
The Deep State is trying to destroy my life -- all because I represented President Trump against the false and despicable charges levied against him.
---
_But I want you to know something ... I have ZERO regrets._
---
**Even after the FBI raided my home and the DOJ spied on me, I would do it all over again, because President Trump is an innocent man whose constitutional rights were attacked.**
---
_But while I continue to fight for truth, freedom, and justice in America -- I 'm _personally_ asking YOU to help fight for my _**own**_ freedom, which is now in danger._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087996:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)
---
**It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.
---
**[DEFEND RUDY - CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)**
---
There's one point I want to make clear.
---
While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58087991:JYMJLelTN:m:1:3253819041:D1664F6BBF8E759707D30C42C8CBE659:r)
---
Rudy Giuliani

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica=20Cisneros?=
subject: Humbly asking for your endorsement (please sign)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
#
Yesterday we made it official. I'm running again to represent Texas' 28th District in Congress. The response so far is overwhelming -- seeing everyone raise their hands to volunteer and donate has me filled with gratitude for this movement.
Thank you.
I'm emailing right now because we're starting to ask for our very first official campaign endorsements, and I wanted to humbly request yours.
_[**Will you sign your name to say you endorse our campaign for U.S. Congress? Your endorsement right during our launch would say a lot about the strength and size of the grassroots movement we 're building to win in TX-28.**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=eba7aa2ea4&e=ed416558ef)_
[Add your name »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=87eb20e511&e=ed416558ef)
The truth is that our opponent will very likely have a lot of powerful backers behind him. Last cycle he had significant support from the Koch donor network, Big Oil companies, the largest private prison network Geo Group, the Club for Growth (a Trump-aligned PAC), and big corporate PACs.
You and I both know the only way someone like me can win a race like this is if we completely outnumber all those rich and powerful people with tens of thousands of grassroots supporters fighting for a progressive agenda.
Last year, in spite of all the obstacles, we came just a couple thousand votes short of a huge upset. This time around, we're going to win. But only if I can earn your support and the support of tens of thousands of grassroots activists like you.
_[**Please add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign for Congress. We need to build as big of an endorsement list as possible in the first 48 hours of this campaign.**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=395632f32c&e=ed416558ef)_
[Add your name »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=e9d0dadae7&e=ed416558ef)
Thank you for adding your name today. It means so much.
Jessica Cisneros
[Donate »](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=3559d1966a&e=ed416558ef)
---
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=f3beec31c4). Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.
clean_body: Yesterday we made it official. I'm running again to represent Texas' 28th District in Congress. The response so far is overwhelming -- seeing everyone raise their hands to volunteer and donate has me filled with gratitude for this movement. Thank you. I'm emailing right now because we're starting to ask for our very first official campaign endorsements, and I wanted to humbly request yours. The truth is that our opponent will very likely have a lot of powerful backers behind him. Last cycle he had significant support from the Koch donor network, Big Oil companies, the largest private prison network Geo Group, the Club for Growth (a Trump-aligned PAC), and big corporate PACs. You and I both know the only way someone like me can win a race like this is if we completely outnumber all those rich and powerful people with tens of thousands of grassroots supporters fighting for a progressive agenda. Last year, in spite of all the obstacles, we came just a couple thousand votes short of a huge upset. This time around, we're going to win. But only if I can earn your support and the support of tens of thousands of grassroots activists like you. Thank you for adding your name today. It means so much. Jessica Cisneros Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress

| Peter,

Abigail's husband, Adam, wrote to you earlier this week to ask if you'd sign a birthday card for Abigail. [_**If you haven 't already, will you sign the card now? Her birthday is tomorrow and I know she'd love to receive a message from you!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFmhWP46SLAp87jx8UgK_hak3O-CNzG2Coz0d8qwdX0=/7Q6VS5-V1t2x63DnvyvGNzteG-MB4NH2MSSVx8p6Nx0=)

But beyond the card, I know another way to make Abigail's big day special. [_**Her birthday is on August 7th -- so I'd appreciate it if you contributed $7 to support Abigail's re-election campaign!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/gFmhWP46SLAp87jx8UgK_hak3O-CNzG2Coz0d8qwdX0=/CiInX2MEyZmqvSm2Beq56LGUL48_FAlpwiLlLlARGzU=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210806-1-EM&amount=7)

The experience has shown me how important it is to have moms like Abigail in Congress to advocate for us. She is devoted to making sure our communities are invested in and cared for, and she reminds us that even when it seems hard, progress is always worth the work.

Abigail is the type of person who always puts others before herself, so on her birthday, I hope you'll join me in making the day special for her by showing your appreciation with a contribution.

Friendーdid you know we’re currently on Day 500...something of ‘15 Days to Slow the Spread?

We have working vaccines, and people are getting back to normal life, but the American economy is still struggling to recover.

Why?

_**Because Biden and Pelosi are still encouraging and paying healthy, able-bodied Americans to stay home.**_

Is that the right moveーDarin LaHood wants to get your take on the situation. _[**Friend, do you think it’s time for America to get back to work?**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=941d46d4e2804b5597c86732d9d5ec19&_e=cdeQQ2KMYAyT0rRF_bvi262C5K5XL3QXV50oDQmoJMpSpURqEyoD1GVoc8b_kN2C-QdUQ0s2-rgFrSUh62oONQBGiavw2Xs7tWbbWzC9b7pvkvEF81hRrHCkB4jVqPWKL1_cXVD6lV6woJZMTW97J5ESIgUf8SxdkRXGHCTBpNbi8C6QrXrnFsQVf6H4jDcM0P29PE21MqPtnJADpQwKtQYFX_PJFLBNaJF4CVxvZlSyu01S94YLctV4zuTFe33N5Zo3aRlaBrvkLtT_36OjVtSkcfnxaGxhoXdRjtJvxMxrq5wOUvmNGK0mZ0Qnb44RnejrzvC_nD7NZtKKe50g25BnUTo_CWpMP-PBECbquIovY9MAEUBvR5MSA08x5YGVZ6lOZCCR64mvAPNrVS9XVfMVnQgjHPIxb2rk4mBeEvzphE3QQDdofYGkkKbr_9PJZ3553kH2J8KKh8YNPfiqh4Pr5ZNwX5fPFhO4nmnbJXQ%3D)_

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Why I stood up to the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Earlier this week, I joined other progressive members of the House outside the Capitol in protest of the expiration of the national eviction moratorium.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33634148/299487809/-376196102?refcode2=e574f40b-f0f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210806-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTc0ZjQwYi1mMGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npjLCQwXwyYmjQFznVWII_IifX2VoRQboMNT5EIJq10=)
As many as 11 million Americans were at risk of becoming homeless due to a lack of political courage — in the midst of a deadly pandemic and the Delta variant surging.
**I’m so proud to share that, in the face of public pressure from my colleagues and myself, President Biden extended the eviction moratorium for 60 days.**
President Biden had incorrectly insisted that unilaterally extending the eviction moratorium would be unconstitutional. Meanwhile, most of Congress had gone home on recess. But my progressive colleagues and I refused to take no for an answer.
This is personal to me. I, like millions of Americans, have experienced housing insecurity in my lifetime. Many policymakers don’t know what that’s like — and if they did, they never would have let the eviction moratorium expire in the first place.
Once again, I’d like to commend President Biden on his choice to reinstate the eviction moratorium — but I remain committed to challenging the White House when it must go further to act in the best interests of working Americans, just as I do House Republicans.
Standing up to both the House GOP and members of my own party — including the President — to extend the eviction moratorium wasn’t easy, but it was the right thing to do.
[**I’m in Congress to challenge the status quo and support the most vulnerable Americans — so if you’d like to support me in that fight, please click here to make a contribution to my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33634149/299487820/-376196102?refcode2=e574f40b-f0f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210806-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTc0ZjQwYi1mMGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=npjLCQwXwyYmjQFznVWII_IifX2VoRQboMNT5EIJq10=)
Thank you for reading,
Mondaire

name: Giffords.org
subject: re: the NSSF
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
Last month, we alerted you to a serious situation we have on our hands. And we wanted to give you a little update on that situation, but first, let’s recap.
The NSSF, or the National Shooting Sports Foundation, has been gaining influence lately and is actually outspending the NRA right now. They’ve been running TV spots in Maine and West Virginia to a total of $1 million to try and stop us from confirming David Chipman as the next ATF Director.
So as the NRA retreats into the shadows, the “new NRA”, the NSSF is stepping up to take their place and we have to be ready to go head-to-head with a new opponent.
That’s why today, we’re doing something ambitious and absolutely necessary. We’re setting a goal of raising $10,000 by midnight to help us counter the flood of outside spending being placed by the NSSF.
[**So what do you say, friend? Will you chip in $3 today to help us go head-to-head with the NSSF? We are so close to enacting change — real change — for our communities and we can’t afford to lose that opportunity now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210806-1-15&t=1&refcode2=454_3935704_efmDt9&akid=454%2E3935704%2EefmDt9)

Both the NRA and the NSSF will go to extreme lengths to prevent us from making real change.
But we've gone toe-to-toe with groups like this before — the simple fact that the NRA is a shell of what it once was is a huge testament to the strength of our movement.
And we know that if all of us fight back, we will defeat them and end their influence over Washington for good.
Thank you so much for supporting the work we’re doing,
Team Giffords

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Cancel student loans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
President Biden can and must cancel student loan debt for millions of borrowers.
#
Peter,
The current student loan moratorium that was put in place during the pandemic ends on September 30. At that point, millions of people across the country would be forced to restart making payments that they simply can’t afford.
Together, we successfully pushed President Biden and his administration to renew the lapsed eviction moratorium – keeping millions of people in their homes. Now, we need to urgently mobilize once again to prevent the student loan freeze from expiring too. Failing to do so means millions of borrowers will be forced to decide between putting food on the table and making a loan payment.
**But I believe that we must do even more. President Biden has the power to cancel student loan debt — and he must do so NOW.[If you agree, chip in $3 to fuel our work to cancel student debt and secure economic justice for every person in America.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210806?refcode=em20210806-522&t=20&refcode2=522_420207_LbIWuA&akid=522%2E420207%2ELbIWuA)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210806?refcode=em20210806-522&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=522_420207_LbIWuA&akid=522%2E420207%2ELbIWuA)**
This country was already experiencing historic economic inequality long before the COVID-19 crisis. One in four student debt borrowers were behind on payments even before the pandemic started.
Democrats now control the House, the Senate, and the White House. In order for us to lift people up during this crisis — and into the future — we need to use that power to deliver on a transformative economic agenda. One key component of that agenda is forgiving student debt.
Canceling student debt is an issue of economic justice. Women hold two-thirds of student debt, and Black borrowers owe $25,000 more on average than white borrowers. That’s one important reason why I’m advocating for student debt cancellation AND my College for All Act with Bernie Sanders.
**[I need your help to make student debt cancellation and economic justice a reality. Make your voice heard on this urgent issue by contributing to our campaign today and fuel our work to lift people up across this country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210806?refcode=em20210806-522&t=22&refcode2=522_420207_LbIWuA&akid=522%2E420207%2ELbIWuA)**
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210806?refcode=em20210806-522&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=522_420207_LbIWuA&akid=522%2E420207%2ELbIWuA)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210806-522-footer&t=24&refcode2=522_420207_LbIWuA&akid=522%2E420207%2ELbIWuA)**

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: You know me, Peter. I’m not one to mince words.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
You don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to FUNDAMENTALLY change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58088371:JDxeAelmN:m:1:3253819041:0348A8D98CD53F9044E935AFCD53B12F:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58088372:JDxeAelmN:m:1:3253819041:0348A8D98CD53F9044E935AFCD53B12F:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
Ron DeSantis

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: 56 years ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
On this day 56 years ago, President Lyndon Baines Johnson signed the 1965
Voting Rights Act into law, expanding the right to vote to tens of
millions of disenfranchised Americans and setting our country on a path
toward establishing its first true multiracial democracy.

That momentous win for democracy and voting rights happened because people
protested, sacrificed, and put their lives on the line to engage the
conscience of the nation, and because President Johnson was willing to use
the full force of his office to pass federal voting rights legislation.

Today, as we face a weakened Voting Rights Act, and as state legislatures
across the country erect new barriers to the ballot box, it’s going to
take another historic movement and strong leadership from President Biden
to pass new federal voting rights legislation and save our democracy
before it’s too late.

I have shared below an op-ed I authored for CNN that expresses my hope
that President Biden will rise to the occasion to pass the For the People
Act — and why I believe Texas will be central to the fight to save our
democracy.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46617?t=1001&akid=148151%2E444211%2Enl3q2d ]You can also find the op-ed here.

I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read it,

Beto

***

There have been three critical moments where Texas has proved decisive for
democracy and voting rights in this country. The first two, in 1890 and
1965, afford us key insights into how we can make the most of the third
one — taking place right now.

After Reconstruction, states throughout the South were rife with White
supremacist terrorism, racial injustice and attacks on Black voting rights
— and by the late 19th century, Texas was among the most brutal.
Whites-only Democratic clubs and their armed militias had "purified" the
ballot box in one Texas county after another. Political violence,
assassinations and lynchings enforced White rule throughout much of the
state at the expense of Black lives and Black voting rights.

In the Washington County election of 1886, for example, ballot boxes in
Black precincts were stolen at gunpoint by agents of a Whites-only
political ring known as the "People's Party." When Black poll workers
dared to fight back at one of the precincts, they were arrested, and three
of them — Shad Felder, Alfred Jones and Stewart Jones — were lynched by a
mob. No one was ever brought to justice.

The national outrage this produced compelled Congress to hold hearings on
the troubled voting practices that plagued Texas and much of the South.
The resulting Federal Elections Bill of 1890 promised greater federal
intervention to protect the right to vote in any state where it was
threatened.

Like the Democratic Party today, the Republican Party of 1890 had recently
won majorities in the US House and Senate, and, with the election of
Benjamin Harrison in 1888, controlled the presidency, too. And like
today's Democratic Party, those Republicans publicly resolved to use that
power to secure voting rights, especially for the Black targets of voter
suppression efforts in the South. The Federal Elections Bill duly passed
the House of Representatives that year and debate on its passage soon
began in the Senate.

But unfortunately for that bill and for millions of Black Americans, the
Senate Republicans were unable — or perhaps unwilling — to overcome a
filibuster threat led by the Democrats. It didn't help that Harrison, who
had campaigned on a platform of restoring voting rights, remained on the
sidelines for much of the action.

So, after all the righteous indignation over the election outrage in Texas
had been spent, the majority party meekly gave up the fight for voting
rights. They blinked in the face of the filibuster and denied America the
chance to establish a true multiracial democracy.

In the aftermath, state legislatures throughout the former Confederacy
imposed Whites-only primary laws and additional forms of Jim Crow voter
suppression, including poll taxes, literacy tests and extraordinary
residency requirements (all of which Whites could bypass thanks to the
"grandfather clause" that exempted those whose grandfathers had been
registered voters).

It took 75 years, a relentless voting rights movement and the first
president from Texas to provide another opportunity to reestablish the
right to vote in the South. Soon after Congress passed the Civil Rights
Act of 1964, civil rights leaders like Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. pressed
President Lyndon B. Johnson to work on an accompanying voting rights bill.
After Johnson told activists that he just didn't have the power to move
Congress, King resolved to "get the President some power."

Over the following months, civil and voting rights leaders brought the
issue to the forefront of the national conversation. Through protests and
marches, direct action and extraordinary courage, they successfully
engaged the conscience of the country. And when John Lewis was beaten
within an inch of his life leading a march from Selma to Montgomery on
March 7, 1965, Johnson finally had the power he needed.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46617?t=1002&akid=148151%2E444211%2Enl3q2d ]Selma to Montgomery march

Just eight days after Bloody Sunday, the President convened a joint
session of Congress and told the assembled members that no other issue was
as important as securing the country's democracy. "Should we defeat every
enemy, should we double our wealth and conquer the stars, and still be
unequal to this issue," he said, "then we will have failed as a people and
as a nation."

As far as Johnson was concerned, no short-term political interest would
compromise the intensity of this fight for the most important of American
rights. By using the full power of the presidency, he helped move Congress
to pass the Voting Rights Act on August 5, 1965 and signed it into law the
next day.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46617?t=1003&akid=148151%2E444211%2Enl3q2d ]Signing of the Voting Rights Act

As long as the law stood, states would be forced to tear down barriers to
the ballot box and guarantee equal voting access to every eligible
American.

But it turned out that the law could not stand forever.

When the US Supreme Court stripped critical protections from the Voting
Rights Act in its 2013 Shelby County v. Holder decision, Southern
legislatures responded in much the same way that they did following the
end of Reconstruction and the defeat of the Elections Bill of 1890: they
moved to dramatically restrict the ability to vote. This time, voter
suppression would come in the form of new voter ID laws, polling place
closures and racially gerrymandered districts designed to reduce the
voting power of Black and minority voters, the poor, the very young and
the very old.

This anti-democratic movement aggressively metastasized following former
President Donald Trump's Big Lie about widespread election fraud in the
2020 election. In just the first six months of this year, more than a
dozen states enacted new laws to make it easier to restrict access to the
ballot box.

In Texas, the Republican-led legislature's voter suppression bill was bad
enough for Democratic lawmakers to leave the state for Washington, D.C. in
an effort to block its passage and plead for federal action in the form of
the For the People Act.

Much like the Federal Elections Bill of 1890, the For the People Act's
provisions are commensurate with the scope of the current threat to
American democracy. The bill would ensure equal access to early voting and
mail-in voting, establish automatic voter registration, make election day
a national holiday and end gerrymandering (redistricting used to "draw"
people of color out of voting power in states like Texas). In March, the
House passed the For the People Act on a party-line vote, just like with
the 1890 elections bill.

But the For the People Act has been stopped by the threat of a filibuster
in the Senate, in a manner quite similar to the 1890 elections bill.
Though Democrats have the power to overcome this procedural vestige of
segregation, they have been paralyzed by intra-party disagreements and an
unwillingness to take seriously the challenges faced by Black and brown
voters. Their inaction risks dooming the bill to failure.

That defeat doesn't have to be America's fate.

Just as civil rights leaders and everyday Americans successfully pushed
Johnson to use the power of his office to pass voting rights, we can do
the same to push President Joe Biden to make voting rights his number one
priority — and to place all of his political capital into urging the
Senate to carve out an exception to the filibuster. (Exceptions already
exist for federal judges, Supreme Court justices, budget deals and
fast-track trade agreements.)

Those Texas Democratic legislators who took the fight to the nation's
capital are pushing the President to do just that. Their quorum break,
which will end on August 6, exactly 56 years after the signing of the
Voting Rights Act of 1965, has bought us some time to save free and fair
elections before it's too late.

The question is, what will the President do with it?

Biden is certainly no Harrison, who campaigned for office on a platform of
voting rights but then allowed the matter to languish once in office. In
fact, Biden gave an extraordinarily powerful speech in Philadelphia
earlier this month, describing in the starkest of terms the existential
threat our democracy faces. If he follows that up by using the tremendous
power of his office to help change the rules of the filibuster to save our
democracy, he will stand alongside Johnson as a champion and savior of
American democracy.

But he must take to heart the lessons of Texas: when we fight for the
right to vote, we can expand democracy to include everyone. But when we
give up without a fight, we can lose democracy itself.

Op-Ed in CNN:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46617?t=1004&akid=148151%2E444211%2Enl3q2d ]https://www.cnn.com/2021/07/30/opinions/joe-biden-texas-voting-rights-lesson-orourke/index.html

Photo 1: U.S. Library of Congress
Photo 2: Bettman Archive/Getty Images

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44727?refcode=ema20210806-148151&t=1005&akid=148151%2E444211%2Enl3q2d ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=148151%2E444211%2Enl3q2d

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Losing one seat means losing the Senate, so we need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — this month is really important for us.
We have to continue growing our support base as we venture into August, which can be notoriously slow for fundraising.
**This is especially crucial because last month CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. And on top of that, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”**
Trump and National Republicans will stop at nothing to take back this seat. They want to try to stop our momentum because they know we can’t afford to lose a single seat in the Senate.
**So we’re coming to you to help us make this slow month a major success, which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our goals and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210806-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210806-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210806-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210806-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210806-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210806-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210806-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)**
---
****
As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So we can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far.
We’re very thankful to have you on this team, and we look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond.
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210806-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1108_6688874_4Fe7Re&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1108%2E6688874%2E4Fe7Re).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- August**** 6, 2021-** **\- ICYMI: INGOP's Gerrymandering Tour -** Today and tomorrow, Indiana Democrats are going to every one of the Indiana Republicans' "Redistricting Tours" across the state to hold them accountable for rigging the next decade against Hoosier families. Instead of voters choosing who represents them, the Indiana Republican Party wants to decide who they represent. It's a strategy that's un-American and against the foundation of our democracy. The Republicans' gerrymandering agenda has wreaked havoc on the future of Indiana and Hoosier families. Since the 2011 redistricting process, Republicans passed "right to work" and created a "work more for less" economy in Indiana, the state's public schools have consistently lost funding, and unnecessary culture wars have divided Hoosier families in every zip code. Indiana Democrats are ready to fight back. Hoosiers like you can attend the INGOP's "gerrymandering tour" and ask them why they are promoting a form of extreme partisanship that does nothing to solve today's problems for Hoosier families. Hoosiers deserve a free, fair, and competitive election process. They deserve balance in our government. **\- AJP Tour Goes to Tipton, Greencastle, North Manchester, and New Albany -** Indiana Democrats this week continued our promise to reach every corner of the state. Democrats met Hoosiers in North Manchester, Tipton, Greencastle, and New Albany to discuss [why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33636187/299496867/-1411826621?FFF.08.06.21=FFF.08.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA3OTAyMy1mNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qNZIfQX2djv34Qi8JYQ1ss8yg0J___OaztX3xy7knjI=&emci=94af971f-b7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ba079023-f6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) and its once-in-a-generation investment in Indiana's infrastructure system. This includes the opportunity to expand broadband internet access, dismantling the Republicans' "work more for less" economy, and eliminating childcare deserts across the state. The American Jobs Plan is supported by a majority of voters (70%). This very fact is why Indiana Democrats are working overtime to deliver for Hoosiers all over the state. To find out about a tour stop near you this month, connect with your local county party for more information. **\- Opportunities -** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33636188/299496868/-1140133020?FFF.08.06.21=FFF.08.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA3OTAyMy1mNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qNZIfQX2djv34Qi8JYQ1ss8yg0J___OaztX3xy7knjI=&emci=94af971f-b7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ba079023-f6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535)**[**Click here to sign up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33636189/299496869/-1140133020?FFF.08.06.21=FFF.08.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA3OTAyMy1mNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qNZIfQX2djv34Qi8JYQ1ss8yg0J___OaztX3xy7knjI=&emci=94af971f-b7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ba079023-f6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) **\- Fall Internship 2021 -** **** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
* * *
Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
Qualifications Applications must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible.
* * *
How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. Email Lauren or call 317-231-7122 for more information. _**-Save the date-**_ **Bartholomew County Democratic Party:** [BC Democratic Women at the Columbus Farmer's Market](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33636190/299496870/-1664642187?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.08.06.21=FFF.08.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA3OTAyMy1mNmY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qNZIfQX2djv34Qi8JYQ1ss8yg0J___OaztX3xy7knjI=&emci=94af971f-b7f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ba079023-f6f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- August 6, 2021- \- ICYMI: INGOP's Gerrymandering Tour - Today and tomorrow, Indiana Democrats are going to every one of the Indiana Republicans' "Redistricting Tours" across the state to hold them accountable for rigging the next decade against Hoosier families. Instead of voters choosing who represents them, the Indiana Republican Party wants to decide who they represent. It's a strategy that's un-American and against the foundation of our democracy. The Republicans' gerrymandering agenda has wreaked havoc on the future of Indiana and Hoosier families. Since the 2011 redistricting process, Republicans passed "right to work" and created a "work more for less" economy in Indiana, the state's public schools have consistently lost funding, and unnecessary culture wars have divided Hoosier families in every zip code. Indiana Democrats are ready to fight back. Hoosiers like you can attend the INGOP's "gerrymandering tour" and ask them why they are promoting a form of extreme partisanship that does nothing to solve today's problems for Hoosier families. Hoosiers deserve a free, fair, and competitive election process. They deserve balance in our government. \- AJP Tour Goes to Tipton, Greencastle, North Manchester, and New Albany - Indiana Democrats this week continued our promise to reach every corner of the state. Democrats met Hoosiers in North Manchester, Tipton, Greencastle, and New Albany to discuss and its once-in-a-generation investment in Indiana's infrastructure system. This includes the opportunity to expand broadband internet access, dismantling the Republicans' "work more for less" economy, and eliminating childcare deserts across the state. The American Jobs Plan is supported by a majority of voters (70%). This very fact is why Indiana Democrats are working overtime to deliver for Hoosiers all over the state. To find out about a tour stop near you this month, connect with your local county party for more information. \- Opportunities - \- Fall Internship 2021 - ** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applications must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible. How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. | | | Hi friend,

For four LONG years, Trump and his Republican allies relentlessly attacked Social Security.

Stop Republicans is conducting interviews with PA supporters to refine our strategy to [**_protect and expand Social Security._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4f50bb4-af16-4cfb-b96a-ae24c03c6dba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
[**Will you please submit your response to help improve our Social Security Strategy before midnight? →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65ee3432-6cb3-4020-bbc8-433d181a7a89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Based on your previous responses, I know you’re a TOP supporter.

And President Biden just fired the Trump-appointed Social Security Administration Chief. (YES!)
[_This means new leadership will be coming in to administer Social Security._](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95419647-ec29-4b23-978c-d62a8400044b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[We need to perfect our Social Security Strategy to make sure it’s protected and expanded. **But PA has NOT been represented in our strategy!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T077d8649-bc75-4c02-ba66-f9bc9aeac256/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[**So, will you represent PA and submit your interview response before midnight?? →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0957fd79-c2fa-41d7-bcd2-5b0e07149a28/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

I knew I could count on your input.

name: Marco Rubio (iPhone)
subject: There’s no easy way to say this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I’ll just be blunt.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

There's no easy way to say this, so I'll just be blunt. August is ROUGH.

I've been in and out of meetings all day and I JUST saw this text from my Finance Director:

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=17a3449c03fb49aaac757078e214ad3d&_e=RsUdosy_DaxS03d4LTR_757jbdaQizzltX5Lx9YYqt5do-KMYowqx5sBkP3uqKmBpku0IjnmEcvZ4TK7Lz7wrErz3FVpOkjyODhf4vb2V9tVYeVo6qVd2sa-pvn4_emL_uasRnaU4eujTqbXqcarR2F5c-pEu1mfGS-PMtO4HqUV2_3yJ31v0Ng60Z0AAZ9s00kxr9jjyfx1gNwG1jMY0Lf2DAcCQzW-ucIE0Ia0jGumpjMv5WIN1xfgSak8T26Dnvs-HsNavX9dH0Hk3GmVizfvja6qbDIxrltZY7uMq0pScXQawQ-xuST8bfiBoijftlCNJzHVRUGeZjZ9pscygiUrr0vG0lCAgfZf6yuyw66f_5KB_EyKzpSdlUHOex7SvCzJd960XFt-itHsyzVLIcOhK5-PoSnCtqr3-9WgVUNEpYacoLLV6lqK0Nizr-UKQousoQAQkT1kCVgisfLYInyxeVTXJ-DrLQPKEtJNIuxkWNaYBkIoGHq7iupbfn9Tv46bm21Sw5G_kwVSocnATjxPmaJMUEaH5aiH8WB4b7E%3D "Text")

| I have to run off to another meeting soon, so I'll be quick...I hope Anna was right in asking me to reach out to you, Peter. And I really hate that I have to write this email to you but we're already pacing behind where we need to be at this point in the month!

**[I need you to dig deep and consider giving $25 or $50 to help me flip the Senate red.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=17a3449c03fb49aaac757078e214ad3d&_e=RsUdosy_DaxS03d4LTR_757jbdaQizzltX5Lx9YYqt5do-KMYowqx5sBkP3uqKmBpku0IjnmEcvZ4TK7Lz7wrErz3FVpOkjyODhf4vb2V9tVYeVo6qVd2sa-pvn4_emL_uasRnaU4eujTqbXqcarR2F5c-pEu1mfGS-PMtO4HqUV2_3yJ31v0Ng60Z0AAZ9s00kxr9jjyfx1gNwG1jMY0Lf2DAcCQzW-ucIE0Ia0jGumpjMv5WIN1xfgSak8T26Dnvs-HsNavX9dH0Hk3GmVizfvja6qbDIxrltZY7uMq0pScXQawQ-xuST8bfiBoijftlCNJzHVRUGeZjZ9pscygi3FtgAYwJTSfsWHr0EvtmHIM2rl7sR7jySwgXzD_BaYsg9jYz5VUEMxSnyUCS_38hyKDn8J5pXYBfpFtLUDaZzOhIDlcatAtcrfMmbQ4huC6QDWcGYG6jR4Tv7JT1OnFws1-HLVxRwmneXZx06jOz-LtqE2psZNyUlC9Wwnurvm2HA7dqP2sWQCHW9hIX0EMI5ZfLPGAS9u3NciMUmPdLg%3D "I need you to dig deep and consider giving $25 or $50 to help me flip the Senate red. ")**

subject: I need your support this month.
body:
I need your support this month, we have to hire staff.

| | | [](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug_21_month_goal_supporters&n=1)
---
| Peter, We must raise $6000 this month, the campaign is growing and we must hire staff. **[Please donate $35 right now to help keep us on track for our goal this month.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvu3vsZdFuiKZWXJw-7PZZtcEFnARgNRlDZgvZ9oFPVggbSZxc8V4piIpEbNUf3wXk&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug_21_month_goal_supporters&n=2)** As the campaign grows we must hire more staff. body:
| **FIRST:** Republicans like Mitch McConnell confessed they WILL use the filibuster to derail the Biden-Harris administration.

**THEN:** Republicans passed voter suppression laws targeted at historically disenfranchised groups to rig the election rules in their favor.

**SO NOW:** **[We need 10,000 supporters to sign on and urge the Senate to ABOLISH the filibuster now. Peter, the filibuster is a direct product of segregationists, and it’s still being weaponized to keep systemic racism alive.

If the filibuster stays, our Democratic agenda will be at stake.

**So we say it’s time to move past the racist legacies of the past.**
