name: Dick Durbin
subject: My friend Tammy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I first met Tammy Duckworth when she was still recovering at Walter Reed after being wounded in Iraq. She attended the State of the Union as my guest that year and I gave her my cell phone number, to contact me about any issues at Walter Reed.
#
Peter,
I first met Tammy Duckworth when she was still recovering at Walter Reed after being wounded in Iraq. She attended the State of the Union as my guest that year and I gave her my cell phone number, to contact me about any issues at Walter Reed.
I quickly came to learn of her tenacity and commitment to serving others, as she was soon calling me regularly to advocate for her fellow wounded warriors. The ways she saw our country failing our veterans eventually motivated her to run for office.
**[She’s been fighting for veterans and for working families across Illinois with the same fierceness ever since -- and she’s just getting started. Can you chip in $5 today to send Tammy back to the Senate in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33638299/299503365/-2069522590?refcode=dd_em_210806_1_i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjczZWViYS1mZGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWjVzApzgCToCAIo-385Obn0cNbiR1cS_hJTa-ESELw=)**
I can’t tell you how important it is for Illinois to have such a strong champion serving alongside me in the Senate. We’ve worked together on everything from transportation improvements to COVID vaccine access, and her leadership is essential to helping us recover from the pandemic in a way that strengthens our support for working families.
This will be Tammy’s first Senate reelection campaign and it’s crucial we give her our full support as she builds the campaign operation she’ll need to win. That’s why I’m asking, Peter:
**[Will you contribute $5 now to reelect Tammy Duckworth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33638300/299503366/-2069522590?refcode=dd_em_210806_1_i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjczZWViYS1mZGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWjVzApzgCToCAIo-385Obn0cNbiR1cS_hJTa-ESELw=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33638301/299503367/-2069522590?refcode=dd_em_210806_1_i&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjczZWViYS1mZGY2LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWjVzApzgCToCAIo-385Obn0cNbiR1cS_hJTa-ESELw=)**

Peter, I first met Tammy Duckworth when she was still recovering at Walter Reed after being wounded in Iraq. She attended the State of the Union as my guest that year and I gave her my cell phone number, to contact me about any issues at Walter Reed. I quickly came to learn of her tenacity and commitment to serving others, as she was soon calling me regularly to advocate for her fellow wounded warriors. The ways she saw our country failing our veterans eventually motivated her to run for office. = I can’t tell you how important it is for Illinois to have such a strong champion serving alongside me in the Senate. We’ve worked together on everything from transportation improvements to COVID vaccine access, and her leadership is essential to helping us recover from the pandemic in a way that strengthens our support for working families. This will be Tammy’s first Senate reelection campaign and it’s crucial we give her our full support as she builds the campaign operation she’ll need to win. That’s why I’m asking, Peter: = My best, Dick Durbin = * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

body:
Sen. Hawley: Public schools must shape kids who love America and our founding [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=fa83fa9ffa5f44ee9b1ebbcea7e56193&_e=UDTsxwDiDDeHH0WOtiyKVeCkfql_qYSRhS8xweFDMBp048bYX-Of2a_MkZkReDJ0C1my865iYn8dcYWQdXAoEyhM1z10a49Q8WDiVh4wmxlPJRyFNspiY-6X_iqndr74lgtH5LaxzfDh6Pzwt1N7m4UshjCE00wqxof0HKSyROwq_V37VaLm30UJeBR3PgwOnsoHAzzY7JLXdYmdjVrjTXTnVbgU5aGjMutWOYhALTy9WM6IxSE5nsEYVSeP_lksgxYhDwz8KeEKsz0qBzz1xFyyDAH6jGA6Jgl5Eu-PlmOZqRr1Anq76dPa_f6FlKwwbY8ghcEpQGr6n64JT2poyKtYMT7BAgYlV4UUHM53VRkTSAPvXgEkycawZ7rCm32lapaP7IwbmAKXZqWjkeEuSQ%3D%3D) | |

Peter,
The Left continues to push divisive, destructive Critical Race Theory.

**Our children’s futures are at stake, and I won’t sit idly by and let the Left indoctrinate the next generation!**

It is imperative we teach our children the truth about who we are.

I’m fighting back! I introduced the Love America Act, which would require any school that receives federal funding to teach children about America’s founding documents—the Constitution, the Bill of Rights, and the Declaration of Independence.

**We must replace the lies with the TRUTH!**

Below is an Op-Ed for the New York Post which lays out my case. Give it a read.

God Bless,

Josh
**Sen. Hawley: Public schools****must shape kids who love****America and our founding**
By Josh Hawley

Parents know something is wrong. It’s why they are showing up in droves at school-board meetings across the nation. They are sending a message. They don’t want their children taught that the true founding of America came in 1619, or that America is a systemically racist place, or that most Americans are oppressors. They don’t want their children taught lies. And they are right.

Sometimes, these lies go by the name “critical race theory,” a pet project of the left that began, as many bad ideas do, in the academy and has spread in recent years across corporate America and into school curricula. Sometimes the lies are called “anti-racism.”

Whatever the label, the central principles are the same. These doctrines teach that American society is structurally oppressive, that our culture is shot through with racism and other forms of bigotry, and that most Americans are complicit in racial oppression, knowingly or not...

Read more: [_**HERE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=fa83fa9ffa5f44ee9b1ebbcea7e56193&_e=UDTsxwDiDDeHH0WOtiyKVeCkfql_qYSRhS8xweFDMBp048bYX-Of2a_MkZkReDJ0C1my865iYn8dcYWQdXAoEyhM1z10a49Q8WDiVh4wmxlPJRyFNspiY-6X_iqndr74lgtH5LaxzfDh6Pzwt1N7m4UshjCE00wqxof0HKSyROwq_V37VaLm30UJeBR3PgwOMuVHx6OPK7sTuBuJJuYZzf27HH6jQ6LsUEPp3MkL-zCY-s7pyRugDVjYGkP9JXLUf9xBD6jAxVy41YrTpe7SF4cuVVLJepX3XHtV_cC25xuRCzqal5KQaDb_BxnCSbLAgNrt21tydHLQoE5HJryslXkVUYmOea2zXw468PMISN6JmT9SUGBYHK2T2BC_zq3EwFW8q6bzS3_OkISrqwtcIQ%3D%3D)

Dear friend, Thank you for being a part of our team. This campaign has been blessed with a groundswell of support across the Commonwealth and we couldn’t do it without you. I encourage you to join the thousands of Team Youngkin members across Virginia who are coming together to bring much needed change to our Commonwealth by visiting our website and signing up to volunteer, be a precinct captain, or join a coalition.
---
| [ **Click to join Team Youngkin!** ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VVRlYZ58xGSrW1LSL018SrW-GW2bnPc74vXsfFMrH-Sh3lGmwV1-WJV7CgK3CW8gwrtx844r8wN7SXz6qqll8MN5twJ758VMppW8Ffkf68yQNJfW4c5Hlx71s15jW8900Kd8h_syTW1BS91q5SMyT0W1HzGYR201xkQW7VBJlX81hCH4W8XCxky59KMVGW5M3yHn2grC-LW8XvqQN2_24GDMpvgz3RM25nW7YBNgJ5YrLpvW6ZxBZy5HcWcvN4Mfvw_cG-T1W5V7x3b6p0268W1KY8S58BTmr7W98CspL8p6bwVW7f4Cj47ZRLCr3pry1)
---
With the month of August underway, parents and families, including Suzanne and I, are starting to look ahead to getting their students back to school. But Governor Northam and Terry McAuliffe are putting the priorities of their good friends – the teachers unions – ahead of our children. I spoke to WTVR CBS 6 in Richmond on Thursday about respecting parents’ decisions about their own children. Click on the image to view the clip.
---
[ ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VVRlYZ58xGSrW1LSL018SrW-GW2bnPc74vXsfFMrH-SV3lGn5V1-WJV7CgTjpW467Smv96xxb7W3nrFCz7K5DTxVH8sGb1CtydBW5dWdj96Z5ZPyW17nKGk7KH4H8W6rh5g-1W4MyXW1RmhF88wPdsTW5V7RH61NvtknW5hrz-z47tBTDW5b-Cnz6YVttyW6dN6NK4pSl88W33g3BT5MGmhbVQJ9JR83x0gTW5ms4R49lwZJbW64kT995vDQ_dW1zSBTL1HHbNwW4r96S04X4PtlW5cxf2n5RwvHNW7-rPpd8TpTk6W8z0ndS5BhQGjW5RNHTw1nL_jWW4VrbqF4JfyKyW57Yh9h1jf6npN2N-RVM4J56p31fW1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
On Thursday, I had the incredible opportunity to participate in a ride along with the Chesterfield County Police Department to learn more about the increasing public safety challenges facing the Commonwealth. A BIG thank you to Colonel Katz and his team for hosting us and to Officer Percival for letting me ride along.
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
We had another incredible week on the campaign trail – from meeting with small business leaders, to hosting rallies, and opening more field offices, we feel the energy across the Commonwealth. Virginians are ready to win in November!
---
---
---
---
---
| [ **Click here to support Team Youngkin!** ](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VVRlYZ58xGSrW1LSL018SrW-GW2bnPc74vXsfFMrH-RJ5kbT5V3Zsc37CgGWkW4BwzpJ6W_0VqM_xsVq76d5fW5rggsP1Nbs57W5gcC2j7h9rpDN6DCh7HMyNp6W10c2zt47pXPlW6cTDxh8C1J8qW14hb-x2YytD9W6vnBMH2-25QTW2ZlC6r5VMkXVW6SxJzC1WlmpGN61S0-Xd39V0W85LgFF38JkM0W1SGk6p6dqkFqN7H0F5SWfC2XW5vFq2l98GM55W2fFwH07LL8h_W7yQXyW7jlNrZN1XWMGGgTkQmN5_mx1_HJl7VW7vPK6Q3-CrVqW57HjTF2KGbdGW3xyC6K1lTDDdW6fb_FG8zpYtZW7HX4Wv7grzkyN9b9-X1P7T-6W4rwHRk3bTDCTW5CHMBD4gv3k0W5GMwyH3xRbFJW1DZcJb6RzFZwW3dtv9v7x59XGW4K53jc972bfv2BQ1)

Polls are showing us neck and neck with Terry McAuliffe and the momentum for my vision to make Virginia the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family keeps growing. There’s much work ahead – and I’m grateful to have you on this journey with us. clean_body: Thank you for being a part of our team. This campaign has been blessed with a groundswell of support across the Commonwealth and we couldn’t | | | | ---|---|--- Dear friend, Thank you for being a part of our team. This campaign has been blessed with a groundswell of support across the Commonwealth and we couldn’t do it without you. I encourage you to join the thousands of Team Youngkin members across Virginia who are coming together to bring much needed change to our Commonwealth by visiting our website and signing up to volunteer, be a precinct captain, or join a coalition. | With the month of August underway, parents and families, including Suzanne and I, are starting to look ahead to getting their students back to school. But Governor Northam and Terry McAuliffe are putting the priorities of their good friends – the teachers unions – ahead of our children. I spoke to WTVR CBS 6 in Richmond on Thursday about respecting parents’ decisions about their own children. Click on the image to view the clip. | | | ---|---|--- On Thursday, I had the incredible opportunity to participate in a ride along with the Chesterfield County Police Department to learn more about the increasing public safety challenges facing the Commonwealth. A BIG thank you to Colonel Katz and his team for hosting us and to Officer Percival for letting me ride along. | | | ---|---|--- We had another incredible week on the campaign trail – from meeting with small business leaders, to hosting rallies, and opening more field offices, we feel the energy across the Commonwealth. Virginians are ready to win in November! | Polls are showing us neck and neck with Terry McAuliffe and the momentum for my vision to make Virginia the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family keeps growing. There’s much work ahead – and I’m grateful to have you on this journey with us. Don’t forget to follow us on , , , and so you stay up to date with all things Team Youngkin. I hope to see you on the trail soon. For Virginia, Glenn Youngkin P.S. check out these must read articles from the week: The Free Lance-Star: The Washington Examiner: Fairfax County Times: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

subject: This is not a bargaining chip

body:
Republican Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy is playing games. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux9RRYcS8Zd12zLoAlsjtYW9yl4SVh0YMwQx2MVKe6TJ8XRfkqqsNfsxIcS6H2D5bYHoojjvjRhAqt3SFY4kFhZFJHT36sIrzQwcBZXJn9_yA6J4WguVugEjfLGgmlBjuM-ghsNJeJwcNNG9sXBYi86trll9yLB0CWLLDouoyGMtySNE7hE3mryhQ_vZFT3XEc6mvv4wYws6D7KBINr8_IpYlEBD0fgLo4GvOujW2DLfLoUgVlUNYeVHRytoUy9m3fZEm9cSmEMFOqwjAVhkSh6SrmBXSATyX0wxKdo0ycGHO6TNkGsPWHAo-c2wcQYwLCojPEZ9EpvNpZrpcz1zTAnc/3e8/S9aY9TcRSYCUzfnYiA4Kew/h0/ZvRoP7QCWSdUCd10ogMPnpiGE_fsMCcMX8Rm4qZWt48)

| | Friend,

The COVID-19 pandemic put a spotlight on our nation’s working class and the wealthiest 1% -- revealing two _drastically different_ scenarios. As CEOs earned billions of dollars, thousands of families were left without the resources to maintain even their most basic needs.

Now, as families take steps to rebuild their lives in the wake of this tragedy, Republicans are playing politics with the financial security of hard-working Americans.

**Recently, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy pulled all six Republicans designated to serve on the Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth** \-- a committee created to provide solutions for the growing issue of economic inequality in our country.

**This childish move will further stall our efforts at economic growth and leave working families vulnerable to exploitation and corporate abuse.** Minority Leader McCarthy’s behavior is a reflection of the partisan politics endangering the financial prosperity of Ohio’s working families.

I’m fighting hard to ensure that people always come first, not partisanship.

**[The future of America’s working families is not a bargaining chip. clean_body: Republican Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy is playing games. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, The COVID-19 pandemic put a spotlight on our nation’s working class and the wealthiest 1% -- revealing two drastically different scenarios. As CEOs earned billions of dollars, thousands of families were left without the resources to maintain even their most basic needs. Now, as families take steps to rebuild their lives in the wake of this tragedy, Republicans are playing politics with the financial security of hard-working Americans. Recently, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy pulled all six Republicans designated to serve on the Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth \-- a committee created to provide solutions for the growing issue of economic inequality in our country. This childish move will further stall our efforts at economic growth and leave working families vulnerable to exploitation and corporate abuse. Minority Leader McCarthy’s behavior is a reflection of the partisan politics endangering the financial prosperity of Ohio’s working families. I’m fighting hard to ensure that people always come first, not partisanship. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your support, \-- Marcy Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. name: Justin Atkins
subject: Tell Congress to pass the American Jobs Plan & invest in clean energy
body:
| | | Tell Congress to pass a bold version of the American Jobs Plan and make historic investments in infrastructure and climate justice.
---
| [Act now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33638902/299505346/644581970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgxNWE4Ni0wMGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCKyHBwEGhops_aa63S3zLJy1ySD5dN08AwHE6uYmoc=&emci=f1e88ccb-fef6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2b815a86-00f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**In the next few days, the Senate is expected to hold a final vote on a bipartisan infrastructure bill** that will revitalize our nation’s transportation systems, replace outdated lead pipes, and invest in clean energy — **but it’s only a fraction of the funding President Biden laid out in the American Jobs Plan.**
Just this summer, extreme heat, deadly wildfires, and devastating floods have threatened communities in the United States and around the world. The climate crisis is here, and it will get much worse if Congress fails to take the necessary action.
Democrats in Congress have the numbers to make a once-in-a-generation investment to combat climate change and shift to a clean energy future — but they need to hear from you.
[Send a message to Congress: Pass the full American Jobs Plan via budget reconciliation so we can make urgent investments in clean energy and climate action.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33638903/299505347/-1277732331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgxNWE4Ni0wMGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCKyHBwEGhops_aa63S3zLJy1ySD5dN08AwHE6uYmoc=&emci=f1e88ccb-fef6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2b815a86-00f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
While we certainly welcome any legislation that makes long overdue investments to repair our infrastructure and create good-paying jobs, it’s clear that there’s more work to be done.
When it’s time to pass a reconciliation bill this fall, progressives must remain steadfast in their commitments to climate justice by creating a new Civilian Climate Corps, implementing a national clean energy standard, replacing all lead pipes nationwide, and eliminating tax subsidies for fossil fuel corporations.
We can’t afford to squander this historic opportunity to address the climate crisis. By speaking out, we have the power to hold Congress accountable and ensure they keep their promises on climate action.
[Tell Congress: Pass the entire American Jobs Plan through reconciliation so we can transition to 100 percent clean energy and lead on the fight against climate change.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33638904/299505348/1451151024?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgxNWE4Ni0wMGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCKyHBwEGhops_aa63S3zLJy1ySD5dN08AwHE6uYmoc=&emci=f1e88ccb-fef6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2b815a86-00f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
[Write to Congress](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33638905/299505349/-114932917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjgxNWE4Ni0wMGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCKyHBwEGhops_aa63S3zLJy1ySD5dN08AwHE6uYmoc=&emci=f1e88ccb-fef6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2b815a86-00f7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172 "Write to Congress")

Justin Atkins
National Political Manager
NextGen America

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I lost . . .
body:
Last night, my phone blew up with people sending me news articles about a federal judge ordering me to pay $123,000 to the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR).
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSX1PkJuONsCDTPDICZesA/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSX1PkJuONsCDTPDICZesA/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ) Last night, my phone blew up with people sending me news articles about a federal judge ordering me to pay $123,000 to the Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR).

CAIR has been designated as an Islamic terrorist organization by the UAE for their ties to Hamas and the Muslim Brotherhood . . . **and an American judge ordered me to pay them more money than I 've ever had in my life**.

I was floored.

But then I was reminded of this quote by Donald Trump:
**_Sometimes by losing a battle
you find a new way to win the war._**
CAIR, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, AOC and their enablers want me demoralized and defeated.

They want me to stop exposing their lies, their hate, their corruption, their hypocrisy and their agenda to undermine American culture, Western Civilization and the United States Constitution.

They want me to give up.

NOT . . . A . . . DAMN . . . CHANCE. [**Help me keep going**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSX1PkJuONsCDTPDICZesA/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ) (and no, your donations WILL NOT be going to CAIR).

CAIR boasted of their victory on Twitter, and then followed up with this quote, _" They planned, but Allah also planned. And Allah is the best of planners," Quran, 8:30._

If Allah himself has been planning to stop me, **then quitting is not an option!**

In reality, CAIR -- a DESIGNATED ISLAMIC TERRORIST ORGANIZATION -- planned to stop me. And Allah IS NOT the God of faithful Judeo/Christians who the majority of people in our nation believe in.

In the court ruling, the judge did not dispute that CAIR worked with Twitter to ban and silence me. That's known and was uncovered by the _Wall Street Journal_.

But the judge decided that I had no business relationship with Twitter despite the fact that nearly all of my income at the time was generated on Twitter from my work as an investigative journalist.

And with that decision, I've been ordered by a federal magistrate to pay for CAIR's attorney's fees.

While I have attorneys reviewing my options regarding that judgement, I'm going to do some planning of my own after significant prayer to our God.

If you're able, [**please chip in to help cover the**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/wYgEkp8yA2dL7k8Q763892JNNg/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ)[**ongoing costs of my legal defense fees against terrorist organizations who are trying to bring Sharia Law to America**.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/wYgEkp8yA2dL7k8Q763892JNNg/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ)

And know that I will never stop fighting as long as I'm able to speak - [**and your continued support arms me with the tools I need to keep going strong**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSX1PkJuONsCDTPDICZesA/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ).

Thank you so much for all that you do.

With respect and gratitude,

Laura Loomer

P.S. In the end, CAIR failed. Their intent was to ruin me by getting me kicked off Twitter. But their plan backfired. While it took years of work, I'm still able to get my message out to you and hundreds of thousands of others - and CAIR can do nothing to stop it. [**Help me keep going and fund my work here.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/mSX1PkJuONsCDTPDICZesA/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ)

---
(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/G892yMrlKcIhymWiqnLOZyOQ)

---

name: Marco Rubio for Senate HQ
subject: We tried to tell you 1...2...3...4...5...6 TIMES, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
We've lost count of how many times we've told you that Marco's Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised him.
|
---
| | | _**1...2...3...4...5...6...we 've lost count, Peter.**_

We've lost count of how many times we've told you that Marco's Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised him. Well we were just told that on top of outraising Marco last quarter she is among the top 3 Democrats who have raised the most money so far in 2021. name: John Castorani
subject: Re: Hillary Clinton and Benghazi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountableToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=eea03f3844cd46e2ad386994c5bc54bc&_t=_XE_zAqixXMf2otfS-nwfQEvl0qmNHyxz6r_zYBMAjokjC1PyXOsvmKb3vLqjISDPow6YPClGp62cMkHjNdBvzacr2JvB4PB60Wz8nAyYz7V6-BOHRA89KL5Xt3nL2TJuAAFWY7SgH_uu4EMhQwCJYL_AEAe9jDLJ70Wu5wDmzY%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=eea03f3844cd46e2ad386994c5bc54bc&_e=Ect24V6m775ZQIRR1MMT7XHunpHYNtX-5f0FAbBX_Cvsv50LK4ZGVDt6V4viN4b9dDY6sIdnnjcNWP2c4CP9i36jKqcDiWzz_nXGjly-RAZt1iCrOIRVe6wG9v3fH2f-m38-hJUfwCwtbQA12TtdN6ZEfUWjeM_nCpFcHSHvJQTfAhULlnbIwQ48Wv29Yt3PXYWbRGrjpZzJ31xyAqzALiXYUZGKCK0UVwJeS8mmwHfCN7Oo0U_cbkzqrwbpPIqxsscKCclv6zO5oLZSSWNZSVgFFTylU-pWj0AtXX0XSkNXtQJB8KbbzcZWsYnlbOY8gxE2lB_poDkCT4RA24r_NMYOuQDunnZyXiFP8d9GW0gJcwyKpCUFRva-VYxr_TIgYrAkuv-g_O-fZFlYJFY-UYFUPQCK-8xoyblZlUvUH4QHvL-rQb4FwdZ2cQKKpjnusyC0v7swR-a-8_u0oWhCSg%3D%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=eea03f3844cd46e2ad386994c5bc54bc&_e=Ect24V6m775ZQIRR1MMT7XHunpHYNtX-5f0FAbBX_Cvsv50LK4ZGVDt6V4viN4b9dDY6sIdnnjcNWP2c4CP9i36jKqcDiWzz_nXGjly-RAZt1iCrOIRVe6wG9v3fH2f-m38-hJUfwCwtbQA12TtdN6ZEfUWjeM_nCpFcHSHvJQTfAhULlnbIwQ48Wv29Yt3PXYWbRGrjpZzJ31xyAqzALiXYUZGKCK0UVwJeS8mmwHfCN7Oo0U_cbkzqrwbpPIqxDJ7pXGRlbdh7Sd7fMvvUm9ep5RiML6YK6ZBNOMz5EwaSkLMBAf_8Hj6SF3JKPNoYtmUrONIahFZfUW5iuGTvmea8P9-JgSul1jF5ql00bFkiKFzqDFVGrJtJlaXu22bcznT1wO0EA9XBxziZ5pd_Ubzv8qBLftNSyHBlxUym83FxFAm9IXvEoQSsRr91R2UvGDUUXt5QLSAiyNRJuUvuzA%3D%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service – along with my security clearance – to run for Congress](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=eea03f3844cd46e2ad386994c5bc54bc&_e=Ect24V6m775ZQIRR1MMT7XHunpHYNtX-5f0FAbBX_Cvsv50LK4ZGVDt6V4viN4b9dDY6sIdnnjcNWP2c4CP9i36jKqcDiWzz_nXGjly-RAZt1iCrOIRVe6wG9v3fH2f-m38-hJUfwCwtbQA12TtdN6ZEfUWjeM_nCpFcHSHvJQTfAhULlnbIwQ48Wv29Yt3PXYWbRGrjpZzJ31xyAqzALiXYUZGKCK0UVwJeS8mmwHfCN7Oo0U_cbkzqrwbpPIqxzjwaGXH5tgt6CHEA0Z0nUGJnaWdSWv833Nc3IFq-P0XK6lFKpxhGDqz-iz-ybZE4wGfQrroLUv68D3nbfAh6y3ynglsaJCqBVhhlylipB84LZ0J160c1kLXDXqSTqEdzRzSNBOyqtU8zqUlCvAnuxlnJvWI6cp3FPknwEE12UEyM3t3cnvPuFttTai2HEl0G2BITdmxw-IeQFegle_w0Cw%3D%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=eea03f3844cd46e2ad386994c5bc54bc&_e=Ect24V6m775ZQIRR1MMT7XHunpHYNtX-5f0FAbBX_Cvsv50LK4ZGVDt6V4viN4b9dDY6sIdnnjcNWP2c4CP9i36jKqcDiWzz_nXGjly-RAZt1iCrOIRVe6wG9v3fH2f-m38-hJUfwCwtbQA12TtdN6ZEfUWjeM_nCpFcHSHvJQTfAhULlnbIwQ48Wv29Yt3PXYWbRGrjpZzJ31xyAqzALiXYUZGKCK0UVwJeS8mmwHfCN7Oo0U_cbkzqrwbpPIqxcHbER-brhrsCCJDams93ow42zrHsrfAxbHj8wyjPM-hDDkIRC4TWc5lTBAOCu4VXTH4gDajS7IODuc1D2Vt1CaJzoj90liyDA97octr3bLyRbpl4ac43tcsuxklwh0vlv4wlzU8-WKIEe3HB2vjssPLYhkuBNjg61yJy0oELU8mplmumZM87NgnskVxcs3faG8a0JPqjL9UNw4AZRhpjzQ%3D%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ – along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me – even in the worst of times – that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

It’s no surprise that most Nevadans want to move away from caucuses. Caucuses require public support for a candidate and can take hours to complete -- leaving many working individuals with no choice but to sit it out. Alternatively, voting primary elections can be a much quicker process with a secret ballot.
We’ve seen voter participation and registration increase across the board in Nevada -- _people want to be involved in the voting process._ It’s on us to make it as easy as possible for everyone to participate in our elections.
[__**We want to hear from you so we hope you’ll take our quick one-click poll -- Which voting method do you prefer?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33641325/299512852/283243411?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTAyZjgwZC0wYWY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hga6bk6Sb6ylUZdcVqzzOFaM1WeLj7l6kIQXfGWU-Fw=&emci=6c4f0ee8-f5f6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b502f80d-0af7-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

I’ll just be blunt.

| | | | Peter,

There's no easy way to say this, so I'll just be blunt. August is ROUGH.

I've been in and out of meetings all day and I JUST saw this text from my Finance Director:

name: Chief James Craig
subject: why Detroit didn’t burn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089826:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089827:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089828:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089829:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089825:6WoklelRN:m:1:3253819041:67F2D7D6EA82C42DBE64735E5037DAF4:r)**

body:
we want to make sure you didn’t miss out on the major highlights from his trip... [](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=52c2176ae802493685774e76085ea4db&_e=qYjhP8qTsjAB5ah-110VjgWvmrsUJhOg8Ym9vCOTWFHxk8pyn19C61crTJ4Z9SyN2Hq3q-p7FQmlIqjzwZn1XlgOUbRc68erGVSWPM6l_2dTOX_qc6_X2R3f5TZ44DTa35zrB78N5HgCikUczrxReAw_-whm5lnaxkq7ZKO2RVd3lp7HHbj0qBzcaoV-evDk5-81CRXwVNadz8wn4hAwPysQiSjtL28G4ZYotEm8M6J1Q1GiIiNLSpCYrD_re8nWKgSR99DPUD1JmLpcIVgnJ3N3OOQozaMvblJ1-yE2RuJEvrR26fdQHi4c_SKjSGst6aUk-vcePjZ4SDSSZJ-iqgzBcKwFEP5pqEM7bA61O7NlH1qMJJ6j75tI4oXOX-I2_ASWzzV2Mbo4oWs1Zt10zou9N8KxePhM1A8WAVN9tSyBycXnhbL4S6c5ovBrLPD_tIQ7rkW4efg4qL5jy1msx67nL-qmR1HCJmHSXAjtVUR6H6MxZwXiONt-geE7nejU) | |

Hi friend,

Jeff recently wrapped up his _Fighting for Pennsylvania Bus Tour_ , and we want to make sure you didn’t miss out on the major highlights from his trip.

Fighting for Pennsylvania Tour Recap:

**✅****3,700****Miles Traveled**
**✅****67****Counties Visited**
**✅****12****Days**
**✅****1****Fighter—Jeff Bartos**

And he’s just getting started — _[**check out Jeff’s recap video of the Fighting for Pennsylvania Tour Now >>**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=52c2176ae802493685774e76085ea4db&_e=qYjhP8qTsjAB5ah-110VjgWvmrsUJhOg8Ym9vCOTWFHxk8pyn19C61crTJ4Z9SyN2Hq3q-p7FQmlIqjzwZn1XlgOUbRc68erGVSWPM6l_2dTOX_qc6_X2R3f5TZ44DTa35zrB78N5HgCikUczrxReAw_-whm5lnaxkq7ZKO2RVd3lp7HHbj0qBzcaoV-evDk5-81CRXwVNadz8wn4hAwPysQiSjtL28G4ZYotEm8M6J1Q1GiIiNLSpCYrD_re8nWKgSR99DPUD1JmLpcIVgnJ3N3OOQozaMvblJ1-yE2RuLPW7U3WfkVtrGPh0NBGCwxEwwbLKCJPL4l3ZwQuW9xMZNuaZ5uGyfBe1JAanwohMFbY1kQXMxRR_KDC2Wxlk9TSZ0ADv-oPDlmqUl5xHMPBcuz_1yp76F6xqd83oPx-uXGRqilAoIPtBT5-SIWZj-xSfBaDXMkfYADoy4IC1LyLWlBTZbSwFMuTt3TgGAF2tthGmfCpBhm8SFVCxt7XK-O)_

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=52c2176ae802493685774e76085ea4db&_e=qYjhP8qTsjAB5ah-110VjgWvmrsUJhOg8Ym9vCOTWFHxk8pyn19C61crTJ4Z9SyN2Hq3q-p7FQmlIqjzwZn1XlgOUbRc68erGVSWPM6l_2dTOX_qc6_X2R3f5TZ44DTa35zrB78N5HgCikUczrxReAw_-whm5lnaxkq7ZKO2RVd3lp7HHbj0qBzcaoV-evDk5-81CRXwVNadz8wn4hAwPysQiSjtL28G4ZYotEm8M6J1Q1GiIiNLSpCYrD_re8nWKgSR99DPUD1JmLpcIVgnJ3N3OOQozaMvblJ1-yE2RuIdiv0OT2h_nwE1qwtmT0XoasuymlLXS9T6el_iMSve3jwrDYQtU-kY9zWZmNAxhZ_Tm--QjnW20WND6EeFFZ7_i3sULRxJB0J0awCLjMvhK12xRCp6Oi2PgjP15lbfxmWZGaMqWGf0nd8HcC2aCF9KiAaOubvje3okVyrDle5tqLMo_atzwg-aMZBVjnFZBaGIQIkKp-wHkqXa3b6rOBxo)

|
---
Jeff made the rounds at County Fairs across PA and met with our proud men and women of law enforcement.

**Jeff will fight the Defund the Police Movement and always Back the Blue!**

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=52c2176ae802493685774e76085ea4db&_e=qYjhP8qTsjAB5ah-110VjgWvmrsUJhOg8Ym9vCOTWFHxk8pyn19C61crTJ4Z9SyN2Hq3q-p7FQmlIqjzwZn1XlgOUbRc68erGVSWPM6l_2dTOX_qc6_X2R3f5TZ44DTa35zrB78N5HgCikUczrxReAw_-whm5lnaxkq7ZKO2RVd3lp7HHbj0qBzcaoV-evDk5-81CRXwVNadz8wn4hAwPysQiSjtL28G4ZYotEm8M6J1Q1GiIiNLSpCYrD_re8nWKgSR99DPUD1JmLpcIVgnJ3N3OOQozaMvblJ1-yE2RuI_-ylZln-W59IAqP1AgKFnqh1-eg5ZF12eb6LBLICAtckqYCon1YmobjhF8QoWCIst3g6ie-iDsZou9aKF3xxasbXi7b1e9Q0zQFUPfnzRL2E2-sVYszJg-HNroE71IqSreTq_6ydKeOhapuYVLFcvbyxfW60037_pV8USWa3oS-gKzUeinaoT7bfuLF3gp4_AAJJYwDgFXVYkb9k6Io7T)

|
---

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=52c2176ae802493685774e76085ea4db&_e=qYjhP8qTsjAB5ah-110VjgWvmrsUJhOg8Ym9vCOTWFHxk8pyn19C61crTJ4Z9SyN2Hq3q-p7FQmlIqjzwZn1XlgOUbRc68erGVSWPM6l_2dTOX_qc6_X2R3f5TZ44DTa35zrB78N5HgCikUczrxReAw_-whm5lnaxkq7ZKO2RVd3lp7HHbj0qBzcaoV-evDk5-81CRXwVNadz8wn4hAwPysQiSjtL28G4ZYotEm8M6J1Q1GiIiNLSpCYrD_re8nWKgSR99DPUD1JmLpcIVgnJ3N3OOQozaMvblJ1-yE2RuJQ1JefiWsPNTwUMkdH6-jjPRytyAft3vDtBZ4Nz04djhP2aZ_bw7dMyz1Wzjl6uzdURekFoSINavrVTHX94HikBQ7t1Sl5KHNPnnONwaigPNX0RGp3CiJlQ3GX3THW8saNtWkXXIT_E6qbCvwvh8oEXSC01FgIhKtK9jZ0Pkp72RZIfHe0lz2XrLrmGhfwQq7mNviHVNfWMUOGtU9dnwHz)

In Monroe county, Jeff met with tons of parents concerned with the indoctrination happening in our schools and the climate of intolerance on our college campuses.

**We must fight this indoctrination and restore education!**
|
---
Unfortunately, the trip wasn’t all positive. Jeff saw firsthand the devastating effects of the Biden Labor Crisis in every corner of the commonwealth.

Many small businesses in every county are struggling to stay afloat.
We have to do better.

**That’s why Jeff is Fighting For Pennsylvania!**

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=52c2176ae802493685774e76085ea4db&_e=qYjhP8qTsjAB5ah-110VjgWvmrsUJhOg8Ym9vCOTWFHxk8pyn19C61crTJ4Z9SyN2Hq3q-p7FQmlIqjzwZn1XlgOUbRc68erGVSWPM6l_2dTOX_qc6_X2R3f5TZ44DTa35zrB78N5HgCikUczrxReAw_-whm5lnaxkq7ZKO2RVd3lp7HHbj0qBzcaoV-evDk5-81CRXwVNadz8wn4hAwPysQiSjtL28G4ZYotEm8M6J1Q1GiIiNLSpCYrD_re8nWKgSR99DPUD1JmLpcIVgnJ3N3OOQozaMvblJ1-yE2RuJ9o5pwf-OjliYhevt5reYUe4fKbR_W_BwGDrvNep_n2Tqc8encuk2_SUHBycZS3IggAcZ3RiRxCtLnEQaj8lYpDfg00VXbicKYFXyEnbFqsNpV_VDLwTNd05UJN7TItCJs8PHEHV1Zj3mn6pZ9FKB5V4AqS4oPaxD_qhdJFcmY7QJWjxQBrC52jlNgwJfDV25B_xsTvKY95ftRDjC-yQQg)

|
---
Jeff found it a privilege to meet face to face, listen to his fellow Pennsylvanians, and share his vision for our state and our nation.

**We can’t wait to build the strongest grassroots movement in America with you and send Jeff to the Senate. **

Thank you,
Team Bartos

Jeff will fight the Defund the Police Movement and always Back the Blue! | In Monroe county, Jeff met with tons of parents concerned with the indoctrination happening in our schools and the climate of intolerance on our college campuses. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: fwd: A new opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
With another candidate officially competing in our primary race for U.S. Senate, we’re summoning a huge online grassroots push.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210806-2220-header&t=1&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)
If John Fetterman ever needed your support, it’s today.
**With another candidate officially competing in our primary race for U.S. Senate, we’re summoning a huge online grassroots push across the country for John before the weekend.**
We need all the help we can get, so we were looking through our finance reports when we saw your name. Here's what is on record next to your name:
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26924?refcode=em20210806-2220&t=2&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)**
---
All eyes will be on our campaign now, especially since our field of primary competitors just got bigger.
[**Will you please make a donation today? This will be the most competitive Senate race in the country, which is why your support is so impactful.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26924?refcode=em20210806-2220&t=3&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)
**[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26924?refcode=em20210806-2220&t=4&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)**
— Team Fetterman HQ
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: John Fetterman <info@johnfetterman.com>
Date: Fri, Aug 6, 2021
Subject: A new opponent
Hey, Peter — it's John. I'm coming to you with a super candid note:
**Another new competitor jumped into this race just now,** proving once again that this will be the *single most competitive* Senate race in the nation in 2022.
I sincerely believe that, no matter who's entering this race on the Democratic side, they'd be a hell of a lot better senator for Pennsylvania than Pat Toomey ever was.
But as we witness the political stalemates happening in Washington, and the lack of conviction from some senators who are _< checks notes>_ supposed to be Democrats, I am reminded how high the stakes are as we fight to expand our razor-thin, 50-50 majority.
**Peter, I'm running for U.S. Senate precisely because it'd be the honor of my lifetime to vote for bold, once-in-a-lifetime legislation that would tangibly improve the lives of millions of workers and their families.** To serve you as that 51st vote. And to fight relentlessly for the things I've *always* believed in, like defending the sacred right to vote, at least a $15 minimum wage, and legal weed.
Pennsylvania's next senator must act with conviction. They must vote like a Democrat. We have the majority, we have the presidency, we have the House, we have the Senate – so let's act like it and finally deliver the Biden agenda to the American people. We simply don't have time to play partisan games while the future of our democracy is on the line.
[**Peter, I have to respectfully ask: Will you donate your first $5 to our people-powered campaign today? If you give me your vote now, then you'll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back when I'm in Washington.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26924?refcode=em20210806-2220&t=5&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26924?refcode=em20210806-2220&t=24&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)**
Thank you for being a part of this historic campaign. Every day since we launched this campaign has been humbling, and I can't thank yinz enough.
Yours,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. Together, this incredible grassroots team is already on a historic pace to build a massive campaign for all 67 counties in Pennsylvania — _one that has what it takes to win the primary AND the general election._ I couldn't be more moved each time someone chips in, whether it's $100 or just a couple bucks. [**Would you contribute your first-ever $5 today if you're with me in this fight for all Pennsylvanians?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/26924?refcode=em20210806-2220&t=25&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210806-2220-footer&t=26&refcode2=2220_434096_ssCBy1&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2220%2E434096%2EssCBy1)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: This is about Power, not Public Safety
body:
There is no reason for another wave of mask mandates or lockdowns. Democrats want to enact tyrannical government overreach for the purpose of power, not public safety.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BbUefA76Q7AY5HddcxeQEgx1m2w0_zXagNRouc5g303aa5eLzyoVr3k-QCU3_zUCrHP_Y6OhWbV3UbRrRdIGL2hEZM8UljDQ5pSejLiJppYWI3tyB1XdAQ5LRYhe0GNrZzlPWMQqZqTnHg4mjcU08-ig9OXeNfDtPWLEopxKlzD-0jW9jc1KjQ==&c=zHmusDVX10xvwng06Pg6RkYxEqfFBtNrua_tZPjME2SxBAGBSZ5G7w==&ch=IrvHe-bEdWvtWe-O0jBybn3TkNC1KlmPuA5yd1YWJHYSZUs_qQ1G7A==)
---
| Peter,
The CDC guidelines don't match the science.
I've called on our local and state officials to fight back and BAN mask mandates.
Ohio and the rest of the country are completely fed up with the blatant power grab by Democrats at every level in the name of public safety.
We need representatives who are willing to step up and defend the rights of Ohioans who are fully capable of making their own informed decisions without government intervention.
[Will you stand with me in my call to BAN mask mandates by making a contribution of $20.22, $50, $100, or more?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BbUefA76Q7AY5HddcxeQEgx1m2w0_zXagNRouc5g303aa5eLzyoVr3k-QCU3_zUCrHP_Y6OhWbV3UbRrRdIGL2hEZM8UljDQ5pSejLiJppYWI3tyB1XdAQ5LRYhe0GNrZzlPWMQqZqTnHg4mjcU08-ig9OXeNfDtPWLEopxKlzD-0jW9jc1KjQ==&c=zHmusDVX10xvwng06Pg6RkYxEqfFBtNrua_tZPjME2SxBAGBSZ5G7w==&ch=IrvHe-bEdWvtWe-O0jBybn3TkNC1KlmPuA5yd1YWJHYSZUs_qQ1G7A==)
This campaign is about more than winning a Senate majority.
We must save our country from the Mask Mafia, cancel culture, and say NO a second round of lockdowns and mask mandates.
I am counting on patriots like you to fuel our victory.
Please consider using the links below to support our campaign and my call to BAN mask mandates!

HOW do we have people in office who are STILL supporting movements to Defund the Police? Radical-Left Socialists do **absolutely nothing** to protect their constituents.
| [**GET RID OF CORI BUSH**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=8554095accdd4cfaa742710abf0ecf5a&_e=K7R08JNYgAPPiYnYC2Uh5ogWagvh9OGmVZiFXy2RmSBheujtLN6QqoMHQSv3iBkzqRki3u12egb_1HN1dnCLPIgYYvLCg5plHS7d92a7nCTijq9hk50AXbOvEXdd5HLp5hFd5xCf4-NzMCuRpJd1ZilYbfueZj0-ZphuJcfTU_WZT419PYkvr09iCkvWN_-QCTPP0O_oNkwIByC44VZ_iJP_C4xdvDRvRUOpTNg9r1K0LJ-zB1W6wZXXRiezDBJKLnOcd2saYoYAQbk_xiNJjYBzRFUtU4XTM--ZOe2KHf6-N2i3gytPvOKVS76BEAvaB3lvy72KdeGSkp2VSa6Ol5Na64mFCs7RoyDcCzCn4UKEqwtRdxyaXZ4SoSLXFU5hX66mjuOP9Fi87oMRGP7l7IGMNvwlEHyq9avXhw8B8JHk1zQPZRaoc3SQVky1_rXHVxM9UVof9_gDRZ4BGN2rrkF3TEqIxA5Mdl5x5VLW1QlJit12Y3IeBUjlwfNcLpXP)
---

**This is disgraceful.**

Their policies are the reason people are dying and crime rates are skyrocketing. **This may be one of the most egregious and hypocritical things that I have ever seen, and it perfectly depicts the danger of the Radical-Left.**

body:
[**TAKE ACTION | Add Your Name To Support The Extended Eviction Moratorium**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33642572/299515558/251786076?emci=572b5184-6df5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTg3NTM1My0xMGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHXIo_BV92MarouYq2PgjRbpq7AJhnwG2PdFMirCk0k=)
---
Friend,
The Biden Administration recently announced a temporary ban on evictions through October 3rd.
That means Arizonans who are struggling to make ends meet during the pandemic are safe from eviction -- for now. **Because while this moratorium extension is absolutely the right thing to do to keep people in their homes and out of crowded settings, there is a chance it could end at any moment. **
Kirsten has spent this last year and a half in the State Legislature fighting for the communities who have been hit hardest by this pandemic, and she's ready to take that fight to Congress.
[**Will you help her get there and add your name to our petition supporting the extended eviction moratorium?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33642573/299515559/1537529973?emci=572b5184-6df5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTg3NTM1My0xMGY3LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHXIo_BV92MarouYq2PgjRbpq7AJhnwG2PdFMirCk0k=)

name: Tim Burchett
subject: No Passports In Biden’s America 🛂
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e59eb0d8524799876d324010988e14&_e=qY9lNZCGQSFpo7kFVdVBtCVTTwqbT-wZXNzxoPiI2r_urO-7zb647-U_r4tePickYyviysypO_s1t8dJQTCqJsYt6uoz3KmjlTNiVkzB5lG1tjCdDScPrf1mryqg9Y-ZAgqBvblRhbaW5yXkUMF1EU_l-tAXM58XNJH-lw4ovwc9IuCbfa3rtFzNAl3YHrFyPU9dVGkqKa1fLKRgim-VZ0IcOAZjFhuGiWJqLvSgsGHN0S4lQmUtNZUy9p6d9_qsY4zKYgT8nppHRYIY57Pz0vSs6ayLPqv96jngVwKRN4I%3D) | |
---
**No Passports In Biden’s America 🛂**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e59eb0d8524799876d324010988e14&_e=qY9lNZCGQSFpo7kFVdVBtPhd4pZb7ydOJSfq1dHumuGOoZ5OYIdyYBJrQuUXu3aqTpqTOzkG0z9cLGNso59Uy6BNuGRaMiaut48Ut90HL5BWDOKsZ6Drleft2Z4StKG4OrRO4kh7bHAVLSKXPcBt0YWS2XmapJgokjZ07eMb3GvVKOVXBtmLgR9xxqlA1kWfXkqPThdnNZV1Hw7pQVLqxwEVAmwm_bhK8Gf_mAZpn3m2iLLyeZq_trVAMJMKSWulzFRB7vwneIhLoPBid1asB7SNS31HjgLVGGmeiD9XQ2k%3D)
I didn’t think it was possible, but the Biden administration has somehow found a way to make the federal government work even slower than before. This time, it’s making it nearly impossible for Americans to travel because they can’t get their passports on time.

Thanks to a massive backlog at the Department of State, it can now take four to five months to get an _expedited_ passport, forcing Americans to cancel trips and keeping loved ones apart. It’s also opened the door to scammers who prey on Americans’ desperation.

I can’t just sit back and watch this happen. That’s why I introduced [the bipartisan Passport Backlog Elimination Act](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c1e59eb0d8524799876d324010988e14&_e=qY9lNZCGQSFpo7kFVdVBtPhd4pZb7ydOJSfq1dHumuGOoZ5OYIdyYBJrQuUXu3aqTpqTOzkG0z9cLGNso59Uy2gin5j2mlvYotWsebDNzYRf4HupobKrHEOzFzZ0I6jy__uxmmY77GC6H9-BkdOK_jJ_IO2ll0LkeiOztmp0psuiyeN84duUH3YlbGvkbCwlNq4DTvNCjI76waYaR8Dm5n4obol8AGQoQM0IXdaj8xYzld_ifsrFEP95xku2iF4bOamZaIfDvLCzm-ywqIcCwAxUTi-Dpq0J2wpEpznRnZc%3D), which would put pressure on the Department of State by forcing it to submit a plan for eliminating the passport application backlog. It will also require an audit of the State Department.

Instead of obsessing over woke political games, Joe Biden should focus on making sure the government does its job. Is that too much to ask?

name: Walt Blackman | Combat Vet
subject: they want to leave us defenseless...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)
|
---
Hi Peter - I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

I'm reaching out because I wanted to see if you happened to catch this exchange on _CBS_ with member of the socialist Squad, Cori Bush?

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)

**[Check out this INSANE VIDEO of Cori Bush NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)**

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)
[**WATCH THIS RADICAL HYPOCRISY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)
It's astonishing that in the same breath, Cori Bush is defending her spending on private security while advocating to defund the police across the country.

**Even worse, she advocates for strict gun control measures that would leave law-abiding citizens in her district completely defenseless against criminals. **

That reminds me of what corrupt 3rd-world leaders do: hire their own private security to protect themselves and force the people to live in lawless anarchy.

Peter, we can't allow these radicals to force this dangerous agenda on the American people, especially since they will never suffer the consequences.

**[That 's why I'm asking you to help send me to congress to DEFEAT 'Defund the Police' radicals like Cori Bush >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)
Peter, the most disturbing thing about this entire effort is that radicals like Cori Bush and the Minneapolis City Council understand that by defunding the police, **_more people in their cities will become victims_ ,** _**they embolden the criminals**_ , and _**more people are likely to be killed****. **_

**But they don 't care. **

That's why they walk around with private security and force their constituents to suffer the consequences.

**[Peter, we must defeat this dangerous hypocrisy from the Left, and I 'm calling on your support now to do it >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)**
[**Defeat the 'Defund the Police' Movement**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story?_

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag! **

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link: [https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2692980](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
[**Support My Fight for Freedom**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58089891:JXiN2elNk:m:1:3253819041:F6369EC1363210E57BD7E548A32B3DEF:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica=20Cisneros?=
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
#
I'm just getting a break from all the madness of yesterday's launch and wanted to reach out. As you know, we just officially announced our run for Congress. And, yes, you can probably guess I'm about to ask for your support, but first I hope you'll give me just a minute to explain why I'm running and why it's so important.
I was born and raised in Laredo, right on the border. My parents immigrated to Texas to give our family a better life. Even as a child growing up, I could see how D.C. lawmakers were failing to protect and serve communities like mine -- the lack of health care, low wages and high unemployment, and a badly broken immigration system. I wanted to be part of solving the problems we were facing, so I became an immigration and human rights attorney.
A couple years ago, friends and neighbors encouraged me to take a big leap of faith and run for Congress. Our district has voted for Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, and most recently Joe Biden. Most people here vote for Democrats. But for some reason, we've been represented by a congressman who acts like a Republican. Before I challenged him in last year's primary, Rep. Henry Cuellar had voted with Donald Trump 70% of the time.
Cuellar has been in Congress for 16 years. He voted for Trump's border wall twice. He's proudly anti-choice. And he was the only Democrat to vote against the PRO Act, adding another checkbox to his long standing anti-worker record. I could go on and on about the ways in which his record is completely out of step with the values of our district.
How does someone with that record get re-elected? The answer is that Rep. Cuellar is heavily bankrolled by giant corporate PACs and wealthy Republican donors who know he's a reliable vote for their interests in Congress.
Last year, we came within just a few percentage points of defeating Henry Cuellar. Despite being outspent by $700,000 and opposed by the Koch network and major corporate PACs, we nearly pulled off a massive upset.
After nearly losing to us last year and a devastating pandemic, I thought Rep. Cuellar might wake up to the problems that South Texans face. But he hasn't changed the way he votes! He's still serving his Republican corporate donors.
So, we're back to finish what we started. The good news is that we're not a first-time candidate anymore, so many voters already know us. The bad news is that Henry Cuellar has been anticipating another challenge, and he's banked more than $1.7 million for his campaign, giving him a massive fundraising head start.
That's why I'm emailing today, one day after our big launch, to ask you to make the best possible donation you can to our campaign. We lost by just a couple thousand votes last time, in large part because we were outspent by so much corporate money flooding into the district to fund misleading attack ads.
**You can make sure we don 't get outraised and outspent this time around. If everyone reading my email contributes today, I'm confident we'll have the resources we need to win. Here's your personal link to donate:**
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-email-20210806-2-mc?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=6b1a2002c5&e=ed416558ef)
The absolute last thing I want is to get to the end of this primary election and come away with regrets thinking we could have done just a little bit more to win. I know you feel the same way too.
Thank you so much for considering making a donation today. It means the world to me to have your support.
Let's finish the fight.
Jessica

Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://JessicaCisnerosForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0fbac66c1433121289a6dc6a4&id=7873097058&e=ed416558ef&c=3617479a6b). Mail us: PO Box 660, Laredo, TX 78042.

clean_body: But you and I can restore hope! | Peter, It broke my heart to read this... Americans' optimism about country's direction over next year drops nearly 20 points since May: POLL [SOURCE: ABC] Biden and Kamala’s destructive policies are crushing the American dream. As National Chair of Eric Greitens’ MUST-WIN U.S. Senate campaign, I’ve decided to commission a survey to hear what Americans like YOU think. Throughout history, America has always stood tall as a beacon of hope. So, to hear that a majority of Americans have lost hope in our country’s future is truly heartbreaking. Here are the top issues that are causing Biden and Kamala’s approval numbers to PLUMMET: Crime Inflation Border crisis A fear of COVID lockdowns By replacing Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority with a pro-Trump majority filled with fighters like Eric Greitens, we can reverse the downward trend of America and restore hope for our nation. But to succeed in our mission, I’ll need YOU to tell me where voters like you stand on these pressing issues. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Jane continued her America First, grassroots campaign this week, making stops throughout the state and bringing her message directly to Ohioans. We had some exciting updates on the trail, and I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Gov. Kristi Noem Endorses Jane Timken** South Dakota Governor and America First champion Kristi Noem endorsed Jane this week, calling her "**a leader with grit, perseverance, and integrity.** " Fox News [reported](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_wXcHqGcwZIUanE-dE1-wzYEIrO7TgcuRM_4QGwU6BihFbxaZCOJ6aONLHMNrZBFnpoLmYsXVV9BAP5pg9xCoTih3KgOIDHU42biVi8GZISeui9Lu-iehdWkDyTV70A9Pps0ckhZkjCQ8vo0_ZK6-6a6Fc26c7nzwAkROU25QqBmMDMt0Hpr4Su9SsyS9jcKTWizpODfR_9c160IkSLJ2LPx3ShLsMdBmOzlqroZDbAwhTqWBfaieHfkI56SY02YrOXdYism-y7mMzqeENhXlsiAnpOIiBqgcDMdWMGjnvthrXd-Rc-kWzePaA6iUl5wOQ5L6cCMFe1SkG_VLcYj7KU%3D) on the endorsement: _"Trump ally takes sides in one of most competitive Republican Senate primaries in country"_ _"I am proud to endorse Jane Timken for the United States Senate. I saw firsthand Jane's leadership skills when she served as the first female Chairman of the Ohio Republican Party (ORP) and delivered the State of Ohio for President Trump by substantial margins in 2020," Noem said in a statement Tuesday that was shared first with Fox News. "**Jane is a trailblazer who fights to keep Ohio red and she has never backed down from a fight.** I am confident that Jane Timken will be a leader with grit, perseverance, and integrity, exactly what is needed to fight for Ohio values in Washington, DC.” _ [Read the full piece here.](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_wXcHqGcwZIUanE-dE1-wzYEIrO7TgcuRM_4QGwU6BihFbxaZCOJ6aONLHMNrZBFnpoLmYsXVV9BAP5pg9xCoTih3KgOIDHU42biVi8GZISeFuPdmjy02OoHNGU4XZYFKiirpaIFUu55urZ1fGWwKxUuznFQpeBqZN-IdDBUOYVCR4LmmIuJdAMegIWTU-obxMvTPg6PX0KwTv6SAsFlMOvfkSBFpibqU_kWhGuAid1u2SntQ1oW9snJczF3c5AGUJxYwcmSNhgBFVkQrWjT5ufrOMAu3Q-GZKpJZ4Uvn_IzSSzf3gYGqGeS3o2oFpNfT1cy9Z5235muY2IiTMeQoPE%3D) **From the Trail** Jane was glad to join the Eastside GOP Club and Councilman Jim Trakas in Cuyahoga County for a lively discussion on Ohio's future. Jane was proud to share her vision of fighting for strong, conservative principles with Northeast Ohioans. In [an interview](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_0FHTqTaogP4WvRjDbfYnDCZHdoFzDd8ydHje_HzGh_RAobHInYwmGOj1Nsvlgd7LDDO8aEFgveufZpHpfRc1LqJ6UH1T68vVhFwININic4ORor1QEpeypAOEKgLSjAHsDyIiO5R5vZ4Z8hSP-2rVqNoYSlPj1a71eohsPeQS9ELo-UbwB1el6BdEd0IDqjZZW-892z5c3y64SSmYT-5hePCftZXHyy9jJpchT95iN0vjiRc_M1xsZaJNTDWKVb8Trx91iMDz74qPgmzDC5Oni-ua2l89X-Dwy8ex_qP5h2Verd0hpfYpNHfdTde_2Tfrqb82TatrzkJmRxfuYRFwQiZONTyEnI371ES-c889a_q1HWYSFZUIZQ_WgpcxszHYw%3D%3D) with Sinclair's "The National Desk," Jane shared why the America First agenda worked for Ohio, and why she is the best candidate to continue those winning policies: _“I've been in the trenches fighting for that agenda, for secure borders, energy independence, lower taxes, and fiscally conservative policies and that's what I'm going to take to the United States Senate,” said Timken._ [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_5Da2-G1BA1SLhNpHqGppUqJ9iOXxbLVZbxGieTDxDlDF-DpkTs9pPh_NO1ExbgdiZRBFP77xIGJsJ3huB1GYQg2VcdFXNV426P0iZc9sMzN8bH3sO53Oeblit-HLDccMAf4ma73u3GMiI3BimUzzlDvdRKRIRET3a3UoYMHkyq7yoBy_YrnI-35jtQ5GZSNYUsYVkn0-yJIu-OUCtaKgQgtniNBbMY1Hg4xnGwDpj9mNEGFde5jkBUjVVcT_HZlwb3xuKn4lk89H525hFy2BuBfglZKniHFk9PmaJ581Qgv) [You can watch the whole interview here.](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_0FHTqTaogP4WvRjDbfYnDCZHdoFzDd8ydHje_HzGh_RAobHInYwmGOj1Nsvlgd7LDDO8aEFgveufZpHpfRc1LqJ6UH1T68vVhFwININic4ORor1QEpeypAOEKgLSjAHsDyIiO5R5vZ4Z8hSP-2rVqNoYSlPj1a71eohsPeQS9ELvelvI9pLM2VXty5lTp01u-PlHZWSCh0CMMPssCPFtbDIplEeVcWDcRp8olmGkixNx58NQ_z_XjHKTemzg4Xzk1oqm-M6eoOD1Hofsqm2WiWWRIQY3RcwvqYopKypBzjp5JPjYhgRpiMTWZxX80PonC1nwQBzJsqQauRV1Yzc-uKQrUGPMytTF9hLI0u20v5pnjmlQQP_RDeOpwgPOgnDLA%3D%3D) Jane continued to stand up for our kids against leftist government overreach and speak out against the new wave of mask and vaccine mandates coming from the federal government and across Ohio. Jane's message is simple and one of individual liberty - mandates don't work and the government and politicians should not be in the business of telling individuals what to do with their personal medical decisions. Especially our children, who should be back in school, fully in person, with no mask mandates. These decisions should be left up to families and their medical professionals. Take a listen to this important issue as Jane joined Columbus 610 WTVN [The Mark Blazor Show](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_zJEPR0VZG-RJ2Uh4rxIGaHiNsUyEciVwvaKzoGRYAGrZNMg9jbv6Bxv5fViZ7KS0uV99FqcKBA3EWe9Lf3mUA0ARrW31AMPT8Vh8NT7KKtIN1zSwIL2_nCJfjVv2jpSB3qVj2qC2B27gFvC1MO4cWPg6FO2cYMNL4xdvbKJ7RTAP-Nfizwde0xKgPUlIrViY_WuFSvgp9binzt7Cpk_hcLK7wxh1XXCkHKXTGXjhkerrPYYmaKLjzj2s2IqHcdPFfeSFWUK36Zq1B9uuWrmg3s%3D) to discuss more. **Timken: The Grassroots' Choice for Ohio** In addition to Gov. Noem's endorsement, this week, Jane surpassed [over 150 endorsements](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl__L1bNkMu1aSCrGUoJUt7YFVMzzAInBNyGuXbX7cD_gplFPc136tvxnyuLcBQmyXEVJfHx8CLWHR8djREr04_wnaXyvY7NrLoL-2phgRxYbFdHFZn38_l550m_gv9235aYmaBfVhHTCo9RwzspMbFQZLjDRt9cEsJVCgeV_AIQ9VyywCflUSSELuW31OvjEtdToWMzWZH5PisKPmb5AKS3jxxT5W1PNnmO_2ylZowHEBKhns5KPK61nXztstBFULIogAq-R0EBSLxobFj_TpA0LjoXeZGcB_v89K6FYx-DKfe_IC-lvjXaTgZf6KWDOoCvzvpaV-oL1JYxDaIqcdGWUn1yqUBUZCxI-7-HU2T6xAX5kZ9yriWGEScjLH0utA1g%3D%3D) from Ohio conservatives across the state. This consolidation of support this early in the race and in a crowded primary field speaks to Jane's trusted leadership and the relationships she has built over the years as a conservative disrupter and Party unifier. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_5Da2-G1BA1SLhNpHqGppUqJ9iOXxbLVZbxGieTDxDlDF-DpkTs9pPh_NO1ExbgdiZRBFP77xIGJsJ3huB1GYQhJNpuMEE-E_BHmlzyQyGDkfDxf996NxGFSMDBYPjqqoo47e03Gzb15xbjFb8U9xeoeoRehes9VYXuEUyXOWQqGZo0ieHY0FDP8AN6WPrbkCf6b7zuwtf5zlKPBt1wd_cEcR8HmNtaWMwAoGLzvcuJKZLYgxJWMDP0bpARdokdkHfBXBcvrQXfvmTe6nkaIc_O1GfwbZd7BFrGurFgiX1TM) In order to win statewide races, you need to be a candidate of addition - not subtraction. Jane is proud to be bringing new people into her team weekly as her America First vision and record of fighting for conservative principles resonates across the state. We are focused every day on building an army of grassroots supporters that will help Jane win this U.S. Senate race - in May and November. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_t=32Q9PEWmedweI2Q7mgsIgLa-QosV6WJgPJ9GD1nvcWNFDgXuajs4qhjjneE6t2HG3Wj_IlzrzBkOMaIfK3A5pb_q6Isd-rJKXIDFJQQBqcweZygaUZDm2LwvWrLCpzmeYDnyOk5DksJK4zX6khVYOVZVRe-7TOaxljSrvikvkYs%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=yY9Qjin77VJSglIlm3cl_6cDrL6mcehuxI_DBgrmKS5qbGXmd0Mi1aEmX4gMTs4xvtRpA7jJImO7z_4FkYG2Tqa3npkhwQhKO62-LJomiDpR7MCbhNVhBsOzbZl87IIslOWjCUyFxU_vBU7BvWg6S7kszyCZwJOliQXmNKE26e7wweQKhhVszjw2by7smHzO5qzzw2KdmW31F2pH6QwHsWa7KqJiO1VeL5ducx1Rc1vtnsleQoAYjlDHpAE5LuFy6P3wVZe8A_JytJ1lEx82fNswrshDmEFC3bwWeyYjL80%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=221650ae94cd4c5ba3287b1c0b2b50e0&_e=rWaDIlBAtrUDJ820Nw6t0Z5cTkCUPUrPdUMAU9V-odXV7G1NgDAnQnzFxMhCSUdmTHrJNhaLaI1NZRIwutcYoS8SKcVikMMIPLMBUf8EzJT4TQTpg-Nu5o377aEH4B8HIxcHzZEfEJ5gZVvNC9JWLeVQa4hczGc3aMoSC2UydfGTgMGbA5KeQnHWvnhu1xBcd7qWEWfUERqTIPil10NElHl4M-ea0piY6LIsKv0RfUR_a5fC9D63Upn_hTJVhAp7nj2W-fH6pR0hztVjPIr5Ww%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7514406fdd1e485ba42fc5ed2f47aea2&_e=6KV7FQMNCB7tnZGhYk-Yla39ulHICxNIE0bboF5oTsm1fz0OK86_pJdVOCm06jxfzFRNvsALZZ9kOXDnicj1MgdUUmVkFQsPPZEdRmMBR3v6prCINkQ7ujNAB-DAzIZFd7X7JFogU9f16oDsphMtL5aKi3eZ3b0MsHqJXHx2YzF3_9W74AP2uHUXhrvOKSN8oXAye5yrBa1JBaVJVeMqaUgo4gg8UgVYcrTQqIiLxgkmYY0gyHYaBhZeQP4HsieCtmZWzqFYCmmieXQW9AwFEtOb4M3ENVTpcsN1fXDJT9ZHfkyfEFXAwroDBgD3MSaLvKheRQUGWPR7C8bXSouNr4_ikzLUgZOk9DjPHT33XUyD2AKcI3AZuaVslOgSWq-VJeV_aawRLwlZWPlzaGMyNod1Z03i7_J7yctct25MEKdJxq9gXS4qUaW3Rd4oxHn_9pRuqEsWQq_4ec-InSK1P6TYF3LBYrSQxLXABU1ulpXESCIbKeZfS0TK7bap1_CUhwZJAJrwot6s7uYcPYX47g%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7514406fdd1e485ba42fc5ed2f47aea2&_e=6KV7FQMNCB7tnZGhYk-Yla39ulHICxNIE0bboF5oTsm1fz0OK86_pJdVOCm06jxfzFRNvsALZZ9kOXDnicj1MgdUUmVkFQsPPZEdRmMBR3v6prCINkQ7ujNAB-DAzIZFd7X7JFogU9f16oDsphMtL5aKi3eZ3b0MsHqJXHx2YzF3_9W74AP2uHUXhrvOKSN8oXAye5yrBa1JBaVJVeMqaUgo4gg8UgVYcrTQqIiLxgkmYY0gyHYaBhZeQP4HsieCtmZWzqFYCmmieXQW9AwFEtOb4M3ENVTpcsN1fXDJT9ZHfkyfEFXAwroDBgD3MSaLUpP3mqZeLanTFafme7xwdTadw-LwO-g2OUrPTlkydN2hJkoKe4P21m2DRNNuGw9rSEebauD86OuPBBTgO0iTpHfMGsV76E0Kxzcei5wtias_qkcxgIebJMBr8Fzvf4WC8dC6AYNpIo0F4m3f18nFy8ihVhzI451YAYO1pGVZiyPg9qWKN7ACla6mDrsgAo6LRywUH8TWOwPndXDGBvY9dA%3D%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have TEN days until August 15th and so far have collected just 45,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,500 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7514406fdd1e485ba42fc5ed2f47aea2&_e=6KV7FQMNCB7tnZGhYk-Yla39ulHICxNIE0bboF5oTsm1fz0OK86_pJdVOCm06jxfzFRNvsALZZ9kOXDnicj1MgdUUmVkFQsPPZEdRmMBR3v6prCINkQ7ujNAB-DAzIZFd7X7JFogU9f16oDsphMtL5aKi3eZ3b0MsHqJXHx2YzF3_9W74AP2uHUXhrvOKSN8oXAye5yrBa1JBaVJVeMqaUgo4gg8UgVYcrTQqIiLxgkmYY0gyHYaBhZeQP4HsieCtmZWzqFYCmmieXQW9AwFEtOb4M3ENVTpcsN1fXDJT9ZHfkyfEFXAwroDBgD3MSaLvBmpbX_cET5o0D6nPWIjFKj1uDIZZmTVU_XUyWYJYnjG3t3yoLcKb1DYMmznhz2pYA_AMGOWjh-yfRLkkwz_aUgixQCZu-H4ArmKeu1yPZ4poX-Oj09haEL0bMw4fX4bxlqlaZHf-tKiY8ZfraCJhaezeKOflwZbltrkiOSpN9BF9hbQDk0BbLn5KVVkMO-DGsDoQrKHfccUlXPL_qMh4Q%3D%3D)**.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

**I’m taking over the Team Kelly email to send you all a special message!**

clean_body: | | | | And I need YOUR help! Friend, I’m taking over the Team Kelly email to send you all a special message! When my father endorsed Kelly earlier this year I was so excited. There’s finally a STRONG CONSERVATIVE running to take out Lisa Murkowski and her name is Kelly Tshibaka. I don’t have to tell you how important this election is. This is our opportunity to ensure Alaska has an actual Conservative representing them in the US Senate and not a swampy DC Insider like Lisa Murkowski. Kelly Tshibaka is the real deal. She’s Pro-Life, Pro-Gun, and an America First Conservative. Kelly is exactly the type of leadership that Alaska deserves and our country desperately NEEDS! Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. | | | | ==

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek**,**
**
**This past week the NHGOP had the honor of hosting GOP Chairman Ronna McDaniel in the Granite State. Thanks to the hospitality of our NHGOP Vice Chair Pam Tucker, Republican women from across the state had the opportunity to gather together and learn useful skills towards electing future Republican leaders. Later that evening, we held a successful private fundraiser in the Lakes Region where Chairman McDaniel shared further details on engaging NH voters to encourage successful elections. It was fantastic to have Chairman McDaniel visit with us, representing the importance of New Hampshire as a state, as well as the assured support by the national party.****

****Speaking of election importance, Bedford’s special election is a little over a month away and it is crucial we all find ways to support candidate Linda Camarota. If you live around the Bedford area, please join the NHGOP in our Super Saturday event! Beginning at 9:30am, there will be a meet and greet at Simply Delicious before volunteers are organized to get out and speak with voters. See more in the graphic below!**

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **
