| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

body:
What you’ve missed!
| | **Did you miss what was said this week? Here 's the latest:** **President Donald Trump** just announced his **next major rally** for August 21 at York Family Farms in Cullman, Alabama. The rally agenda includes **live music, special guest speakers, and a celebration of faith, freedom, and America.**
---

Nationwide, cities that adopted anti-police or "defund the police" policies are **struggling to retain and hire new police officers** amid rising crime rates. One in particular is Portland, Oregon whose mayor last year **vowed to "defund the police."**

Media outlets are being accused by many of **not taking the theory that COVID-19 had escaped from a Chinese lab seriously enough last year** , some had even gone as far as calling it a "conspiracy theory." However, now many outlets are backtracking and **reintroducing the idea** , citing "new evidence."

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b0bdc38007934a358ae08e619b3c28ee&_e=9XxoxzVBKJD4zjp23PqkEE3HjpsY7ww8CTzdfyh5pWKU-siKvJInaJbQ-Uq9-2hxu9di557ymK2lpnwRy3PZ5u_jAqJ2gSVGWK9xvyXji2tLXqyY4BBIkpQ3FXIuRk0kWUpjiVS7UW-gacFAMe9jwntwM0KF_06guzezzNqIG3Ct6YFyTXxyyRgstMMP8wSm1_TEm88ZsZ4seKbNhI8K8UNC2-OBf-cbTIOH2FSPf6vhb0g8H_8bN2ek7-gc9i1oFcTigoz_5G80WR9-v_Uv5XgTcrCX3_tvlxqjA-l18TAjl128qt-WsTmsLVC5BCOm2MyWZnutfebuCjnLtRoRmIsODHPskFSC5I2y4JWICGVuo5cWySobgMVbiKGbEgPdfLgRzQq_5wOnd7yZkOx35_P-PGdqddSVxytYyEpMKY_GCEDQ406FrD9ppKTohaBZP1Reo0bQ5m2D5LdGfZzD65aKt81k7yWlHQOprRh-ufA5KmolyIAIb3poaCgvoZE-JRnHwZX6IbYoYoXERSaovQ%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I’ve set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b0bdc38007934a358ae08e619b3c28ee&_e=9XxoxzVBKJD4zjp23PqkEE3HjpsY7ww8CTzdfyh5pWKU-siKvJInaJbQ-Uq9-2hxu9di557ymK2lpnwRy3PZ5u_jAqJ2gSVGWK9xvyXji2tLXqyY4BBIkpQ3FXIuRk0kWUpjiVS7UW-gacFAMe9jwntwM0KF_06guzezzNqIG3Ct6YFyTXxyyRgstMMP8wSm1_TEm88ZsZ4seKbNhI8K8UNC2-OBf-cbTIOH2FSPf6vhb0g8H_8bN2ek7-gc9i1oFcTigoz_5G80WR9-v_Uv5XgTcrCX3_tvlxqjA-l18TAjl128qt-WsTmsLVC5BCOmdBPwwwUYJznoxsxtrOberbs-DWscydKH0-iEdUZUzxoBeUu9pIZjZx5iNjSodzE64DhbvHoBAzj5z_cHiQ4wAazvTmbTpcFqICGvzp1I2udUtv6f2jvU-a_DWuR5mF7tKF9bKgjvI7i7jFePhLDdTuT8x_BvpRbupa2Tem4CRJzuaP2w04_G0Qg_qLySMrO2Cu_DCsL5FPOL-FdDbQCwNg%3D%3D) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have TEN days until August 15th and so far have collected just 45,000 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,500 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b0bdc38007934a358ae08e619b3c28ee&_e=9XxoxzVBKJD4zjp23PqkEE3HjpsY7ww8CTzdfyh5pWKU-siKvJInaJbQ-Uq9-2hxu9di557ymK2lpnwRy3PZ5u_jAqJ2gSVGWK9xvyXji2tLXqyY4BBIkpQ3FXIuRk0kWUpjiVS7UW-gacFAMe9jwntwM0KF_06guzezzNqIG3Ct6YFyTXxyyRgstMMP8wSm1_TEm88ZsZ4seKbNhI8K8UNC2-OBf-cbTIOH2FSPf6vhb0g8H_8bN2ek7-gc9i1oFcTigoz_5G80WR9-v_Uv5XgTcrCX3_tvlxqjA-l18TAjl128qt-WsTmsLVC5BCOmqA1gi_t0vM2ldLfPxOq4dG5WXbMlieDU9_1IzAC72LEf5IlICMWBj4SlVtBz1szz-4BnTiCaSaFoxrBiXtHlDONUMMv5Gw8RShoT3rLD6pp5utLGrAsPNP1g-tqVYDU0K8gF6C4MX6Zh2jNzq52pKEhNjBtJhhJFFtCUJfm3VsNLsJBM88_ZuAV_DNJtV5E9OPHt0xb3UHfknswXf5XBpQ%3D%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b0bdc38007934a358ae08e619b3c28ee&_e=9XxoxzVBKJD4zjp23PqkEE3HjpsY7ww8CTzdfyh5pWKU-siKvJInaJbQ-Uq9-2hxu9di557ymK2lpnwRy3PZ5u_jAqJ2gSVGWK9xvyXji2tLXqyY4BBIkpQ3FXIuRk0kWUpjiVS7UW-gacFAMe9jwntwM0KF_06guzezzNqIG3Ct6YFyTXxyyRgstMMP8wSm1_TEm88ZsZ4seKbNhI8K8UNC2-OBf-cbTIOH2FSPf6vhb0g8H_8bN2ek7-gc9i1oFcTigoz_5G80WR9-v_Uv5XgTcrCX3_tvlxqjA-l18TAjl128qt-WsTmsLVC5BCOmgutXDxRO0K9lsdXC9rTKJjRQ9lOYJPSOz6BX3mdrvX07WDtEyQaDBEV57k9zvubFL3-Q8gQ81qVBjyO9FZWVFJeukLwbHBkyQm6sdgIKyCTSekbfRQqUBTCLBXUwg4-bHJeMQ91fYnZWYj5c9mVd-n7f-y9bh7sGz1zXEKQo1F0oPjTZPSVlP1pcVhnXPPH525_66lLaBsEXl6VAftu7RQ%3D%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b0bdc38007934a358ae08e619b3c28ee&_e=9XxoxzVBKJD4zjp23PqkEE3HjpsY7ww8CTzdfyh5pWKU-siKvJInaJbQ-Uq9-2hxu9di557ymK2lpnwRy3PZ5u_jAqJ2gSVGWK9xvyXji2tLXqyY4BBIkpQ3FXIuRk0kWUpjiVS7UW-gacFAMe9jwntwM0KF_06guzezzNqIG3Ct6YFyTXxyyRgstMMP8wSm1_TEm88ZsZ4seKbNhI8K8UNC2-OBf-cbTIOH2FSPf6vhb0g8H_8bN2ek7-gc9i1oFcTigoz_5G80WR9-v_Uv5XgTcrCX3_tvlxqjA-l18TAjl128qt-WsTmsLVC5BCOm6WMs-ZM1rh8Osxc6dUJ2KNQNDxDvAnH8K5bqyb8jfD_fASQtPq0LBqvGNk3zoD2winpacA0F68yztLigXBkN00YL--Eaik-vetGeN5X8_psDZrxJaeLrTaHvrZozc2_3y23F6wE-B1ZClLjBY2JMrpQWW9s25d4DQMZCu7NfuMsSfbLsw3vjdyED-ZgO0ot1G65R3rEIS8ZZ0pqPmhcVZQ%3D%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b0bdc38007934a358ae08e619b3c28ee&_e=9XxoxzVBKJD4zjp23PqkEE3HjpsY7ww8CTzdfyh5pWKU-siKvJInaJbQ-Uq9-2hxu9di557ymK2lpnwRy3PZ5u_jAqJ2gSVGWK9xvyXji2tLXqyY4BBIkpQ3FXIuRk0kWUpjiVS7UW-gacFAMe9jwntwM0KF_06guzezzNqIG3Ct6YFyTXxyyRgstMMP8wSm1_TEm88ZsZ4seKbNhI8K8UNC2-OBf-cbTIOH2FSPf6vhb0g8H_8bN2ek7-gc9i1oFcTigoz_5G80WR9-v_Uv5XgTcrCX3_tvlxqjA-l18TAjl128qt-WsTmsLVC5BCOmPkGPuiA8_Z58taCNZu_2r5IIbXk20xEGRD_OYogdDzmeoOCvptv5OwOZSmFr4WzVLw4qtOQwiPV7d8StDybIdqHTw7NBZFjB8NhM3zG6nY-j72b-FrBx3ZnM5TGNy6osFXfj0NFimVaHbGteRv72l1sKo0yyiYMLrmaKTnHOzEZMfrXx0Xyi_R_Ox3QQ5iQiNAQaUSZWuHCAEMzHfXEGSA%3D%3D)

subject: I took the Pledge
body:
Will you? |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club
Friend,

As Virginia's FIRST Congressional Candidate to sign the ‘1776 Pledge’, I am putting my foot down and drawing the line for our children's education.

The 1776 Pledge was founded in response to Critical Race Theory. As Biden and the Teachers Unions force Critical Race Theory on our children, I wanted to FIGHT BACK against it.

By taking the Pledge, here’s how we fight back:
* Restore honest, patriotic education that cultivates in our children a profound love for our country.
* Promote a curriculum that teaches that all children are created equal, have equal moral value under God, our Constitution, and the law, and are members of a national community united by our founding principles.
* Prohibit any curriculum that pits students against one another on the basis of race or sex.
* Prevent schools from politicizing education by prohibiting any curriculum that requires students to protest and lobby during or after school.

And now I want YOU to take the pledge, Friend.

Please make a contribution of $17.76 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show your support of the 1776 Pledge. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

🇺🇸 CONTRIBUTE $17.76 🇺🇸 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE $20 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE $50 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE $100 (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

This pledge has been signed by over 150 candidates and government officials, including Governor Krisit Noem and Glen Youngkin.

Our children should be taught how to think, not what to think, and they certainly should not be taught to judge one another on the basis of skin color or any other external feature.

So please, step up and make a contribution of $17.76 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show your support and where you stand. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

Today marks the anniversary of the Voting Rights Amendment, the historic legislation that prohibited racial discrimination in voting. However, over the past 56 years we have seen crucial parts of this legislation be stripped away piece by piece.

Susan is working alongside her Democratic colleagues to protect voting rights, but this is work that can only be accomplished with a Democratic majority in Congress. And the experts agree: if we’re going to keep the House blue, we have to keep Susan’s seat.

body:
For House Republicans, their path back to power could rest on the backs of GOP women like Lisa Scheller, the head of a manufacturing company in Penns **🚨Lisa in the News!🚨** [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=adbfab49ae02462fbde29fd04501beca&_e=pYSOF26PxnDApezeFytnO1kmPplzJPr2WG8cTRtxgMtMd2wdJkWDOVa4AKYQ3sLh2CPxTRzZLpurJSX4A86RJWeRwLGiR_rI3TPeSCklgLUoUJEvjyd-dXb8m7PKzCgzexL-uBXZY2CgKh-KLpveqikHoBQ_wG6F-y_0uMbFFburdxHqAyPjat_cInTKLg1BnS-Efe1xYhgnMAxsCZpnIAjM7BDBcYLLWoDHLICg38tgg19JvPYDCwB2Qru7srtHHeO0fuCot3xIGfoeAzc1LrDqvfwOmbvr-z7i9ZCe2wzuO57ZY9fEha2S5PI43yBp_sntudgkAmGaw21YQFHO7Q%3D%3D) **Earlier today,[Lisa was featured in an article](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=adbfab49ae02462fbde29fd04501beca&_e=pYSOF26PxnDApezeFytnO1kmPplzJPr2WG8cTRtxgMtMd2wdJkWDOVa4AKYQ3sLh2CPxTRzZLpurJSX4A86RJWeRwLGiR_rI3TPeSCklgLUoUJEvjyd-dXb8m7PKzCgzLnK4uJNaQ3X0skKhRduJtOwIGAd7C78LlrltWxERQv4YQrEfDadZ5SbtVrCJYCNfbu-B0v4D0zyndET6loUjzdz7PCUjvYS8VuDhMeQOoBpqj8gCP7BJADbZQXet9OfdQDOjesaJovY6gnEzMKZc8LE6Bdb72V_ZcCmkFBNDJI0B3A93Hk55nyJob7dw5upMP5ZfUZNtsqdpic-dlNpX6g%3D%3D) highlighting that the path for Republicans to take back the House Majority is through strong female recruits like Lisa! Check out an excerpt from the article below!** | |
---

_**"We have to build off that success: GOP hopes women lead the party back to House majority"**_

"For House Republicans, their path back to power could rest on the backs of GOP women.

What has emerged among party leaders, operatives and outside groups is a two-pronged approach: retain their current Republican women in critical swing seats and recruit additional strong female candidates to run in key battleground districts that they hope to flip next year.

And so far, there are signs of that strategy bearing out: A record-breaking number of Republican women have already filed to run for office, while some of the GOP's top fundraisers this year have been freshmen Republican women.

GOP operatives point to several top recruits with sparkling resumes whom they think could have a strong shot at flipping seats currently held by Democrats. That includes Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a small business owner in Texas' Rio Grande Valley; Jen Kiggans, a former Navy pilot and nurse practitioner and state lawmaker in Virginia; **Lisa Scheller, the head of a manufacturing company in Pennsylvania** ; Amanda Adkins, the former chairwoman of the Kansas Republican Party; Esther Joy King, an Army lawyer from the Quad Cities in Illinois; and Meagan Hanson, a former state legislator in the Atlanta suburbs."
|

](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs23mK~)

name: Team Scheller
subject: 🚨Lisa in the News!🚨

body:
For House Republicans, their path back to power could rest on the backs of GOP women like Lisa Scheller, the head of a manufacturing company in Penns **🚨Lisa in the News!🚨** [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=45df23b551b34c76b122a4395bf0a065&_e=Hht5ngFlQQXjl83ERXQHrcvD-8t67tG4sYyYc88AaGK8DPlVhA7IWEb5Zhj7MrFjNI9FzQAxi1oRmfrxI-v4VN7e9cfEXnIAQgfL1QB9H-A-EfxYk18oA2GbrI_usSHE9cwPnGhPDGD53DJn7hQ4LxZQyVcUqfhuynU0M4kFJC6NWX3Sg3ruQR-NUQvSSQ2GnV_7FSSLeqLd9cV8qj4u2pAHKJji8glvOW1XczDRZCqunjQ1A0sfOveymDHJ6SRTJCwttKzBFUU_bGAqCm0q6WS5xh09txKhhtRRw5mSCVWsQjLggnGjSER8R4lj8SEruwbBQd6AY5zmI4WNRyicIw%3D%3D) **Earlier today,[Lisa was featured in an article](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=45df23b551b34c76b122a4395bf0a065&_e=Hht5ngFlQQXjl83ERXQHrcvD-8t67tG4sYyYc88AaGK8DPlVhA7IWEb5Zhj7MrFjNI9FzQAxi1oRmfrxI-v4VN7e9cfEXnIAQgfL1QB9H-A-EfxYk18oA2GbrI_usSHEHpI6bOZ_0e10ewctQ4ixgIjRKXWbgUK-3uYNmZROXG-BrvGpa2O2qmy-aRMNdNES-tNCVyJphJb9ZZov2tEnIM8TXZXkXqpbeUJBYd0Wnao67au2fS_aENSR5GLYQWmD-Zrk2pwhikn_1qTy6cbG7R9DTJgeoKd_3yWrIE4GgxWO-weQ8h4WjUX6RH4ip6FSEgBl5JzIKZikQNyboF6oVQ%3D%3D) highlighting that the path for Republicans to take back the House Majority is through strong female recruits like Lisa! Check out an excerpt from the article below!** | |
---

_**We have to build off that success: GOP hopes women lead the party back to House majority**_

"For House Republicans, their path back to power could rest on the backs of GOP women.

What has emerged among party leaders, operatives and outside groups is a two-pronged approach: retain their current Republican women in critical swing seats and recruit additional strong female candidates to run in key battleground districts that they hope to flip next year.

And so far, there are signs of that strategy bearing out: A record-breaking number of Republican women have already filed to run for office, while some of the GOP's top fundraisers this year have been freshmen Republican women.

GOP operatives point to several top recruits with sparkling resumes whom they think could have a strong shot at flipping seats currently held by Democrats. That includes Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a small business owner in Texas' Rio Grande Valley; Jen Kiggans, a former Navy pilot and nurse practitioner and state lawmaker in Virginia; **Lisa Scheller, the head of a manufacturing company in Pennsylvania** ; Amanda Adkins, the former chairwoman of the Kansas Republican Party; Esther Joy King, an Army lawyer from the Quad Cities in Illinois; and Megan Hanson, a former state legislator in the Atlanta suburbs."
|
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: this race will decide Senate control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84sPDEPe-vgn97k8JzVfFmyFxxR6GppsztAfZUkaPFJSBsYKuYFnlFh12t2byACBj_Z8CvPLp2uvWxGlZfHtxAxcCTcuArNCKHvSgJMyd8cL7o-iXVg3nL88afzNcf8ZYNL84eBgSD202rw6ka_HMoY5PJg5XZrZzWX7ByxarZOd4P9vNU9iC4oU6IK8Cd672_zTho0K2_V7jPlLNLc-Twlus45BG-1u5L0w1r8XLMAegIm_qMRQV1g_W-v-ouwRi41ctt-O2SR3RSdFNQgjSjwziDmF33d9-r5EKmE39_oEc/3e8/s066OoL0Qe6FJZAeCzPV1g/h0/fTJrMLpY9KqpURXtmQqChb2E0giJh3fy7QnHAKBkUjQ)
Derek,

I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrat up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record.

Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority _hinge_ on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.**

**So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84h0HW9SYPUdZWqHmywjhVUWUk_CmHLvpGeotdSmy4cHjSLcoHLLHApatY_ucnglZA-rqDJc9j-3W6NU9AspDy84t_EBuqSQXXnLomJcZyv2r0A1o4Ithe39fN2bDuQATjeb8KUYyg2ZLdxKnSQ5H9J3B2o3AZYuGpHMXTK-X2A3-vqj3OzG77p8nKjEG5AikKsrNFinany8KmmEZIynTDgOGrLMgpSGfqUPZrLuIUwooLwjyNeGXSsMq820GlXVcPAXh-Xxl9o0fGr0OwauJKHlzD-rHkehGxMGX_X_iy9Zy0TwOcAIs3nuhek4iWusN-A/3e8/s066OoL0Qe6FJZAeCzPV1g/h1/C4unUP03cUyUCy_4HJAIc5Kzz36GVk8Ma31_ZPNwrQ8)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84h0HW9SYPUdZWqHmywjhVUWUk_CmHLvpGeotdSmy4cHj6U-FqvUIVGsqXx-iBS-2pKdZ1bt24yXFcY3JYepVwALP24ekTnIA06Uhbk88_Eq7g0YalsllNuuYTdgUGXSUf3ad8vT3NTZaMQnQ9Ibc-jRuz1ZFnZvZV_nFgcSO-LFbU0IYnNEGToktqYt4ARreZtJz3vD70fA7RzMDiRoDf0F6JuZu3CEe1QZAnAu1-g59MRXv3M_RqbhPnGXZIW4Qp3ecJ1arH9X8v0wWnNtWz9ruZ5cS6KEUPglp-fCEFGnLOgYiif4faKHE8bh9yfZ9bg/3e8/s066OoL0Qe6FJZAeCzPV1g/h2/FCX5FAEK28akJ8iLegsYYCl7ea76K8kMy9TdcMyTc4s)

clean_body: | | | Derek, I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrat up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at POLITICO say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal. So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there: As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat. That's why we have to fight back now – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, Derek. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late: I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Tom Fitton
subject: NEW: Ashli Babbitt Shooting Emails Released!
body:
Emails Show Fetal Organ “Chop Shop”

[INSIDE JW]

New Documents Reveal the DC Office of the Chief Medical Examiner
Submitted a Request to Cremate Ashli Babbitt Two Days after Gaining
Custody of Her Body

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25538&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9UUlFnUnZrRE1CRT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]

Judicial Watch just received the first public documents about the
shooting death of Ashli Babbitt.

We obtained 1160 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25505&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical
Examiner (OCME) that document new details of the investigation of the
homicide of the Air Force veteran and San Diego native. These new
documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for permission to
cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of her body and
that, due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s case, Deputy
Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a secure
electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s
records.

Additionally, Babbitt’s fingerprints were emailed to a person
supposedly working for the DC government, which resulted in Microsoft
“undeliverable” messages written in Chinese characters being
returned.

Babbitt was shot and killed by an unidentified law enforcement officer
as she attempted to climb through a broken interior window in the
Capitol Building, located outside the Speaker’s Lobby off the House
Floor during the January 6 disturbance. She was unarmed. At the time
of the shooting, several officers reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=24980&F=T&]
can be seen in videos
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=24981&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlc3VuLmNvLnVrL25ld3MvMTM2NzY4MzIvYXNobGktYmFiYml0dC1raWxsZWQtdXMtY2FwaXRvbC12aWRlby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=],
standing in the crowd of protestors in which Babbitt was present.

We obtained the records in our lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25506&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jYXBpdG9sLWphbi02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
concerning two FOIA requests we submitted on April 8, 2021 to the
Metropolitan Police Department and the Office of the Chief Medical
Examiner for records related to Babbitt’s death (_Judicial Watch v.
The District of Columbia_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=24983&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGlzdHJpY3Qtb2YtY29sb21iaWEtYXNobGktYmFiYml0dC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAxNzEwLWIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
(No. 2021 CA 001710 B)).

The newly obtained records reveal:

* On January 8, 2021, at 7:13 p.m., an application to cremate
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGdzLTcwNS03MDYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
the body of Babbitt is labeled “completed successfully.” Copies of
the permit are sent to OCME officials Kimberli Hall and SaVern Fripp,
as well as Melinda Smith, Jennifer Love, Lisa Tabron, Jeanette Belle,
and Perlieshia Gales.
* In a January 6, 2021, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25508&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGctMzk1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
sent at 9:48 p.m. from OCME official Denise Lyles to medical examiner
Francisco Diaz, the subject line is, “Case #21-00106 ID
Confirmed.” [Case 21-00106 was Ashli Babbitt’s file number.]
* On January 6, 2021, at 9:43 p.m., Lyles emails
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25509&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGdzLTYzNi02MzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
OCME official Dr. Jennifer Love an attachment with the message, “I
am updating the information we received from IAD [Internal Affairs
Division] re the confirmed ID for OCME Case #21-00106 [Ashli
Babbitt’s case]. These are the prints that returned from the FBI,
that the detectives from IAD provided. I dropped them in the e-case
file. Their names are noted below.”

Lyles appears to have forwarded the file after having received it at
9:33 p.m. on January 6 from someone (whose name is redacted) within
the Prince George’s County, MD, Police Criminal Investigation
Division, assigned to the “Homicide Unit – FBI/Cross Border Task
Force.” The file had been sent to that person at 9:30 p.m. on
January 6 from someone with the email address
efcon@gmw00001.str0.ngi.cjis.

* On January 6, 2021, at 7:42 p.m., OCME official Jamie Spann
emailed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25510&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGdzLTY2MC02NjIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
a scanned file called “21-00106 FBI Submission Form” to Grant
Greenwalt
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25511&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL2dyYW50LWdyZWVud2FsdC0zN2EwMDkyNT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==],
Manager of the Crime Scenes Sciences unit of the DC Department of
Forensic Sciences, as well as someone with the email address
spc@leo.gov, and copying medical examiners Francisco Diaz and Jennifer
Love, asking, “Please run the attached prints.” This document
contained Ashli Babbitt’s fingerprints.

Greenwalt forwards the request to David Chumbley
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25512&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGNjb3VydHMuZ292L3NpdGVzL2RlZmF1bHQvZmlsZXMvcGRmLW9waW5pb25zLzA2LUNGLTE2MDVfTVRELlBERj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==],
an officer of the DC Police Department. Chumbley forwards the prints
from his iPhone at 8:06 p.m. on January 6 to someone identified as
Jamese Kororma within the DC government. The email sent to “Jamese
Kororma” resulted in multiple Microsoft “undeliverable
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25513&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGdzLTk2My05NjYvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==
messages being returned, written in what appear to be Chinese
characters.

* On January 7, 2021, Forensics photographer Matthew Brown emailed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25514&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGdzLTc0NC03NDcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
OCME colleagues regarding Babbitt’s case with “High”
importance,” stating, “Due to the high-profile nature of case
21-00106, Dr. Diaz has requested limited access to this case. Please
create a secure folder on the photo server for case 21-00106 and
provide access only to the following OCME staff: Dr. Mitchell, Dr.
Diaz, Anna Francis, Matthew Brown.”

Brown adds, “Currently there are no images or folders on the photo
server for this case. The images are being held on the OCME archiving
server until a secure folder is created.”

Michael Coleman, OCME’s Chief Information Officer, responded two
hours later, “The requested directory has been created with the
stipulated access granted. Please let me know if any additional
adjustments are required.”

Brown replies, “Thank you Mike. The case photos are now available on
the server.”

Responding separately to Coleman, OCME Records Manager Anna Francis
says, “I have restricted the e-case file as well. For work purposes,
the following groups have access, please let me know if permissions
should be limited further: 1. Anna Francis; 2. MLI Investigations; 3.
Medical Examiners; 4. Michael Coleman; 5. Roger Mitchell; 6.
QC-n-RecMgmt; 7. Investigators.”

* In a January 14, 2021, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25515&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGctMzkzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
from Deputy Chief Toxicologist Stephen Raso to OCME colleague Samantha
Tolliver with the subject “Capital Riot Cases,” Raso states,
“See attached prelim results.”
* In a February 2, 2021, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25516&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYmFiYml0dC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDE3MTAtcGctMzc3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
from OCME official Andrea Pugh to medical examiner Dr. Francisco Diaz,
Pugh indicated that the preliminary toxicology report on Babbitt was
completed.
* On January 13, 2021, Dr. Francisco Diaz emailed

There is intense public interest in the shooting of Ashli Babbitt at
the Capitol on January 6. The continued secrecy and delayed release of
information about the shooting death of Ashli Babbitt are suspicious
and smacks of politics. The Metropolitan Police Department has not yet
produced documents about the shooting of Ms. Babbitt.

This document release is part of Judicial Watch’s independent
investigation into the January 6 disturbance.

MILLIONS OF TAX DOLLARS TO MAKE UNIVERSITY OF PITTSBURGH ‘ONE-STOP
FETAL TISSUE SHOP’

The abortion industry is big business, and your tax dollars are
supporting it. This is a gross affront to any system of values that
purports to respect human life.

For example, nearly $3 million in federal funds were spent on the
University of Pittsburgh’s quest to become a “Tissue Hub” for
human fetal tissue ranging from 6 to 42 weeks gestation. To put this
in perspective, a typical pregnancy lasts
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25540&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWNvZy5vcmcvd29tZW5zLWhlYWx0aC9leHBlcnRzLWFuZC1zdG9yaWVzL2Fzay1hY29nL2hvdy1sb25nLWRvZXMtcHJlZ25hbmN5LWxhc3Q/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=]
40 weeks.

We learned this after we and The Center for Medical Progress
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25052&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2VudGVyZm9ybWVkaWNhbHByb2dyZXNzLm9yZy9hYm91dC11cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=]
(CMP) received
252 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25491&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLW5paC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcmVjb3Jkcy0wMDY0Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=]
of documents from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.

We represent CMP in a Freedom of Information lawsuit against HHS,
which was filed after the agency failed to respond to an April 28,
2020, FOIA request seeking, among other things, the grant applications
for a University of Pittsburgh “tissue hub and collection site.”
(_Center for Medical Progress v. U.S. Department of Health and Human
Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25060&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NtcC12LWhocy1mZXRhbC10aXNzdWUtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNjQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
(No. 1:21-cv-00642)).

The documents reveal the following:

* The aims of the project listed in the original 2015 proposal were
to “develop a pipeline
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25492&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNjgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
to the acquisition, quality control and distribution of human
genitourinary [urinary and genital organs and functions] samples
obtained throughout development (6-42 weeks gestation). ... [and]
generate an ongoing resource to distribute fresh developmental human
genitourinary samples from various stages (6-42 weeks) to the GUDMAP
[GenitoUrinary Development Molecular Anatomy Project] Atlas
projects.”
* In the proposal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25493&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNjkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx],
Pitt notes that it has been “collecting fetal tissue for over 10
years ... include[ing] liver, heart, gonads, legs, brain,
genitourinary tissues including kidneys, ureters and bladders.”
* Pitt noted in 2015 “we have disbursed over 300 fresh samples
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25494&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZ3MtMTI3LTE0NC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=]
collected from 77 cases. The collections can be significantly ramped
up as material could have been accrued from as many as 725 cases last
year.”
* The Health Sciences Tissue Bank at Pitt is “embedded
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25492&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNjgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
within the Department of Pathology ... thus providing rapid access to
very high quality tissue and biological specimens.”
* Pitt boasts it has a number of internal connections as well as a
“strong working relationship with UPMC [University of Pittsburgh
Medical Center] and the Department of Pathology” as well as three
“laboratories in the flagship UPMC hospitals.” This includes a lab
boasting a “ButcherBoy band saw for sectioning bone
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25541&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZ3MtMTM1LTEzNi9dLOKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==

The proposal ironically also boasts about the laboratories at the
“Children’s Hospital of Pittsburgh
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25496&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xMzgvXS7igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=
* Later in the proposal, Pitt states that it records the “warm
ischemic time
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25497&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNzAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
on our samples and take steps to keep it at a minimum to ensure the
highest quality biological specimens.” [The “warm ischemic time”
refers to the amount of time an organ remains at body temperature
after blood supply has been cut off. Warm ischemic time differs from

chilled. Pitt’s statement suggests the time between the abortion
and collection is minimal.]
* The Pitt scientists note “All fetal tissue is collected through
a collaborative process
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25498&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNzIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]

* Pitt anticipated “being able to harvest and distribute

* Pitt’s target goal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25500&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xNzgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]

* Pitt’s proposal also included a racial target
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25501&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xODQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
for harvesting human fetal parts. Of its planned aborted

to 70% white.
* Pitt’s proposal requested more than $3.2 million
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25502&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2hocy1jbXAtcmVzcG9uc2l2ZS1yZWNvcmRzLWp1bHktMjAyMS1wZy0xMTkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
over a five-year period. The documents show NIH has funded at least
$2.7 million so far for Pitt’s human fetal tissue harvesting and
hub.

You can learn more from The Center for Medical Progress’ press
release available here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25503&F=T&].

These latest documents show taxpayer money is being used to turn the
University of Pittsburgh is a one-stop human fetal tissue shop –
from procuring the tissue from elective abortions, “subdividing”
the human remains, to distributing and shipping the harvested tissue.

In March 2021, a federal court ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=22382&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYWJvcnRlZC1mZXR1c2VzLWluZm9ybWF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
HHS to release additional information about its purchases of organs
harvested from aborted human fetuses. The court also found “there is
reason to question” whether the transactions violate federal law
barring the sale of fetal organs.

In May 2021, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=22536&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHVtYW5pemVkLW1pY2UtZmRhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
records from the FDA showing the agency spent tens of thousands of
taxpayer dollars to buy human fetal tissue from California-based
Advanced Bioscience Resources (ABR). The tissue was used in creating
“humanized mice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=17668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXd0bi5jb20vY2F0aG9saWNpc20vbGlicmFyeS9mZXRhbC1leHBlcmltZW50YXRpb24tZnJhbmtlbnN0ZWluLXJldmlzaXRlZC05NjEwXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==
to test “biologic drug products.” The records show the agency
ordered shipments to be “fresh; shipped on wet ice.”

In June 2020, we released records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=19379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmRhLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
showing the FDA between 2012 and 2018 entered into eight contracts
worth $96,370 with Advanced Bioscience Resources (ABR) to acquire
“fresh and never frozen” tissue from 1st and 2nd trimester
aborted fetuses for use in creating humanized mice for ongoing
research. In February 2020, we made public
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=17891&F=T&]
additional humanized mice records.

All these records constitute a catalog of horrors that should shock
the conscience. Our grim work exposing these outrages will continue.
It is a moral imperative.

BORDER CRISIS: JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BIDEN ADMINISTRATION FOR
INFORMATION ON ALIENS CHARGED WITH CRIMES AFTER ENTERING U.S.

President Biden’s lawless opening of our southern border is almost
certainly allowing all manner of dangerous people into our country,
and he’s covering it up.

In 2018, the Trump administration initiated the Migrant Protection
Protocols program
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25542&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9taWdyYW50LXByb3RlY3Rpb24tcHJvdG9jb2xzXTs/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=
it went into effect in early 2019. Under the program, also referred to
as “Remain in Mexico,” asylum-seekers and other aliens who arrived
at the Southwest Border were required to remain in Mexico while U.S.
officials processed their immigration claims
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25528&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9uZXdzLzIwMTkvMDEvMjQvbWlncmFudC1wcm90ZWN0aW9uLXByb3RvY29scz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==].
The Biden administration suspended the program on January 21, 2021,
then terminated it on June 1, 2021.

On March 18, 2021, we filed a FOIA request with the Biden Department
of Homeland Security (DHS) for information on asylum-seekers and other
aliens participating in MPP who have been charged with crimes after
entering the United States. Our request is simple:

Records reflecting the number of enrollees in the Migrant Protection
Program who have been charged with crimes after entering the United
States under MPP; the nature of the charges; the disposition of the
charges; and demographic data of those enrollees charged, such as age,
sex, country of origin, etc.

After CBP and ICE failed to respond, we sued on July 16 (_Judicial
Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25534&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLW1pZ3JhbnQtcHJvZ3JhbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDE5MjcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
(No. 1:21-cv-01927)).

After Biden suspended Trump’s security measure, DHS opened the gates
further. DHS announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25529&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9uZXdzLzIwMjEvMDIvMTEvZGhzLWFubm91bmNlcy1wcm9jZXNzLWFkZHJlc3MtaW5kaXZpZHVhbHMtbWV4aWNvLWFjdGl2ZS1tcHAtY2FzZXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=]
that beginning on February 19:

DHS will begin processing people who had been forced to “remain in
Mexico” under the Migrant Protection Protocols (MPP). Approximately
25,000 individuals in MPP continue to have active cases.
The DHS announcement also said that individuals enrolled in the MPP
program who are eligible to enter the United States while their cases
are processed would be allowed to enter the U.S. through designated
ports of entry at designated times:

We will provide instructions in the coming days for how individuals
with active MPP cases may remotely register for in-processing. We will
continue to enforce U.S. immigration law and border security measures
throughout this process.
In mid-April, Texas, Missouri and Louisiana sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25530&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvdGV4YXMtbG91aXNpYW5hLXN1ZS1iaWRlbi1kaHMtY3JpbWluYWwtaWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
the Biden DHS and immigration agencies for ending MPP and demanded the
program be reinstated. When the Texas/Missouri
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25531&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGV4YXNhdHRvcm5leWdlbmVyYWwuZ292L3NpdGVzL2RlZmF1bHQvZmlsZXMvaW1hZ2VzL2FkbWluLzIwMjEvUHJlc3MvQ29tcGxhaW50LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgwNjIzMzYzMQ==]
lawsuit was filed, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25532&F=T&]
said:

President Biden could immediately remedy the influx of crime pouring
across our border by reinstating the Migrant Protection Protocols.
Dangerous criminals are taking advantage of the lapse in law
enforcement and it’s resulting in human trafficking, smuggling, a
plethora of violent crimes, and a massive, unprecedented burden on
state and federal programs for which taxpayers must foot the bill.
According to the Louisiana complaint
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=22683&F=T&],
the Biden administration exceeded its authority by rescinding MPP:

Federal law requires Defendants to take custody of many criminal
aliens, including those with final orders of removal, those convicted
of drug offenses, and those convicted of crimes of moral turpitude. By
refusing to take these criminal aliens into custody, Defendants [the
Biden administration immigration agencies] have disregarded
non-discretionary legal duties.
In May, it was reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25533&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS9uZXdzL21vcmUtdGhhbi02MS0wMDAtcmVsZWFzZWQtYm9yZGVyLWJpZGVuP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
“More than 61,000 immigrants who illegally crossed the U.S.-Mexico
border have been released into the United States since President Joe
Biden took office, according to federal data.” Prior to the
suspension of MPP, these individuals would have been returned to
Mexico to wait while their applications for entry were adjudicated.

The Biden administration should come clean about crimes committed by
aliens as a result of its reckless decision to end the Migration
Protection Protocols, a commonsense measure put in place by the Trump
administration to try to control the border.

In other actions provoked by the Biden administration border crisis,
in June we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25238&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaGhzLWNvdmlkLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODA2MjMzNjMx]
against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for
COVID-19 technical guidance provided to the Office of Refugee
Resettlement relating to illegal aliens released by the U.S.
Department of Homeland Security and U.S. Customs and Border Patrol. I
noted at the time, “The Biden administration secrecy on its border
crisis includes stonewalling on the issue of COVID-19 and illegal
immigration and controversial refugee resettlement programs.”

On April 30, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=22861&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLWNyaXNpcy1jaGlsZHJlbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=]
against HHS for records about assaults on and abuse of unaccompanied
alien children in its custody after it was disclosed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=22838&F=T&]
that multiple facilities where children are being held are unsafe. We
are concerned that the surge of migrants seeking to take advantage of
the Biden administration’s lax immigration policies has resulted in
the foreseeable abuse of children, as overwhelmed federal authorities
are ill-equipped to handle the huge number of children crossing the
border.

Let me be clear: the Biden administration is engaged in what fairly be
called the largest human trafficking operation in world history. And
you can be sure that Judicial Watch will do what we can to uncover the
truth about this unprecedented assault on our nation’s sovereignty
and safety.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS OF DIPLOMATS SUBJECTED TO ANAL COVID
TESTS BY CHINA

The gall of the Chinese Communists in abusing our diplomats is matched
only by the weak response by the Biden State Department.

In February2021, it was reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25537&F=T&]
that U.S. diplomats were subjected to anal swab testing for COVID-19
by the Chinese government. At the time, the State Department told The
Hill that,

Chinese officials who forced American diplomats to undergo an anal
swab for COVID-19 testing did so “in error,” the State Department
told The Hill on Thursday, as Beijing denies it conducted the tests at
all....

A State spokesperson responded to a request for comment from The Hill
by saying that the department “never agreed” to such tests and had
protested directly to the Chinese Ministry of Foreign Affairs
following complaints from staff.
To learn more about this outrage, we filed a Freedom of Information
Act request for:

All records about US diplomatic personnel in or seeking to enter China
being subjected to anal swab tests for the COVID-19 virus, including
all complaints and communications regarding such testing. This request
does not seek any personal identifying information of US diplomatic
personnel that may have been subjected to such testing.
Per usual, our request wasn’t answered as the law required, which is
why Judicial Watch just filed a FOIA lawsuit against the State
Department for the documents. Again, we simply want non-identifying
records of U.S. diplomatic personnel being subjected to invasive
COVID-19 “anal swab” tests by the Chinese government (_Judicial
Watch v U.S. Dept of State_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56349&L=25536&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGVwdC1vZi1zdGF0ZS1jaGluYS1jb3ZpZC10ZXN0aW5nLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjExMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MDYyMzM2MzE=]
(No. 1:21-cv-02111)).

Our diplomatic personnel was abused in a reprehensible way by the
Chinese government, and the Biden administration seems to have done
little in response – except to cover it up.

Until next week ...

clean_body: Emails Show Fetal Organ “Chop Shop” [INSIDE JW] New Documents Reveal the DC Office of the Chief Medical Examiner Submitted a Request to Cremate Ashli Babbitt Two Days after Gaining Custody of Her Body [==] Judicial Watch just received the first public documents about the shooting death of Ashli Babbitt. We obtained 1160 pages [] of documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) that document new details of the investigation of the homicide of the Air Force veteran and San Diego native. These new documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for permission to cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of her body and that, due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s case, Deputy Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a secure electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s records. Additionally, Babbitt’s fingerprints were emailed to a person supposedly working for the DC government, which resulted in Microsoft “undeliverable” messages written in Chinese characters being returned. Babbitt was shot and killed by an unidentified law enforcement officer as she attempted to climb through a broken interior window in the Capitol Building, located outside the Speaker’s Lobby off the House Floor during the January 6 disturbance. She was unarmed. At the time of the shooting, several officers reportedly [] can be seen in videos [=], standing in the crowd of protestors in which Babbitt was present. We obtained the records in our lawsuit [==] concerning two FOIA requests we submitted on April 8, 2021 to the Metropolitan Police Department and the Office of the Chief Medical Examiner for records related to Babbitt’s death (Judicial Watch v. The District of Columbia [] (No. 2021 CA 001710 B)). BORDER CRISIS: JUDICIAL WATCH SUES BIDEN ADMINISTRATION FOR INFORMATION ON ALIENS CHARGED WITH CRIMES AFTER ENTERING U.S. President Biden’s lawless opening of our southern border is almost certainly allowing all manner of dangerous people into our country, and he’s covering it up. In 2018, the Trump administration initiated the Migrant Protection Protocols program [= it went into effect in early 2019. Under the program, also referred to as “Remain in Mexico,” asylum-seekers and other aliens who arrived at the Southwest Border were required to remain in Mexico while U.S. officials processed their immigration claims [==]. The Biden administration suspended the program on January 21, 2021, then terminated it on June 1, 2021. On March 18, 2021, we filed a FOIA request with the Biden Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for information on asylum-seekers and other aliens participating in MPP who have been charged with crimes after entering the United States. Our request is simple: Records reflecting the number of enrollees in the Migrant Protection Program who have been charged with crimes after entering the United States under MPP; the nature of the charges; the disposition of the charges; and demographic data of those enrollees charged, such as age, sex, country of origin, etc. After CBP and ICE failed to respond, we sued on July 16 (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:21-cv-01927)). After Biden suspended Trump’s security measure, DHS opened the gates further. DHS announced [=] that beginning on February 19: DHS will begin processing people who had been forced to “remain in Mexico” under the Migrant Protection Protocols (MPP). Approximately 25,000 individuals in MPP continue to have active cases. The DHS announcement also said that individuals enrolled in the MPP program who are eligible to enter the United States while their cases are processed would be allowed to enter the U.S. through designated ports of entry at designated times: We will provide instructions in the coming days for how individuals with active MPP cases may remotely register for in-processing. We will continue to enforce U.S. immigration law and border security measures throughout this process. In mid-April, Texas, Missouri and Louisiana sued [] the Biden DHS and immigration agencies for ending MPP and demanded the program be reinstated. When the Texas/Missouri [==] lawsuit was filed, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton [=] said: President Biden could immediately remedy the influx of crime pouring across our border by reinstating the Migrant Protection Protocols. Dangerous criminals are taking advantage of the lapse in law enforcement and it’s resulting in human trafficking, smuggling, a plethora of violent crimes, and a massive, unprecedented burden on state and federal programs for which taxpayers must foot the bill. By refusing to take these criminal aliens into custody, Defendants [the Biden administration immigration agencies] have disregarded non-discretionary legal duties. In May, it was reported [] “More than 61,000 immigrants who illegally crossed the U.S.-Mexico border have been released into the United States since President Joe Biden took office, according to federal data.” Prior to the suspension of MPP, these individuals would have been returned to Mexico to wait while their applications for entry were adjudicated. The Biden administration should come clean about crimes committed by aliens as a result of its reckless decision to end the Migration Protection Protocols, a commonsense measure put in place by the Trump administration to try to control the border.
